Before I let you know why I decided to join this campaign, **[I was hoping you could chip in?](http://links.matsuiforcongress.com/s/c/Hiip_X0Ao-Q5RV1OlDEpGxcXS_eYlq7RPGyJ0lESEpqL_ilBMwtonm68zsBSTLmKnKXDGjAYQ_9q1fHliiRigkzXgPBhhL71qCncESPy36Kp_xMPh9panpzcFlJkYTNcxlMdnSaswkvmMxSgvYbfT-Wbph_enYBk7ib551bhu2_HxysvPnLMf4BxsVlIFVJvwrk08jaTq69EUic7d9VF0nGzc0J4j9PoJvhpzCWFohfy7fyKxj0NfM0osXLbKmbfq_88MtDdbsCL_kIo8yHEiqOILuqfAEENilhfyep03rnmsCer7jPTcSeWoTaXiO1iCTy7jFOSMbq8hlyUtip1cHy39pH_zI1GnOCcNu0bSzp7TDWEGuCYEybne2-MrgsWhuQP3_2VCFNa-VqnSWuCDBBn02yVS0__p6lWuUyiBSSmK0F15Gk6XsxWzOVVG66vA1ytcrcG6feWeNM5tzXfOoKUKQx-Say_rAIGiyV118_bBqbsRYBtK8KatKC__EcXEunV6czyDZKTLO_thCPqzjph3Vj3y9WfMwWwTkBMnTtz2i12q_CX3TDv9V4QK0f1LCDP_MjGJMjOH6ejGtQEn83LGwmRtrFDtQZYUJ3eTK29rhbTjaxLSeM5wwt6Pvg-QQTDegGmy-R3pabLVWrcvVTepSc5bKE1Mg8K4MPJLvBlW5LMXnSBfxj5wG12fLsQqI2CiY61AVEd7srrWtooP2iofLSP8mNTpn5Mc2Ve7-8drYjKbqkFfIZv8KCereuIf2Nwy_V9gLUQzqdPTRmySq1dcYoDTsJzcFvOx4Hyqa5Hfo_a6Uqx2IOeoB1A9b15T-UTdjuuSDvtTM-xheMgelzOZFj6pRBWLjWE08um6kIZkS1QbL3O9QUWcmGUV9ja8SFkw5oAi-mkFviyRQ/2c9sPJGGuPaPspt0shUxG73wclaAWIBf/17)** I’m excited to join Doris’s campaign at such a pivotal moment. I’ve seen what it takes to win tough races, and I’m ready to bring those hard-won lessons with me here to help Doris cross the finish line in November. I’ve been a California native my whole life. I grew up in a rural mountain community near Yosemite National Park before moving to Sacramento for college – graduating from Sac State and then working on campaigns and in local government. I married my high school sweetheart, and we live right here in Sacramento. I wanted to join this campaign because Doris has consistently delivered for our region. She has brought home billions of dollars for our district for vital infrastructure and projects. She’s a skilled negotiator constantly advocating for policy that works for us. Not to mention, she’s rated as one of the most effective legislators in Congress. Doris is a leader who will put our best interests first, and I’m committed to building the strongest possible campaign for Doris. [**But I can’t do it alone. We’re going to need resources for volunteers, yard signs, digital outreach, field organizing, and direct voter communication in our district. Will you support this campaign by making sure we have the funds we need to support clean_body: My name is Will Antinetti, and I’m the new campaign manager on Team Matsui. | | | Hi folks, My name is Will Antinetti, and I’m the new campaign manager on Team Matsui. Before I let you know why I decided to join this campaign, I’m excited to join Doris’s campaign at such a pivotal moment. I’ve seen what it takes to win tough races, and I’m ready to bring those hard-won lessons with me here to help Doris cross the finish line in November. I’ve been a California native my whole life. I grew up in a rural mountain community near Yosemite National Park before moving to Sacramento for college – graduating from Sac State and then working on campaigns and in local government. I married my high school sweetheart, and we live right here in Sacramento. I wanted to join this campaign because Doris has consistently delivered for our region. She has brought home billions of dollars for our district for vital infrastructure and projects. She’s a skilled negotiator constantly advocating for policy that works for us. Not to mention, she’s rated as one of the most effective legislators in Congress. Doris is a leader who will put our best interests first, and I’m committed to building the strongest possible campaign for Doris. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | I look forward to working together, Will As a Member of Congress, Doris works to ensure that the voices of her district’s constituents are heard in Congress, and fights for the needs of the Sacramento region. Paid for by Matsui for Congress

Peter ,
Big news out of Virginia today!
The Virginia Supreme Court just ruled that they’ll allow a redistricting ballot measure to move forward – clearing the way for a special election this April that could unlock a new congressional map that gives Democrats as many as four new seats in the midterms!
You’re a huge part of this victory, Peter! Last year, with your help, we flipped the Virginia State House and won every single election GOTV PAC invested in.
That majority is why this moment is possible.
Republicans in states like Texas, under orders from Donald Trump, set off this redistricting arms race to protect their majority in the House, and you’ve given Virginia Democrats a chance to fight back. Now voters will get the final say.
April 21 is the next test, so can you chip in to GOTV PAC to help us turn out the vote in Virginia and lock in this new map? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=Email02132026]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

body:
That means every single voter we can reach gets us one step closer
| Friend, the choices voters make in Wisconsin have a higher impact than in _any other state._ [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-feb26.oH05rx&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_021326_B1_Voters&t=2&akid=5844%2E196590%2ELInlQH) In 9 months, all eyes are going to be on Wisconsin, especially in this race for governor. **Because each vote is so significant in swaying the final election outcome, every single voter we can reach now gets us one step closer to victory.** But this study also tells us that each vote Tom Tiffany secures is a huge blow to our chances of holding the Governorship to deliver for Wisconsin families, reject Trump's far-right and extremist agenda, and build a Democratic trifecta. With a $2 million war chest AND Donald Trump's public endorsement, we need your support — **this race could come down to a handful of votes, and every dollar you give helps us reach more voters in-person and on the airwaves.** We won’t be taking any vote for granted as we fight for Mandela’s bold vision for our state. **[So we’re asking today: can we count on you to chip in $15 or $27 today so our team has the resources to reach all corners of Wisconsin? →](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6725?c0=mb-em-fr-feb26.FHmzJ-&refcode=MB_EM_FR_021326_B1_Voters&t=3&akid=5844%2E196590%2ELInlQH)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=mb-em-fr-feb26.ZvCZqZ&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_021326_B1_Voters&t=4&akid=5844%2E196590%2ELInlQH)

clean_body: That means every single voter we can reach gets us one step closer | Friend, the choices voters make in Wisconsin have a higher impact than in any other state. In 9 months, all eyes are going to be on Wisconsin, especially in this race for governor. Because each vote is so significant in swaying the final election outcome, every single voter we can reach now gets us one step closer to victory. But this study also tells us that each vote Tom Tiffany secures is a huge blow to our chances of holding the Governorship to deliver for Wisconsin families, reject Trump's far-right and extremist agenda, and build a Democratic trifecta. With a $2 million war chest AND Donald Trump's public endorsement, we need your support — this race could come down to a handful of votes, and every dollar you give helps us reach more voters in-person and on the airwaves. We won’t be taking any vote for granted as we fight for Mandela’s bold vision for our state. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | | | | | | | | | | Let's do this, Team Mandela Barnes | | Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin P.O. | | Hi Peter, If you have been watching the national news, you know how close the fight for the House majority is. Most of the focus is on a handful of seats in New York and California. Those races are incredibly important. **But there is a new story developing in Utah that Team Riebe needs you to see.** After a decade-long battle against partisan gerrymandering, Utahns finally won. A state court threw out the old maps and ordered a new, fair congressional map for the 2026 election. [_**This created a brand-new 1st Congressional District, and the Cook Political Report shifted this seat from Solid Republican to Solid Democratic. This is one of the highest-impact opportunities in the country to flip a seat. Can you help us capitalize on our momentum?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125350370/601504581/77605841?&refcode=E28368-20260213-NewPoll-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWNkZDkwYmQtMzkwOS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zrRnQEh4L_Z8sLAEk9ygDZmdYDqFYwN90xAbOlnp0_g=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125350371/601504582/77605841?&refcode=E28368-20260213-NewPoll-Image-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWNkZDkwYmQtMzkwOS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zrRnQEh4L_Z8sLAEk9ygDZmdYDqFYwN90xAbOlnp0_g=) | [**CHIP IN TO FLIP THE HOUSE →** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125350372/601504583/77605841?&refcode=E28368-20260213-NewPoll-SB-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWNkZDkwYmQtMzkwOS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zrRnQEh4L_Z8sLAEk9ygDZmdYDqFYwN90xAbOlnp0_g=)

But there is a challenge. Republicans are already sitting on a $2.2 million war chest and are prepared to spend whatever it takes to protect the status quo and keep this seat in GOP hands.
If we want to turn this map blue, we have to start building our resources now. We can’t wait for the national spotlight to find us in October. We have to be ready today.

Hey friend, Maggie here — Deb’s Digital Director. I hate to reach out like this, but I’m about to walk into an emergency budget meeting where I have to give my team — including Deb — some difficult news: **Without a surge of small-dollar donations immediately, we won’t meet our mid-month fundraising goal. **
**With just a few days until our mid-month deadline, we need people like you to step up right now to close the gap. Your support is crucial to helping Deb become the next governor of New Mexico so she can deliver a future where everyone can thrive.[Can you rush $5 to help fuel our campaign?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5130?t=3&akid=7478%2E400544%2EXyJr2G)**

Unlike the GOP billionaire opponents in this race, Deb doesn’t come from money and has never had the means to self-fund a campaign.

**What she does have is people like you, friend, who are helping build a people-powered campaign from the ground up. I know you hear from us a lot about how low our average gift is****—** **[just $27 — but what that really means is that instead of special interests and billionaires cutting large checks, this campaign is fueled by thousands of people like you giving what you can, when you can. That’s because Deb is committed to governing for every single New Mexican — and that commitment starts with building a campaign powered by the people.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5133?t=8&akid=7478%2E400544%2EXyJr2G)**

But at a time when Democrats’ margins in New Mexico are shrinking, and Republicans know they’re within striking distance, we need a surge of grassroots donations to reach our $30,000 goal and lay the foundation for winning in November. The next governor of New Mexico will make decisions that shape our future: from education and affordability to healthcare and public safety. And FIVE extremist Republicans are ready to bring their agenda here. Your support could be what stops them.
**[Please, will you chip in $27 or whatever you can spare to help fuel our grassroots movement, win in New Mexico, and build a better future for working families?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5133?t=9&akid=7478%2E400544%2EXyJr2G)**

I came from hard work, turning wrenches, hauling freight, and building something out of nothing. clean_body: | Peter, Mike Collins here. And I'm going to be real with you, Just one buck. But before I do, I need you to understand why. The Radical Left has spent years trying to destroy everything that makes America strong- They say folks like us are " DANGEROUS." They want to CONTROL your speech, your paycheck, and your vote. Well, not on my watch. I didn't come from money. I came from hard work, turning wrenches, hauling freight, and building something out of nothing. And that's why I'm running for the U.S. Senate, to finish what we started with President Trump: 👉 SECURE the border. 👉 CUT wasteful spending. 👉 PUT AMERICANS first again. The Democrats have billionaires and Silicon Valley cash. But me? I've got YOU, the grassroots patriots who believe in this country as much as I do. So here's my ask: Not because $1 funds a campaign. But because it proves that real Americans, NOT career politicians, are taking our country back. Every time you give, even a single dollar, it sends a message that Georgia is DONE being ignored. Let's show Schumer and his dark-money allies that this fight belongs to the people -- not the elites. | For Georgia. For America. For freedom. - Mike Collins PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE PO Box 6491 Athens, GA 30604 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this, please .

name: Marie
subject: I won’t stop fighting for you
body:
| | Peter, I ran for Congress because I was tired of watching politicians talk past the real issues facing working families and rural communities. I thought that we deserved to have someone in the room who had lived those challenges – someone who knew what it meant to worry about a childcare bill, a late paycheck, or a broken transmission.

That’s still why I’m here.

**But, it’s also why national special interest groups want to replace me with a career politician who will unquestioningly rubber-stamp their agenda. clean_body: | | Peter, I ran for Congress because I was tired of watching politicians talk past the real issues facing working families and rural communities. I thought that we deserved to have someone in the room who had lived those challenges – someone who knew what it meant to worry about a childcare bill, a late paycheck, or a broken transmission. That’s still why I’m here. But, it’s also why national special interest groups want to replace me with a career politician who will unquestioningly rubber-stamp their agenda. We can’t let that happen. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = National Republicans have been trying to replace me since the day I was sworn in. Not because of my votes, but because they know I won’t take orders from party bosses or corporate PACs. They want someone who will. Election Day will be here before we know it, and we can’t afford to lose any time. We’re already working hard to build up our grassroots campaign once again, from hiring staff to planning media buys, organizing volunteers, and more. = Thanks for all you do, Marie | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. name: Sarah McBride
subject: Not normal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
This isn’t normal — and we can’t treat it like it is.
# [](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1269?t=1&akid=2825%2E21716%2EGFmn-1)
What’s happening in Washington right now is _not_ normal politics. It’s something else entirely.
**Donald Trump is trying to rewrite the rules and put our freedoms at risk to benefit himself.** In just the past year, the Trump administration has deployed the National Guard to occupy our cities and punish political opponents, turned ICE into a paramilitary-like force, and even arrested independent journalists who are protected by the First Amendment, like Don Lemon and Georgia Fort.
Every unconstitutional act they take is about silencing everyday people like you and me.
But I’m not backing down.
**I ran for Congress to deliver for Delaware and make this world a kinder, fairer place, and I still believe in that mission.**
So, while the GOP works to divide us and strip away our rights, I’m pushing back louder, stronger, and more determined than ever. That’s what fuels my fight, and I’m not going anywhere.
[**If you’re ready to stand up to push back against their attacks, pitch in $5 to send a powerful message that we won’t back down. Every contribution powers our fight to take back the House and put a real check on this president.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260213-1.tzGXKk&refcode=em20260213-2825&amount=5&t=2&akid=2825%2E21716%2EGFmn-1)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260213-1.tzGXKk&amount=5&refcode=em20260213-2825&t=21&akid=2825%2E21716%2EGFmn-1)**
Thank you,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-2026-footer?refcode=em20260213-1&t=22&refcode2=2825_21716_GFmn-1&akid=2825%2E21716%2EGFmn-1)**

** FRIDAY FOCUS
------------------------------------------------------------

January 30, 2026

Welcome to the Friday Focus: your end-of-week snapshot from Team Mai with updates, upcoming events, and ways to plug into our people powered campaign.

** NEWS & UPDATES
------------------------------------------------------------

Roses are red, love is nice — keep families together: abolish ICE.

>From #TeamMai, with Love.

Share our Valentine’s Day Card and follow us on Instagram. (https://www.instagram.com/p/DUt-XueAX2B/?igsh=NTc4MTIwNjQ2YQ==&utm_source=Mai+Vang+for+Congress&utm_campaign=70d9ad179c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2026_01_31_12_06_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f6b7740e04-529763991)

DONATE (https://www.maiforus.com/maildonate?utm_source=Mai+Vang+for+Congress&utm_campaign=70d9ad179c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2026_01_31_12_06_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f6b7740e04-529763991)

NPR: “It's not a radical position to say we don't want an entity harming our families and loved ones.”

Mai was recently interviewed by NPR:

“Mai Vang was in high school in 2003 when ICE was created. Now, more than two decades later, the 40-year-old Sacramento city councilmember is campaigning on abolishing the agency as she challenges 81-year-old Democrat Doris Matsui in California's 7th Congressional District.

"What we've seen is this agency has inflicted harm on our communities, and you can't reform it. There is not enough training or even body cameras that would justify what they are doing," she said in an interview.

Read the full article here. (https://www.npr.org/2026/02/04/nx-s1-5690180/will-calls-to-abolish-ice-sway-voters-in-2026-the-strategy-has-democrats-split?utm_source=Mai+Vang+for+Congress&utm_campaign=70d9ad179c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2026_01_31_12_06_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f6b7740e04-529763991)

subject: Jim Jordan here. Fill me in now >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:

name: Official Democratic Headquarters
subject: A brief explanation:
body:
---
Derek, Today, we are going to ask you to make your [**first donation of 2026 directly to the DNC**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260213_6105_fr&refcode2=6105_22930333_37sqFi&akid=6105%2E22930333%2E37sqFi) — but first, we hope you’ll give us a chance to explain why we need your support right now. Here’s the deal:
* Trump has repeatedly floated the idea of running for a third term, asked Republicans to redraw congressional maps across the country in their favor, and threatened to end voting by mail.
* He has threatened to pull the television licenses of news agencies that have accurately covered his disastrous second term in office.
* He is weaponizing the FBI and the Department of Justice for personal revenge.

Trump wants us to be scared. He and his allies are counting on all of us completely giving up and giving in. But we can’t. And we won’t. Regaining congressional power in November is our best chance to fight back. To do it, we’re going to need a massive influx of resources. Not right before Election Day — _now._ [**So, Derek, we’re asking: Can you join thousands of your fellow Democrats in making a contribution to the DNC today? It will add up fast when we all come together to do our part:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260213_6105_fr&refcode2=6105_22930333_37sqFi&akid=6105%2E22930333%2E37sqFi) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260213_6105_fr&refcode2=6105_22930333_37sqFi&akid=6105%2E22930333%2E37sqFi)**

You already know that Trump and Republicans have ENDANGERED our Democracy.

You already know that they’ve SLASHED our healthcare and dismantled our government.

President Trump's warning was clear: The NRSC just finished the -- it's our internal strategy for holding the Senate and blocking the impeachment threat. I'm emailing a select few loyal Patriots to review it before it goes live. Can you review the briefing right now? ******************************************************************************************************** I need to know you've seen this. Ted Cruz | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

name: Team Molder
subject: Blink, and you lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Molder for Congress
body:
Quiet moments decide outcomes.

| | | | |
---
Peter, This is the part of a campaign that determines whether we win. It’s mid-month, the point when a lot of campaigns lose momentum. The early excitement has passed, the end-of-month push hasn’t started yet, and support often dips right here. At the same time, we’re also in the middle of this campaign that wraps up in November. And that matters, because the middle of a campaign is where the serious work either compounds or stalls out. This is when organizing and preparation start to separate campaigns that are built to last from those that are built for headlines. [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/A165kY2P7ekb_Xs_YtcnHA~~/AAUS1hA~/XjOiuxo-wGpgjefV_dHSTzNU1aiYZeEmi2YVSBRnTLT2fa6HD0gGn5-67cDYHV4QoSc-gs8H4tse_e244j9XXtNElB1McBrVwXyOitetv4TVxpn5uIVOtOFKNXr2Rv1DnVoEZOzkjZx7OS1gB5u0n2pEykgSuhjLLX8BwotiEveiGrdU2mL29-20OaFFBWcF_82E7hVWF2-XmII2uOq68eaA3m8mp6BKaJP-UR-j8krdXQb1Q9ALZGyF-A3WForw) Right now, Team Molder is using this mid-month stretch to do that work: talking to voters, organizing early, and preparing for what comes next, while our opponent chases attention and political theater. That difference matters. This is where campaigns either tread water or start pulling ahead. We’re building the kind of operation that can swim laps, not just stay afloat. That only happens if we keep our momentum through this part of the month _and_ this part of the campaign. name: Brent Hennrich
subject: ICE isn’t leaving Minnesota. The headlines are lying.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
I’m running against one of the 7 Dems who voted to fund this terror. | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITSxjytRqnk5Se65PvvR0SC1Vi60eIcmGaf4kR6MPJnbRGd2XwIrhDn8ZZ-Z4PPuO0Vx2PdmM8zh_l0Ht__s0eBC7GjeV-5i6EubB1JNpTQAOJpToe5zlhZXpZXMDFFRUYh7Mwsq-Yy4rE9zeTBa3-ckvKscsgp6hurobWBP463AzP5sB-1CmV1VtlSS-6OiQO0pPA38BiIJMUe3Mz56ybxg/4o5/avGO8UEORWuOFlDLHcEDoA/h0/h001.A9ODbU5nO5qEjjN-Bzj9xKKILAKfifBX35cFhTKQzrQ)
---
Peter, ICE put out a statement this week claiming they're "leaving" Minneapolis, and headlines are calling it a victory. But here's the truth. They're not leaving. They're _moving._ **In the last week they 've shifted their operations to the suburbs**. Towns like Lakeville, Burnsville, Shakopee, St. Cloud with fewer eyes watching and less organized resistance. Communities where there's no backup or support. Where a volunteer sat by herself in her car in a strip mall parking lot, **watching two masked ICE agents idle in a gray SUV, watching her back.** Where a volunteer and her father were **followed by ICE for 40 minutes** while delivering groceries to terrified families. Where ICE agents **threaten volunteers with bear mace** just for watching them. **This is state-sponsored terrorism! A strategic retreat to hunt easier prey. And it 's exactly what Marie keeps voting for every chance she gets.**
---
[ **HELP ME FIRE MGP** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8I-BiqIq30qzt3M7d2RQmlMx1CQ4fZEJEb_pjocM4dQoSx2BpZawsUAFfVHWVHKEUEJL2n1MzaKD3GkssyIuC084aP6v4c7qIdnayEMSSmanJEl3VP7oX_pGNdIst9h8wTPoWu-NFg5wUEJ2fYGHJc3lhk1rnAAyr_vruc_WxOOYXNOJe8XBSLstfPCRNmLRudX1bjqdy0qQDAauy_rlTXjBvMKD2uQMaBj3qGWAaca7bmGeGOVg-qkMsgWmSJ-ZIdqzRt0Lk93GllvHDf_eBuiFs89Km182RU2sVJXgoTvnmmzapTDq1m7f4cifzMPnE/4o5/avGO8UEORWuOFlDLHcEDoA/h1/h001.ikiJ89Mx0FVtA8BmQSPH0q7WBbLFRF_D7DNlQV9qU6E)
---
ICE is terrorizing communities that can't fight back as easily. They're perpetuating the same violence in a different zip code. **Marie Gluesenkamp Perez** is one of the seven Democrats who voted to keep these thugs funded and operational. **She refuses to condemn what ICE is doing anywhere. Not in Minnesota, not in WA-03, not anywhere in this country.** [**Chip in now to fire Marie. Send me to Congress and I'll fight to dismantle ICE myself.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8I-BiqIq30qzt3M7d2RQmlMx1CQ4fZEJEb_pjocM4dQoSx2BpZawsUAFfVHWVHKEUlGjLTsgreVSLBP_Nrmkf2cFN1mk4VSBiHIb7cgWrLcPV4S0ku9ZsNczRErE5xsIvj8nlQZctFbvqadTVuueN4AptE9RNbbtWLjSkLPVN2nSep1jcp5IojrL2S7APoN-tJ6LltpQv_-EZp8RaLe8hqm3jqRrI-yyRIC17_YZc6KJ4RlumBn6mFAWUAWqhz8vCcT56Ep5ZQ6d_LlR-t6hasE_WGRsaS_s2wvIu0qS8SSiWAEU8n1dlHkFuQ0b_8Dsh/4o5/avGO8UEORWuOFlDLHcEDoA/h2/h001.eMnVN_P53Ou2hnNE8eOj95vyUtTT8zBy2bEMcYwqmd8) ICE is a corrupt, violent agency that operates outside the bounds of the law. They're killing American citizens. They're terrorizing our cities. They're breaking windows, shipping our children to Texas detention centers, and unleashing projectiles, flash grenades, tear gas and pepper balls on our communities. **Refusing to fund that is the very least we can ask, and that 's too much to ask of Marie.** People are risking their safety to protect their neighbors. They're standing in the cold for hours. They're driving two hours to deliver groceries. They're patrolling alone in hostile towns because no one else will.
**They deserve a Congress that has their back**.

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Is there anything I can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I'm writing to you with a very straightforward question:

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=2227%2E49239%2EQ0njoB)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13993?t=2&akid=2227%2E49239%2EQ0njoB)
---
Hi null, it's Haley writing to you with a very straightforward question:
**[Is there anything I can say to convince you to donate $5 – before my crucial mid-month fundraising deadline – to help me win Michigan's battleground Senate race?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13994?t=3&akid=2227%2E49239%2EQ0njoB)**
What if I told you that there is no path to flipping the Senate blue unless we protect Michigan's Senate seat?
What if I told you that I'm statistically tied with my Trump-backed opponent, Mike Rogers, I'm doing especially well among independent voters, and your gift could help me surge ahead in the polls?

What if I told you I was born and raised in Michigan, and I’m in this fight for the Michiganders I know and love, not billionaire donors like the ones backing my GOP opponent?

What if I told you that national Republicans and their dark-money super PACs have already started pouring money into Michigan, and that the worst is yet to come?

What if I told you Trump and his MAGA Republicans could eclipse $80 million in spending, which is what they spent last time trying to flip Michigan red?
Null, I can win this race. But only with committed grassroots supporters like you fighting alongside me. That's why hitting my $175,000 mid-month fundraising goal – one donation at a time – is absolutely crucial.

**[So will you please chip in $5 to help me win in Michigan, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's chaos agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13994?t=4&akid=2227%2E49239%2EQ0njoB)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13995?t=5&akid=2227%2E49239%2EQ0njoB)
---
With grit and gratitude,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13935?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=2227%2E49239%2EQ0njoB) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13993?t=7&akid=2227%2E49239%2EQ0njoB)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Nurses get shit done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
15,000 NYC nurses on strike for over 4 weeks fighting for patient care and safe working conditions.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260213-2&t=1&akid=3153%2E587540%2EXdhOue)
Peter,
Over 4 weeks ago, the largest nurses strike in New York City history began–with 15,000 nurses taking to the streets. On Wednesday, two hospitals and over 10,000 nurses finally reached agreements. **But there are _still_ nearly 5,000 nurses out on the streets picketing.** They’re fighting for healthcare benefits for frontline nurses, safe staffing ratios, higher wages, and stronger protections against workplace violence. _These are the basic resources they need to do their jobs and actually care for their patients._
You know who’s been out there with them? **Mayor Zohran Mamdani,** who we helped elect last year, stood in solidarity on the picket line alongside Bernie Sanders, demanding hospital management reach a fair agreement.
**[This is what leadership looks like when people actually give a damn. If you want to directly support the NYC nurses, click here to take action now.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/4106?sourcecode=em20260213-3153&t=2&akid=3153%2E587540%2EXdhOue)**
**[Take Action](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/4106?sourcecode=em20260213-3153&t=3&akid=3153%2E587540%2EXdhOue)**
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/4106?sourcecode=em20260213-3153&t=4&akid=3153%2E587540%2EXdhOue)
This is precisely why we need more essential workers, including nurses, in office. Nurses don’t just talk about change. They organize, they advocate, and they get shit done.
We’ve seen this with **Molly Cook,** the ER nurse we helped elect to the Texas State Senate. She became the youngest person and first openly LGBTQ+ senator in Texas history, winning by just 62 votes. Last year she announced her “Nurse, First” legislative agenda which is aimed at improving the health, safety, and quality of life of working and middle-class Texans.
We’ve also seen the importance of healthcare workers having a voice in power with **Lauren Underwood,** the youngest Black woman ever elected to Congress, who went from being a registered nurse to co-founding the Black Maternal Health Caucus and fighting for health equity.
Nurses live and work in a broken system every day, dealing with impossible numbers of patients and understaffing issues that literally cost lives. This system still refuses to listen, so when nurses run for office, they don’t waste time, they get to work.
**For now, here’s how you can support the NYC nurses strike:** _show up_ on the picket lines in solidarity. _Donate to strike funds_ providing food and other supplies to nurses that have been out of work for weeks. _Amplify_ their voices by sharing their demands, signing petitions, emailing CEOS of hospitals.
**[Peter, the NYC nurses need our support right now. Click here and scroll down to sign the pledge and donate to the financial hardship fund for NYC’s striking nurses.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/4106?sourcecode=em20260213-3153&t=5&akid=3153%2E587540%2EXdhOue)**
**[Take Action](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/4106?sourcecode=em20260213-3153&t=6&akid=3153%2E587540%2EXdhOue)**
This fight affects all of us, because when nurses are taken care of, we are all taken care of. This is a fight we have to take on.
In solidarity,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260213-2&t=7&refcode2=3153_587540_XdhOue&akid=3153%2E587540%2EXdhOue)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=3153%2E587540%2EXdhOue)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=3153%2E587540%2EXdhOue)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

name: Trey Trainor for Congress
subject: Apology for Email Glitch Today – We're Fixing It & Appreciate Your Patience
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TREY TRAINOR FOR TEXAS
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ee5e0f9f15fe/email-glitch-02-13-26?e=4d3fe76c62)
---
[|
---](https://Trey4TX.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c9a64ea8a402e6526a97d9207&id=34448b1951&e=4d3fe76c62)
| | | | | | Peter,
I want to personally apologize for the email overload you may have received today from our campaign.
Due to a technical error in our email system, some supporters received three messages in a short window—two of which were scheduled to go out a few days later. This was not intentional, and it certainly wasn’t the experience we wanted to deliver.
Our team identified the issue quickly, corrected the error, and has put safeguards in place to prevent it from happening again. We sincerely regret any confusion, inbox clutter, or frustration this caused.
You deserve clear, respectful communication—not a flood of emails. Thank you for your understanding and for continuing to stand with us as we fight to win the March 3 Republican Primary and deliver strong conservative representation for the Texas Hill Country.
We remain grateful for your support—whether through your vote, your time volunteering, or your financial contributions. Every bit helps as early voting begins February 17.
If you have any questions or feedback, please reply to this email or call our team at (210) 245-7756. We’re here to listen.
Thank you again for your patience and for being part of this campaign. Together, we’re going to win TX-21.
For God, For Family, For Texas,
**Trey Trainor** Husband, Father of 6,Proven Conservative Fighter for TX-21

name: Jack Schlossberg
subject: Not just here to stir the pot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend, I had a feeling my social media presence would ruffle some feathers... but there's a method here.

In today's media landscape, you have to cut through the noise to make an impact.

You know I can have fun online, but **I'm serious about New Yorkers having leadership they can count on.**

America is at a dangerous crossroads right now, and it's not the time to sit back and stay quiet to keep people comfortable. It's time to call out what's going on and actually do something to change our course.

[NY-12 needs a congressperson who will meet this moment. Friend, I will be that leader. If you're with me, can I count on you to split a donation between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign now?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103136?t=6&akid=22961%2E878179%2EO6ZQWQ) | [DONATE](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103136?t=7&akid=22961%2E878179%2EO6ZQWQ)
---
**If we continue on Trump's path, we face a country devoid of what makes us who we are: the land of opportunity, prosperity, and freedom.**

I've used my platform to take on the Trump administration, time and time again. I'm not afraid to call out injustice when I see it. And friend, I'm not just here to stir the pot._**I'm uniquely positioned to stand up for you and have a real impact.**_

In order to get to Congress, we need to build a winning team of grassroots supporters like YOU. I promise it's not about how much you give, it's about having you on our side!!

[Split a donation between the Voter Protection Project and my campaign to show your support! Even just $5 today makes an impact on the size and the strength of our movement.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103136?t=8&akid=22961%2E878179%2EO6ZQWQ)
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jack Schlossberg and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103132?t=9&akid=22961%2E878179%2EO6ZQWQ)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103133?t=10&akid=22961%2E878179%2EO6ZQWQ)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103134?t=11&akid=22961%2E878179%2EO6ZQWQ)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103135?t=12&akid=22961%2E878179%2EO6ZQWQ)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103136?t=13&akid=22961%2E878179%2EO6ZQWQ)
Thanks for believing in me and this campaign.

Talk soon,
Jack
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22961%2E878179%2EO6ZQWQ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22961%2E878179%2EO6ZQWQ).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=22961%2E878179%2EO6ZQWQ) to request fewer emails. name: TEXAS ALERT (via Team Roy)
subject: Endorsement from Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY
body:
One of the most effective conservative leaders in the country has just officially endorsed this campaign. |

name: Brianna For Colorado
subject: February Fun 💘
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/989f56ac5e74/february-fun?e=8249791cac)
---
| | | | [|
---](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=8210bdb578&e=8249791cac)
| | Happy February friends! It has been a very busy start to the session so let’s get into it.
---
|
---
| |
# RECENT EVENTS
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | On February 2nd, Colorado Democrats hosted a press briefing on the Capitol steps announcing legislation to protect Coloradans from ICE. The bills will be introduced soon.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | The next day on February 3rd, [SJR26-006 Coloradans Navigating Complex United States Immigration System ](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=9cd87cd787&e=8249791cac)was passed. [SJR26-007 Black History Month February of 2026](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=2809ff6697&e=8249791cac) was passed the day after as well. This Senate joint resolution was passed in honor of the Black Coloradans who shaped our state.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Yesterday, [SJR26-010 Lunar New Year Day](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=dcdd4fa0b8&e=8249791cac) was passed. In celebration of this joint resolution, the House was treated to a lion dance performance!
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | I also spoke yesterday at Disability Rights Advocacy Day. It was an honor to be invited to speak about my wheelchair right to repair legislation and to reconnect with my former colleague [Representative Ortiz](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=741af734d4&e=8249791cac). Rep. Ortiz has been a trailblazer in making politics and advocacy more accessible and normalized for the disabled community.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | Today, many of the House members joined the Senate to pay tribute to the late Senator Faith Winter to honor her service. It was a moving and emotional celebration of her accomplishments. We will miss her presence at the capitol.
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | Also today, I spoke with my colleague Rep. Junie Joseph at the “Wild West Hackin’ Fest” which is a convention of white-hat hackers and technologists. The organization “Hackers on the Hill” came to speak to legislators a few days earlier to speak about policy and we had a chance to tell about the experience and encourage experts to share their experience, especially on high-tech policy topics.
---
| |
# BILL TRACKER
---
|
---
| | I currently have 4 bills introduced. They are:
[HB26-1036 Local Taxes on Vacant Residential Property](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=db1d9924b2&e=8249791cac)
* Unfortunately, this bill was killed in the House Finance committee on Monday, February 9th. You can read about it [here](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=ae8972a24d&e=8249791cac).

[HB26-1099 Protect Financial Condition of Homeowners Association](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=be16d99a1b&e=8249791cac)
* Scheduled to be heard in the House Transportation, Housing, & Local Government committee on Wednesday, February 18th at 1:30 pm. You can listen in [here](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=03c450cb4f&e=8249791cac).

[HB26-1137 Requirements for Campaign Consultants](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=3317524889&e=8249791cac)
* Scheduled to be heard in the House State, Civic, Military, & Veterans Affairs committee on Monday, February 23rd at 1:30 pm. You can listen in [here](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=8b0563b5ea&e=8249791cac) and read an article about it [here](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=1c12cd95f6&e=8249791cac).

[HB26-1188 Sunset Process Securities Regulation](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=fd98bd0659&e=8249791cac)
* Assigned to House Finance committee

---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|

# [ IN THE DISTRICT]()
---
| |
## ARVADA
---
| | **2026 ARVADA KITE FESTIVAL T-SHIRT DESIGN COMPETITION**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| | **Submissions are due Wednesday Feb 18th**

The City of Arvada and the Arvada Festival Commission are hosting an open call for youth artists to submit original artwork for the 2026 Arvada Kite Festival T-Shirt Design Competition!
Visit the [Arvada Kite Festival webpage](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=e751d34ecc&e=8249791cac) for more information.
---
|
---
| | **OLDE TOWN ARVADA WINTERFEST**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | **Saturday Feb 28th**
For the second straight year, Winterfest will be held in the Olde Town Square in the heart of Olde Town Arvada!The layout is similar to Olde Town's Second Saturday Concert Series in the summer, with two stages hosting different performances throughout the event – the Bank Stage (Olde Wadsworth Boulevard and Grandview Avenue) and the Square Stage (W. 57th Avenue and Old Wadsworth Boulevard).Visit the Winterfest webpage for the event map, schedule, parking information, and volunteer opportunities.
---
|
---
|
---
| | To find events coming up in Arvada, check out [**Visit Arvada**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=b8d70073b6&e=8249791cac)!
---
|
---
| |
## GOLDEN
---
|
---
| | **HUNGER FREE GOLDEN EMPTY BOWLS EVENT & FUNDRAISER**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| | | **Wednesday Feb 25th, 5-7pm at Calvary Church**
All of Golden's food pantries experienced a significant increase in demand in 2025, both in numbers of visitors and in pounds of food distributed. With the reduced federal funding for SNAP benefits and eligibility requirement changes, compounded with the rising cost of living, community members need our support more than ever.
Hunger Free Golden is hosting Empty Bowls, a donation-based fundraiser, to increase awareness about food insecurity in golden and share information on our efforts to ensure that all members of our community have access to fresh and healthy food.
For more information or to donate, email contact@hungerfreegolden.org or call 303-808-7816.
[Learn more and reserve your spot!](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=a7d6e19082&e=8249791cac)
---
|
---
| | For a list of upcoming Golden events, check out the [**Visit Golden website**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=6158b1eadc&e=8249791cac)**or the City’s**[**Community Calendar**](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=97ee9f8592&e=8249791cac)**.**

name: Katie Porter
subject: Billionaires and corporations are used to getting their way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
I still think democracy shouldn’t be for sale.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40849%2E3422442%2EgddP8a)
Peter,
With everything going on in our state and country, **do we really want to give control of California to the same billionaires who helped cause this mess?**
I don’t think so. _That’s why I’m not taking any corporate money._ In fact, I’m the only candidate in the race who’s always refused corporate money.
As Governor, I won’t owe a thing to the billionaires and corporations used to getting their way.
Every other major candidate is relying on the same big money interests who buy access to power.
And one of my opponents, a billionaire himself, has only been supported by 82 people with **their average donation being more than $333,000.** _That’s more than what most Californians make in 5 years._
Instead, I’m running a people-powered campaign. I proudly have the support of more than 66,000 donors—the people who understand I’ll always have your back.
**[I still think democracy shouldn’t be for sale. If you agree, can you donate $5 to fuel our fight against the big money trying to buy their way in this race?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260213_2_ak.VQoIk1&refcode=em20260213-40849&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40849%2E3422442%2EgddP8a)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260213_2_ak.VQoIk1&refcode=em20260213-40849&t=22&akid=40849%2E3422442%2EgddP8a)
More soon,
Katie Porter
We just launched our latest video online to help win over voters. **[Click here to watch, and share it with your friends and family to support our campaign.](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yf-609EL0c4)**
[Watch Our Latest Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yf-609EL0c4)

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260213-40849&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40849_3422442_gddP8a&akid=40849%2E3422442%2EgddP8a)**

name: Team Cooper
subject: Trump attacked Roy Cooper AGAIN
body:
Shaking our heads...
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=581%2E124072%2EWqNWul)
**He’s at it _again_ , Peter.** At a rally in North Carolina today, Donald Trump once again baselessly attacked Governor Cooper. Here’s the thing. Trump and Whatley know they can’t beat Roy on the merits. Instead, their plan is to insult and smear him. **[We need the resources to fight back,_especially_ now! Rush a contribution TODAY to stand up to Trump, Roy’s opponent, and their dangerous MAGA agenda >>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5788?t=7&akid=581%2E124072%2EWqNWul)** | [DONATE NOW](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5788?t=8&akid=581%2E124072%2EWqNWul)

body:

| | **FIRST** Trump pledged there **“would be cuts”** to Social Security, endangering benefits Americans have worked their whole lives for!

**THEN** Rand Paul claimed Republicans **“didn’t have the money”** for Social Security, threatening to RAISE the retirement age to 70!

**_BUT NOW_** Democrats aren’t going down without a fight, they just introduced **a HUGE $200 monthly increase** to Social Security! This changes everything!

_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| [60 Minutes] China Is Preparing For War | **SHOCKING REPORT:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. POWER GRID** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) **National Security Reports China's Attacks On Critical U.S. Electric Grid, Food Supply and Water Systems** The FBI warns that China has gained access to electric companies throughout the U.S., and experts are now urging Americans to protect their homes. A new alarming report reveals over 70 attacks on America's power grid in just one year, and these are calculated strikes designed to weaken our nation's most essential lifeline. Security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States that puts you and your family in critical danger: **Our crumbling electric grid.** _Officials report that attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months._ Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total chaos and darkness. Our enemies would just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** Are you and your family prepared to survive as much as 18 months without electricity, food or clean water? It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's critical infrastructure. [**That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?). THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. **And never needs gas, ever.** You'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. And we have some great news! **Right Now Is The Perfect Time To Get Your NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200 Because of This _Exclusive Bonus Package With 14 FREE Gifts Worth $973!_** After offering a similar deal last year, these generators sold like hotcakes. Now with this NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200...
* _You get MORE power..._

* _And it can even power your FRIDGE!_

[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) [**ACT FAST To Get Your NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200 & 14 FREE Gifts Worth $973!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?) **Your Exclusive Bonus Package of 14 FREE Gifts Worth $973 includes:**

body:
Endorsements alone don’t win elections. Resources do.
[](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajkuktd-hhlrhljhit-r/) Friends,I'm proud to have the support of leaders and community members across Oregon who believe in this campaign and what we're building together. You can find those endorsements and what our supporters have to say about our campaign [across my social media pages.](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajkuktd-hhlrhljhit-y/) These leaders know what's at stake in this race, and they know we need real executive leadership back in Salem. [Are you with them?](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajkuktd-hhlrhljhit-j/)As Marion County Commissioner, I've spent the last several years overseeing departments, coordinating public safety efforts, working through housing and behavioral health challenges, and making hard budget decisions. That experience matters. Oregon doesn't need another career policymaker; it needs someone who understands how to manage systems and deliver results. [](https://daniellebethell.cmail20.com/t/y-l-ajkuktd-hhlrhljhit-t/) But here's the reality. Endorsements alone don't win elections. Resources do.We're nearing the end of the week and still working to reach our $20,000 fundraising goal so we can take this fight statewide and win this primary -- and right now we are still short of our goal.We can't afford to lose critical momentum. name: Liberty Alert (via Tea Party Patriots Action)
subject: Illegals taking our votes?
body:
| | | | [](https://teapartypatriotsinsider.org/c/AQiAjRYQ4Z8JGPKH3FwgzIrWASjBpNcCT91X1HtOD5Ab_ip3_RvE-0XJ0WkylZqr_DpuSC_tch4)
---
Dear ,
Americans agree on very little these days, but **_election integrity is one of them_** _._
Multiple national polls consistently show **over 80% of Americans support voter ID and citizenship verification for federal elections**.
That’s exactly what the **SAVE America Act** would do.
Yet despite overwhelming public support, **Democrats in Congress are blocking the bill** and refusing to move it forward.
This isn’t make-believe, . It’s a documented difference between what Americans want and what Democrat leadership is allowing to happen.
That’s why Tea Party Patriots Action is building a national record of Americans demanding action, and we need your name on it.
---

clean_body: | | | | Dear , Americans agree on very little these days, but election integrity is one of them . Multiple national polls consistently show over 80% of Americans support voter ID and citizenship verification for federal elections. That’s exactly what the SAVE America Act would do. Yet despite overwhelming public support, Democrats in Congress are blocking the bill and refusing to move it forward. This isn’t make-believe, . It’s a documented difference between what Americans want and what Democrat leadership is allowing to happen. That’s why Tea Party Patriots Action is building a national record of Americans demanding action, and we need your name on it. ** | Time matters. Momentum matters. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Trump Assassination Attempt Update!
body:
Fighting for Clean, Fair Elections

[INSIDE JW]

FBI REVEALS WARNINGS ABOUT SUSPICIOUS PERSON AT TRUMP SHOOTING IN
BUTLER

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37129&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9nbnloQkl6WFNkQT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=7e496b1729ef774927054381a10ced7b173b021cf72ebc38ab6efb7da640f445]

We have received the first records that the FBI has released in our
lawsuit about the assassination attempt on Donald Trump in Butler,
Pennsylvania.

These documents raise troubling new questions about the Secret Service
failures to protect President Trump. And it shouldn’t have taken
years and a federal lawsuit to get this basic FBI material about the
near assassination of President Trump.

We forced the release of the 37 heavily redacted pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37112&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtcHJvZC0xLTAyMjE2Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=902cf828e7205562641e513e1cf2147b14d5bdd6a108e044a55a7c33835bffe0]
from the FBI through a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit
revealing that law enforcement personnel broadcast radio warnings
about an “unknown male acting suspiciously” prior to the attempted
assassination of then-candidate Donald Trump at a July 13, 2024, rally
in Butler, PA.

We filed the July 2025 lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=35667&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcmVjb3Jkcy1vbi10cnVtcHMtYXNzYXNzaW4vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=49fbb864b920e46112cb7182301139f4a2f0781950d31d6a872465ba789914a3] after the
FBI failed to respond to a July 2024 FOIA request (_Judicial Watch
Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=35651&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtY29tcGxhaW50LTAyMjE2L11fP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=c16d098147edc97fe52027deefa95e23eddf421995b70bd09512e2e967ef895f _(No.
1:25-cv-02216)). We asked for:

> All records, including but not limited to, investigative reports,
> interview summaries (Forms 1023), letterhead memoranda, photos,
> audio/visual recordings, database inquiries, interagency
> communications, and any other records, whether contained in the
> Central Records System or cross-referenced files, related to Thomas
> Matthew Crooks, born September 20, 2003 in Butler Township, PA and
> died on July 13, 2024, who attempted the assassination of former
> President Donald Trump on July 13, 2024.

> All records of communication in any form, including but not limited
> to emails, text messages, encrypted app communications and voice
> recordings, between FBI officials and/or FBI sources, contractors,
> and assets on the one hand, and Thomas Matthew Crooks on the other
> hand.

The records include a July 16, 2024, “FD-302” investigative report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37113&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtcHJvZC0xLTAyMjE2LXBncy0zOC0zOS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=59316322ae474b5ef057b724b515c1dcb7e063ab90188841f62d5d9194d07128]
that states that on the day of the shooting:

> Prior to the start of the shooting, [Redacted] received reports over
> the radio about an unknown male acting suspiciously. The unknown
> male had bags and was wearing a gray T-shirt with “Demolition
> Ranch” written on the front of it. One report included the unknown
> male looking at a law enforcement sniper position. Several operators
> were communicating information about the unknown male back and forth
> over the radio--including to/from Command, to the Secret Service, to
> PSP [PA State Police], to “everybody.”

A July 15 electronic communicatio
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37114&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtcHJvZC0xLTAyMjE2LXBncy03LTEwL11uP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=22b5733d1ff161f119d72db56d6bb179708847d0db3cb16d8471024448126347
titled “Opening EC for Investigation of Thomas Matthew Crooks”
that launched the FBI investigation of Thomas Crooks notes that one
purpose of the investigation, given that Crooks himself was killed by
Secret Service agents, was to determine “the subject’s motivation
and to identify if there were any co-conspirators.”

A July 14 investigative report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37115&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtcHJvZC0xLTAyMjE2LXBncy0xMy0xNC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=8ec454c779564682be8ef0ec2364302551a25b49745927518c73107524627b32]
describes an event before the shooting. An unidentified acquaintance
of Thomas Crooks and his family indicated that sometime between May
and June 2024 Crooks “was dehydrated and needed to be taken to the
hospital.” It continued, “[Redacted] stated that she thought it
was strange that [redacted] did not take him to the hospital
themselves.”

A July 16 electronic communication
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37116&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtcHJvZC0xLTAyMjE2LXBncy0xNi0xNy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=0ce8a80b8183273246de57dccaec0e64c2b09418bfc2d4455f6b6ae24a11b152]
states that the FBI returned a flip phone seized as evidence in their
investigation of Crooks: “Lead is fully covered.”

A July 16 report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37117&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtcHJvZC0xLTAyMjE2LXBnLTE5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=269cae436907816b751d32ea502244d5b0ae6489dbe134a959441fbaf78ffe68]
notes that a person who was apparently a neighbor, described the
Crooks family as “normal, nice people” and that Crooks “seemed
like a normal dorky kid.”

A July 16 electronic communication
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37118&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtcHJvZC0xLTAyMjE2LXBnLTIzLTI0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=dcb77921ba95112fa35b0cdb65e28777dbcf2b8f07a6a33fa097ea97b5936379]
details that, acting on a tip, the FBI found a “concerning”
Facebook post regarding Crooks’ attempted assassination of Trump:

> Facebook “Damn, bad shot. Would have done the world a service”
> and another comment on the original post “We should have watched
> his ficking brains blown away.” The tipster also provided the
> Facebook page that posted this was [redacted].

A July 16 electronic communication
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37119&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtcHJvZC0xLTAyMjE2LXBnLTI1LTI3Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=31287d94b7b63d4f16a3ccf36be9ac29a7d64f343d168ab8cb5ac65daf156d07]
indicates that a business card was located at the crime scene of
Trump’s attempted assassination, and the person associated with it
was investigated, although nothing derogatory about that individual
was identified in law enforcement records. An interview of that
individual was recommended.

A July 16 interview report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37120&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtcHJvZC0xLTAyMjE2LXBnLTI4LTI5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=3fe0fcc76c7448b26cfa8ae102808631074203f9dd7713563fa653b02304aaee]
states that investigators talked with an individual who had attended
the Butler rally:

> [Redacted] recalled that approximately 5 minutes after the shots
> were fired, a light silver Subaru Hatchback sped past her and almost
> struck her. [Redacted] didn't remember the vehicle having any
> stickers or distinct markings. [Redacted] didn't get a look at the
> license plate, but believed the driver to be an older white male
> with short hair and tan skin. [Redacted] saw the Subaru in the
> parking lot near houses, specifically a brown house with a pool. The
> vehicle departed the parking lot making a sharp right turn near the
> old buildings.

> [Redacted] was with [redacted] in the parking lot and observed the
> vehicle too. [Redacted] described the vehicle as a 2017 silver
> Subaru Forester.... [Redacted] noted the terrain was too rough to
> drive at the rate of speed the Subaru was doing. [Redacted] thought
> the incident with the vehicle occurred maybe 10 minutes after the
> shooting.

A July 16 interview report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37121&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtcHJvZC0xLTAyMjE2LXBnLTMwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=f36ef5683589cec0a73edccdcaf518d7c3236e96a1f2d2974719528e55fdb591]
details the observations of a member of the Saxonburg Police
Department who was also a member of the Butler Emergency Services
Unit:

> [Redacted] was on the counter assault team. His position was in the
> turret inside the armor vehicle next to the barns behind the stage.
> [Redacted] stated sniper teams called out and sent photos of a
> suspicious person with a range finder. [Redacted] stated he watched
> a guy fitting the description walking from the water tower to the
> stage area and out of view. He did not see anything on the
> individual.

> [Redacted] stated prior to anything happening he saw four people,
> one child walking away from the AGR [American Glass Research
> [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37122&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnV0bGVyZWFnbGUuY29tLzIwMjQwODAzL2Fnci1nb2VzLWludGVybmF0aW9uYWwvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4e249d7c986da5c49d0b9239385eb49b9dce8c151d1d3e0218fd03c9d83b7d62]]
> building towards the houses then two units took off in the direction
> of where the shooter was later found. A call came out over the radio
> of a long gun on the roof. Shortly after shots started going off.
> [Redacted] rode in the armor behind the tents near the stage, but
> did not ever have a view of the roof where the shooter was.
> [Redacted] ran out of the armor vehicle with a ladder to AGR and was
> told they didn't need any more guys on the roof. So he came back and
> held security for a medic working on the deceased individual. The
> Secret Service then took over the tent.

In a July 16 interview summary
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37123&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtcHJvZC0xLTAyMjE2LXBnLTMyLTM0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=6b25a23ca1b00f893ba5689d2a68acfbb7fcfe7fdcb0b0c6d42ec783a1770dfc]
of an individual who had attended the Butler rally:

> [S]he noticed a white male with dark hair interacting with a
> uniformed law enforcement officer. They both were seen looking at
> two open windows of the property/building adjacent to the AGR
> Building. The white male told the officer that those windows were
> not supposed to be open. [Redacted] saw the windows that appeared to
> be opened from the inside. As the officer walked around towards the
> other side of the building, the white male stood on the side where
> the windows were facing towards the event/stage.

> Shortly thereafter, at approximately some time after 6PM, she heard
> another white male yell the following, “He’s got a gun,
> everybody run!” This white male appeared to be in his late
> [redacted] who was seen wearing a white shirt, who had dark colored
> hair and a [redacted]. She remembered seeing a “panicked” look
> on his face. After he yelled, [redacted] heard six gunshots that
> sounded like they came from the two open windows. She took
> [redacted] and ran towards the vehicle along with many others from
> the crowd. She lost [redacted] in the crowd but continued running
> towards the vehicle with [redacted] and another white male who
> helped with getting [redacted] to the vehicle. She eventually
> located [redacted] with the help of the same male.

> She recalled seeing the law enforcement officer wearing a brown/tan
> uniform but she did not see the patch.

> When she returned to the vehicle, she recalled seeing the Suburban
> still parked behind her with no occupants inside. She departed the
> scene shortly thereafter.

> After reflection, [Redacted] thought the security outside of the
> fence line was a concern because there was a lot of open access. She
> did not see anybody screening individuals near or outside the fence
> line.

> [Redacted] told agents that she does not support conspiracy theorist
> or is one but she wanted to provide this information to
> investigators just in case it would help with the investigation.

A July 16 interview report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37130&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9qLXRob21hcy1jcm9va3MtcHJvZC0xLTAyMjE2LXBnLTQwL11kZXRhaWxzP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2b600de77871062ddc7c35119f675355535463d5959be054a615e1751b3f080d
the observations of a member of the Slippery Rock Police Department
who was also a member of the Butler Emergency Services Unit:

> Once Trump started to move toward the stage, [redacted] and the
> Bravo squad were prepared to move in the armored vehicle. At that
> time, a report came in over the radio stating there was a male on
> one of the roofs ([redacted] was not sure which roof) and that the
> male had a long gun.

> Almost immediately after the report came over the radio, [redacted]
> heard several gunshots. [Redacted] was not sure how many, possibly
> seven or eight shots. The Bravo squad then responded in the armored
> vehicle to the grand stand. When they arrived, they exited the
> armored vehicle and pushed up the grand stand. They were there
> briefly, attempting to determine what was happening, and then pulled
> back. At that time, [Redacted] observed a male on the ground with a
> gun shot wound to his chest. The team then formed a tight perimeter
> around the medics as they addressed the injured male.The Secret
> Service then requested a tactical team to provide security at the
> Butler Hospital. [Redacted] and three other operators drove the
> armored vehicle to the hospital and formed a hard perimeter around

JUDICIAL WATCH SENIOR ATTORNEY T. RUSSELL NOBILE TESTIFIED ON ELECTION
INTEGRITY

T. Russell Nobile, a senior Judicial Watch attorney and election law
expert, testified this week before the House Committee on House
Administration [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37074&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9jaGEuaG91c2UuZ292L2Fib3V0P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=55b88ec2e4352d44576c1d5eb9728f0fcbb07db4882967d33e49eed7331b5e58] at a hearing titled:
“Make Elections Great Again: How to Restore Trust and Integrity in
Federal Elections.”

Watch here [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37075&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj05bWx2N0ZZbHYtOCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=80fb32e0d68728b1b9d04c1fa25e97d5043e2af27518a241a4330f512e0722bd]
(https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37075&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj05bWx2N0ZZbHYtOCZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=80fb32e0d68728b1b9d04c1fa25e97d5043e2af27518a241a4330f512e0722bd).

Russ Nobile has litigated in federal and state courts nationwide, as
well as the Supreme Court, and has testified before the U.S. House and
Senate Judiciary Committees and other congressional committees.

Prior to joining Judicial Watch, Nobile served as a trial attorney in
the Civil Rights Division of the U.S. Department of Justice.

This week House Republicans advanced the “Make Elections Great Again
Act” (H.R. 7300
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37076&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC83MzAwP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=a6ebb4933a23ff36d7f62ea7de783c07e60e1b6f1ba96f3736593ac3bb0c21e2]), a
sweeping elections overhaul that would mandate photo identification
for voting in federal elections and require documentary proof of U.S.
citizenship to register to vote. (Similar legislation, the “SAVE
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=37077&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY29uZ3Jlc3MuZ292L2JpbGwvMTE5dGgtY29uZ3Jlc3MvaG91c2UtYmlsbC8yMl3igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=5e894f92c472376eb2cc41e7abffa7e6103a02574c7a11cef346aaa9713e2f2a Act,
is also pending.)

Nobile’s testimony comes as the Supreme Court is considering a
Judicial Watch case to apply federal law to prohibit states from
counting mail-in ballots that arrive after Election Day.

In January, the Supreme Court ruled 7-2 in favor
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=36862&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvc3RhdGVtZW50LW9uLXN1cHJlbWUtY291cnQtdmljdG9yeS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=de636c6707638922dd9e766bf7322dceeb9b555f08c46cc6b4e1b808dae9061c] of
granting standing in a historic case we filed on behalf of Congressman
Mike Bost and two presidential electors, who were before the court to
vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law allowing the
counting of ballots received up to 14 days after Election Day.

We are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. As
part of our work, we assembled a team of highly experienced voting
rights attorneys who stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii and
cleaned up voter rolls across the country, among other achievements
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=35695&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGFnL2VsZWN0aW9uK2xhdy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=9397a9e3d745abe0c3f21cda7e7ee80355607c49f190c9e5632b403f671aff4b].

Federal courts in Oregon
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=35830&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvb3JlZ29uLXZvdGVyLXJvbGwtY2xlYW51cC0yLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=268c968acceaea353e51054ab5449db88b31ac85981eedf6757cf33b6b6d6d45],

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=35799&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGF3c3VpdHMtdG8tY2xlYW4tdXAtdm90ZXItcm9sbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=3ffca2533bc2dd25e07948d2d4a3492d4dca7643bff693d9ece8d8bc8133401b] have

We announced
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=79651&L=35168&F=T&&hash=54a98dc0af766e1e8cc838fce97a5fdf7566055cdbed1702d666a75e847d5956]
