## Van Zandt County Pauses Green Energy Projects
Van Zandt County commissioners passed a [moratorium](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL0OmzAUhZ_GbEb2jfnJ4KELW7p2RBd8A1aMjewbSPr0FVXfoOOnIx2d8_16jA_0wcflJ25k-fNMY6SzBGKmPC6ZKFKkvHxXDHxgoMg-UhlBQSsVSG1Ghz58R1M5Oyl31xVZ3XVadaoxulotzWrq-mnqUfVI1JjZ3ScDzbPrO9CoK2-vMgXaaFCg-1q1ztxAKaKpnRvohVHkPKdc80pMHyzP8E0H5XpOWxXsyrwXcfshYBAwnOdZv4hfVyhguN4IGEKaMch_cGCUvzE6lnPaNl-KT5FykTuWIreUkVP2703u-C4-LjJ4Xi8unDIuJGCosnX76UPwpe2EUcuGPvydw_8n8bDwJwAA__-kiYnW) this week, temporarily pausing all green energy projects in the county amid an investigation by the state Attorney General’s office. The moratorium pauses construction over a dozen projects, including those involved in the Amador Energy Storage project, a roughly 100-megawatt battery facility managed by Taaleri Energia using [Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. battery cells](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAQRk-Du4lgjO2koNjGXbbd0sIwNkgEIiB2nNOvnP8Ifz3Sm--9f_fprn3wcf2rH6Tqe0lTpL0EqpXytGaiSJHyejgd6qYDxeojlQk59sARhJys9uGYZGPVzO1NNKTEMAg-8E6Kxql2uBlL7aCXgUiQMVLYebl1cl5mI03XeHXCOAopkKO4XnhvZYucE8296fDKJCfra8qX6qjSW5clHGmjfDHp0QTlan0W1v5hODIcXUo2-EjnkeF4shmOHBmOm47w0dFWKC7tNu0R8ivrACa9Yj2ADiqwZKIPQYrwtYcffTj_gXE-apj1GeeAhXQuDMcmK_vcfQi-9AOTfH1oH77b6u-Kbgr_BwAA__9mlI15). These are on the Prohibited Technology List for Texas for alleged connections to China. The lithium battery and solar plants have also reported [dozens of fires](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFyhCAQxvGnwQ4H9jg9C4o0dpc2pcPBqiQIDmz0zNNnvDxC6p35z36_j_twNz74OL2bBTU9xzRE3EtAIszDlBEjRszTMZtAmwkYyUcsAwhouAAu1eCMD8egKqcfwnWyQi3bVopWXJWsZm0aM3YWnXDSdg7aTrWjvEhhRzQOu7by-owJkEqCAHmrRePUBYRAfDT2CjemBDpPKdc0I-HTlDEcacNc27RUQc9Ea2GXNwY9g37f9_or0HYeGfRnm0EvgEEvJYN-M5H_mOiI2_Qd6eA2LYsvxaeIuXCzrjltyAmXNWWTD34u5yYE_tLgfxx8zekTLRUGfZW1W3cfgi9Ny5SYFuPD6zf6n-im4TcAAP__pZyMyw) over a year's time, according to residents, raising concerns about their overall safety in the area. The commissioners paused the work to allow state officials to conclude an investigation.
## Paxton Backs Doctor on Ivermectin Rx
Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has [intervened](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFygzAQRL8GOnlOQgK7UJGGzmlTMgIdoMkhMdLFhr_PkF9Iv_tm9309h6cLFOLy6Ta0fMxpiPguhMyYhyUjRoyYl3N1xC9HGDlELIMC1QpQQurBu0DnoGtvR_APWaOVXSehA6NlvVovO2UMGGOgac1DzkYZKR93ABy7STd1sBcMlNRSgZL3G7ReNwoAcWwno-6VBvSBU77xioyHKzOd6YX5NqWtJrsy76VqPirVV6r3jsgVPPaMpVyJSvWFHWOl-t0dnKIY3fRdhM9ic_kU7IjwFGN6e4zC40TXQ8FJeJwxesHbKEIUU4qFA_9wSNGRyGFZuYhpvepxufB1tn5_B6JQ2q7SsGwu0N9I_p_al1W_AQAA__8Br5Bx) in support of Dr. Mary Talley Bowden, a Houston-based doctor who sued the Texas Medical Board after she was reprimanded for prescribing ivermectin to a patient with COVID-19 during the pandemic. Paxton [declined to defend](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGP4yAQBeBfgzuiYUxMUlBc4y7XXmlhMzboMEQw6yT_fuX9C1s_vU9P799jeriYYt7-up0sv9cyZXq1RMxUp60SZcpUt09wiQ-XKHPM1CYEHCSgVHryLqbPpDtvZ_B31ZFVxigwcNWqC5aMURpVj0Y5mNfe934lGIjuV-yNgS7aEwNUWiGgul1g8LpHAKJ5WK54ExrIRy71woGY3q6t6VMOqpel7F2ygfnZRP9H4ChwDKX4FDOdocDxtAWOgALHp3tzyXKprgVqci2V5atUDjIeVHdaOGa5xi2wnN3yv8lQvtrZ8GUROHbV-ucrphTbYISGbXcx_Wzg3z13WPwOAAD__7hfgu0) the state medical board in the case, instead stating that the board’s public reprimand was unlawful and motivated by politics. In 2021, Bowden attempted to treat a critically ill Tarrant County sheriff's deputy with the drug ivermectin, an anti-parasitic medication believed by some doctors to effectively treat COVID-19.
## Texas Ranked No. 1 in Valentine's Day Texts
Texas is the most [in-love state](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAQRU9jOtB48BooXKSh27Qp0bAewJKBlT1hl9tHpMkBUj_pP_33dR_uFGLY5k9a2cl72oeNXzmyCKdhTswbb5zmc6EoB0XeJGycBwS0JWCpzeApxHMwhXcj-E4X7HTTaGjgZnSxOB4766eWxqYmrr3vbFvbiU3bGTPRdCuCu8YAtdEIqNsKrDc1AjCP9nHDVhlgH2RPlSws_KY8xXM_OFWPfS2iW0SeWdUfCnuFPY37t1QkclGFfZY9nQr7S3JhkfLvR-npLD0JVYussUjOP18hxpBtowzMK4X4K5H_pTkc_gQAAP__rPh43A) in the U.S. on Valentine’s Day, according to data from AT&T showing four Lone Star cities in the top 10 nationally for the number of text messages exchanged on February 14. Referring to texting as “the new love language,” the study suggests that the higher the text message volume, the more romance is in the air. Sitting at No. 1 on the list two years in a row, Houston was 1.5 million text messages ahead of runner-up San Antonio in 2024 and 2025. Dallas and Austin fill in Texas’ top 10 representation at No. 4 and No. 8, respectively. No other state accounted for multiple cities on the list. You can see the full [top 10 here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAQRU9jOtB48BooXKSh27Qp0bAewJKBlT1hl9tHpMkBUj_pP_33dR_uFGLY5k9a2cl72oeNXzmyCKdhTswbb5zmc6EoB0XeJGycBwS0JWCpzeApxHMwhXcj-E4X7HTTaGjgZnSxOB4766eWxqYmrr3vbFvbiU3bGTPRdCuCu8YAtdEIqNsKrDc1AjCP9nHDVhlgH2RPlSws_KY8xXM_OFWPfS2iW0SeWdUfCnuFPY37t1QkclGFfZY9nQr7S3JhkfLvR-npLD0JVYussUjOP18hxpBtowzMK4X4K5H_pTkc_gQAAP__rPh43A).

Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Van Zandt County Pauses Green Energy Projects Van Zandt County commissioners passed a this week, temporarily pausing all green energy projects in the county amid an investigation by the state Attorney General’s office. The moratorium pauses construction over a dozen projects, including those involved in the Amador Energy Storage project, a roughly 100-megawatt battery facility managed by Taaleri Energia using . These are on the Prohibited Technology List for Texas for alleged connections to China. The lithium battery and solar plants have also reported over a year's time, according to residents, raising concerns about their overall safety in the area. The commissioners paused the work to allow state officials to conclude an investigation. Paxton Backs Doctor on Ivermectin Rx Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has in support of Dr. Mary Talley Bowden, a Houston-based doctor who sued the Texas Medical Board after she was reprimanded for prescribing ivermectin to a patient with COVID-19 during the pandemic. Paxton the state medical board in the case, instead stating that the board’s public reprimand was unlawful and motivated by politics. In 2021, Bowden attempted to treat a critically ill Tarrant County sheriff's deputy with the drug ivermectin, an anti-parasitic medication believed by some doctors to effectively treat COVID-19. Texas Ranked No. 1 in Valentine's Day Texts Texas is the most in the U.S. on Valentine’s Day, according to data from AT&T showing four Lone Star cities in the top 10 nationally for the number of text messages exchanged on February 14. Referring to texting as “the new love language,” the study suggests that the higher the text message volume, the more romance is in the air. Sitting at No. 1 on the list two years in a row, Houston was 1.5 million text messages ahead of runner-up San Antonio in 2024 and 2025. Dallas and Austin fill in Texas’ top 10 representation at No. 4 and No. 8, respectively. No other state accounted for multiple cities on the list. Ken Paxton has sued Cord Blood Registry (CBR) for “reprehensible” marketing tactics, alleging that the company exploits the emotional anxieties of new parents for umbilical cord blood banking. () ➤ Austin: The Medical Examiner’s Office concluded that Texas A&M student Brianna Aguilera died by suicide when she fell from a high-rise in Austin following November’s Texas-Texas A&M football game, re-affirming the police department’s conclusions. ()** ➤ Houston: Famed forensic artist Lois Gibson has released an unofficial sketch of the masked suspect in the Nancy Guthrie kidnapping case. Gibson is retired from the Houston Police Department. () ➤ Austin: The Department of Public Safety has installed license plate readers in Austin, despite broad community opposition and the city's canceling its contract with the readers’ vendor. name: Team Ossoff HQ
subject: Valentine for Peter inside
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
Your Valentine’s Day plans probably didn’t include giving $5 to Jon Ossoff’s reelection for Senate, but here’s why your donation will make a huge difference TODAY.
#

_Roses are red,_
_Georgia's Senate seat is blue._
_Trump wants to change that._
_That's why Jon needs you._
[**Your Valentine’s Day plans probably didn’t include giving $5 to Jon Ossoff’s reelection for Senate, but here’s why your donation will make a huge difference TODAY.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-feb26.GJoCgS&refcode=em260214-1-subs-a&t=1&akid=1639%2E5691347%2ERZIYJQ)
MAGA has already invested millions of dollars into defeating Jon in Georgia, and now that the election is just under nine months away, they aren’t slowing down.
Just this month, the FBI raided a Georgia election office to try to add to a false narrative about the 2020 election. They are willing to use any dirty trick in the playbook to try to win in November.
**But here’s the good news:** After a massive rally in Atlanta this month, this grassroots team is fired up and ready to win, and win decisively, this year.
That means building a massive war chest to defend this seat — and since Jon’s campaign doesn’t take a cent of corporate PAC money, that means he relies on grassroots donors _(like you!)_ chipping in what you can, when you can. And a large amount of our donations come from emails just like this one.

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: The book Charlie left behind
body:
Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd4ta6nv67tvc9o2spvkdu9bg2hou276mmn2btbg_rp22sh2s8i6epr4c1ie8p36cph2bs)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal.

It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war.

His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before...

**It was about the Sabbath. **

About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6mivltdt8c8f0mi6e22tbduqv5v4hr6m3r59m38_rp22sh2s8i6epr4c1ie8p36cph2bs)
---
**[And when you make a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA today, we'll send you a copy of Charlie's final book -- as our thank you for carrying his legacy forward.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8n164e4nikdub1e6kvprudhvgkvroq467gfpe08_rp22sh2s8i6epr4c1ie8p36cph2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z089emr7amapppl4hvgmolv6cunqiau02gko98a8_rp22sh2s8i6epr4c1ie8p36cph2bs)
---
Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself.

He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling...

_**The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. **_

To rest. To reflect. To return to God.

This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation.

🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops
🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength
🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America

I know he would've wanted you to have this book.

**When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. **

**[And we'll ship you a copy of Charlie's final book straight to your door.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbce732f0nvd83op577mkv3f3oe0d0i8ob09lm6g_rp22sh2s8i6epr4c1ie8p36cph2bs)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zko6n1jjajfq4985ol5bjdvs57j04enro32pb4pg_rp22sh2s8i6epr4c1ie8p36cph2bs)
---
Friend, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage -- _the very things Charlie gave his life for. _

And as you do, may the message of this book lead you -- just as it led Charlie -- to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
**For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zff3rbtp0qc6vschirigrr632ummstkkrmjm2a4o_rp22sh2s8i6epr4c1ie8p36cph2bs)
---
**[Support Turning Point USA](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgk6268m8lu6jk3uk920p0t9h0mrgaqbsljisu58_rp22sh2s8i6epr4c1ie8p36cph2bs)**
---
**P.S.** Charlie Kirk's final book, _**Stop, in the Name of God,**_ is a heartfelt call to slow down, remember what's eternal, and rest in God.

[**Please make a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA today, and we 'll send you a copy of Charlie's final book to your door.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcsvr0np1a11arfqlq59athjkm9ogmvv6c1a5ckg_rp22sh2s8i6epr4c1ie8p36cph2bs)
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**
**& Receive Charlie's Final Book**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z52capisp37geephjrb877l2ae6ff041dkr82560_rp22sh2s8i6epr4c1ie8p36cph2bs)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Pop Acta Media | American Action News

name: Must Read:
subject: Toxic Water Warning
body:
Hometown water supply in danger
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
**FBI's Urgent Warning Sounds the Alarm** America's enemies have found a way to strike without firing a single shot. Hackers are attacking city water systems, overriding safety protocols to weaponize our utilities against us and positioning themselves to strike when the signal comes. National security experts warn China isn't alone. Iran, Russia and North Korea are preparing coordinated attacks. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems we trust to keep us safe. **Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link.** Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... _**But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.**_ If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like...
* **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.**
* If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water.
* **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.**
* Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out.
* **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.**
* Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it.

Well we have great news to share! Folks have been calling... Folks have been emailing... No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out. **And YES there's an interest-FREE payment plan!** Yes, right now, you can get your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System on a convenient, no-credit-check, interest-FREE payment plan. We know you're good for it. You'll have the **peace of mind** knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come. [**Get Your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?xtl=14pegjudqisesh2tknoskf9uvy60dte1yb7e14gy8g05lk3o8s5vo66a5lhxuglvat8h45cb4sl3n0upzkmb31xm09fjngo93qmkeprlhe4ncslloqifcqavbqo8nn7mu2niw87ccyfoz23arotrn0awf0coht70dlocosa205a0ymswm6o2upeqw4nzj8c0wkrx44fivn2z3mt404s4zw0dev32yadb61hstdun2yooe5ophhdq58&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tag9lf&__onlt=h) **Stay Safe. Frank Bates

But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. They're MORE reliable and easier to replace, too. So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family. But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while. In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually. And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out. | Letter from the Chair
---
The Big Tent of Nebraska Republicans: United by Enduring Values
The Nebraska Republican Party represents a true cross-section of our state-- a majority of Nebraskans who come from every corner of conservative thought. We include ideological purists and pragmatic problem-solvers, social moderates and fiscal hawks, corporatists and populists, neoconservatives and non-interventionists. A small but vocal fringe may push to tear things down and divide, but the vast majority of us are committed to building up.
America's two-party system has long served as a healthy balance--a yin and yang of ideas that checks extremes and drives progress. Yet coalitions shift when the balance is disrupted, as we've seen in recent years.
Unchecked illegal immigration and shifts to social and ideologic extremes, heavily promoted by the opposition, has suppressed wages, limited job advancement, fractured our social contract, and strained communities. As a result, the Republican Party is increasingly attracting conservative youth, organized labor, working families of varying socio-economic means, and growing numbers of people of color who no longer vote in rigid blocs. These new voices are enriching our party--and naturally sparking healthy debate as we refine our shared identity.
This disruption is a sign of growth, not weakness. By returning to our core values and principles, we find our common ground and our guiding North Star. Let the love of Truth, Justice, and Mercy continue to guide our most noble ideals and our daily interactions with each other.
Any statement of who we are as Republicans must begin with our constitutional duty to protect God-given individual liberties. It must affirm our commitment to strengthening families, dramatically improving educational outcomes for every child, ensuring safe communities and abundant job opportunities, rooting out fraud and corruption, practicing sound fiscal responsibility, caring for the most vulnerable among us, and steadfastly defending the sanctity of innocent life.
Yes, Republicans will argue and debate--that's the nature of a vibrant, big-tent party. But to those watching from the outside: let them see a party that fights for something worth fighting for.
We are united in our devotion to freedom, opportunity, family, faith, and the Nebraska way of life. Together, we will continue to lead our state forward, defending these timeless principles and earning the trust of every Nebraskan who shares them.
Let's keep the conversation going, stay engaged, and stand strong--because Nebraska's future depends on it.

Sincerely, Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party

| Update from Political Director, Joe Hagerty...
County Conventions Delegate registration for the 2026 county conventions is underway--and hundreds of dedicated Republicans across Nebraska have already stepped up to make their voices heard!
If you're ready to serve as a delegate and help shape our party's future at the grassroots level, now is the time to act. Register online today at: [https://ne.gop/delegateform/](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00164hgCW03v4QKLNR40FkG1M2TrZpuzmuF63WKRwMUdoOyXUNcHsq4Qho8zLL6uA8QPYvNGXY4_wvK19r2QAYEWdh7T7DhdIS7rzLQj48imks_JscHpcsUO6uS8f89VClGUOScIRcimkiwfvGWVmYap1rakXjeQijs&c=zLRUob4sR9-pINOkzfI-x-7eTFz7lcaVpsmuaghH63SdcD8fW_DYaA==&ch=ymT-RejRI1p3E0fv6ccSnarDwbXR0Z5ZT-xZ4UbilszswI86xW476Q==). The form remains open until 11:59 p.m. on March 1, 2026.
Please share this link widely with fellow Republicans in your county--every additional delegate strengthens our organization and amplifies conservative principles statewide.

| From the desk of Jeanne Reigle....
As we mark Day 24 of the legislative session, fiscal responsibility is in the spotlight. With a projected budget shortfall on the horizon, there's a strong push for spending restraint and smart reforms to keep Nebraska's finances healthy.
The NEGOP appreciates the solid work from our Republican senators. Hats off to Senator Lippincott for his bills to lower property valuations and improve TEEOSA (the school funding formula). Speaker Arch's LB1071, introduced on behalf of Governor Pillen, brings thoughtful fund management, spending cuts and real fiscal controls. Senator Murman's LB1244 eliminates some sales tax exemptions to help broaden the tax base. We also appreciate Senator Dover's LB990 for better credit distribution under the School District Property Tax Relief Act, and Senator Sorrentino's LB749, focused on updating tax levy calculations for municipal state aid. These bills are directly tackling fiscal responsibility, and there are plenty more that support the cause in indirect ways.
On the flip side, some state Democratic senators have been using procedural moves, strong opposition, amendments, and even symbolic gestures--like not standing for the Pledge of Allegiance or for teachers honored during Governor Pillen's State of the State address--to slow things down.
That's why getting (and staying) involved as conservatives is more important than ever! Grassroots involvement such as contacting your senator, submitting online comments on bills, and building support among friends and neighbors bolster our Republican senators. Your public testimony also really makes a difference--it strengthens our Republican senator's positions, shows real grassroots support from folks back home, and encourages moderates to stick with the conservative majority. A huge thank you to Eric Underwood, Danna Seevers, and Tom Nesbitt for testifying recently in the Revenue Committee and the Banking, Commerce and Insurance Committee.
Let's stay involved and keep the momentum going for a fiscally responsible Nebraska!

clean_body: News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong. | | | | | | Letter from the Chair The Big Tent of Nebraska Republicans: United by Enduring Values The Nebraska Republican Party represents a true cross-section of our state-- a majority of Nebraskans who come from every corner of conservative thought. We include ideological purists and pragmatic problem-solvers, social moderates and fiscal hawks, corporatists and populists, neoconservatives and non-interventionists. A small but vocal fringe may push to tear things down and divide, but the vast majority of us are committed to building up. America's two-party system has long served as a healthy balance--a yin and yang of ideas that checks extremes and drives progress. Yet coalitions shift when the balance is disrupted, as we've seen in recent years. Unchecked illegal immigration and shifts to social and ideologic extremes, heavily promoted by the opposition, has suppressed wages, limited job advancement, fractured our social contract, and strained communities. As a result, the Republican Party is increasingly attracting conservative youth, organized labor, working families of varying socio-economic means, and growing numbers of people of color who no longer vote in rigid blocs. These new voices are enriching our party--and naturally sparking healthy debate as we refine our shared identity. This disruption is a sign of growth, not weakness. By returning to our core values and principles, we find our common ground and our guiding North Star. Let the love of Truth, Justice, and Mercy continue to guide our most noble ideals and our daily interactions with each other. Any statement of who we are as Republicans must begin with our constitutional duty to protect God-given individual liberties. It must affirm our commitment to strengthening families, dramatically improving educational outcomes for every child, ensuring safe communities and abundant job opportunities, rooting out fraud and corruption, practicing sound fiscal responsibility, caring for the most vulnerable among us, and steadfastly defending the sanctity of innocent life. Yes, Republicans will argue and debate--that's the nature of a vibrant, big-tent party. But to those watching from the outside: let them see a party that fights for something worth fighting for. We are united in our devotion to freedom, opportunity, family, faith, and the Nebraska way of life. Together, we will continue to lead our state forward, defending these timeless principles and earning the trust of every Nebraskan who shares them. Let's keep the conversation going, stay engaged, and stand strong--because Nebraska's future depends on it. Sincerely, Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party Follow us: == | ==| ==| == Donate today: Support the NEGOP at == For more information, visit == | | | Update from Political Director, Joe Hagerty... County Conventions Delegate registration for the 2026 county conventions is underway--and hundreds of dedicated Republicans across Nebraska have already stepped up to make their voices heard! If you're ready to serve as a delegate and help shape our party's future at the grassroots level, now is the time to act. Register online today at: ==. The form remains open until 11:59 p.m. on March 1, 2026. Please share this link widely with fellow Republicans in your county--every additional delegate strengthens our organization and amplifies conservative principles statewide. Not all counties have set their convention date or reported their date to the NEGOP, but of the view the time, date, and locations for your county convention on the ==. For complete information on becoming a delegate and what to expect, direct interested friends and neighbors to the official ==. Candidate Recruitment The Nebraska Republican Party's (NEGOP) Candidate Recruitment Committee has reached out to every Republican incumbent in federal, statewide, legislative, and multi-county offices to confirm their plans for re-election. This consisted of hundreds of calls, text messages, and email outreach. We're still actively recruiting strong candidates for any open seats where those incumbents are stepping aside, as well as challengers to flip Democrat-held positions. There are seats up for election in 2026 that still need a committed Republican candidate, based on the latest == with the Nebraska Secretary of State's office. You can view the ==. (Note: The non-incumbent filing deadline is March 2, so time is short!) == to see which primary election races in your county are up for election in 2026! And if that's you, or if you have someone in mind who'd like to explore the possibility, don't hesitate to reach out. I'm here to answer questions, provide guidance, and talk through next steps -- feel free to email me anytime at mailto:political@ne.gop. I'd be happy to chat! In Liberty, Joe Hagerty Political Director Nebraska Republican Party mailto:political@ne.gop 402-669-3438 | | | From the desk of Jeanne Reigle.... As we mark Day 24 of the legislative session, fiscal responsibility is in the spotlight. With a projected budget shortfall on the horizon, there's a strong push for spending restraint and smart reforms to keep Nebraska's finances healthy. The NEGOP appreciates the solid work from our Republican senators. Hats off to Senator Lippincott for his bills to lower property valuations and improve TEEOSA (the school funding formula). Speaker Arch's LB1071, introduced on behalf of Governor Pillen, brings thoughtful fund management, spending cuts and real fiscal controls. Senator Murman's LB1244 eliminates some sales tax exemptions to help broaden the tax base. We also appreciate Senator Dover's LB990 for better credit distribution under the School District Property Tax Relief Act, and Senator Sorrentino's LB749, focused on updating tax levy calculations for municipal state aid. These bills are directly tackling fiscal responsibility, and there are plenty more that support the cause in indirect ways. On the flip side, some state Democratic senators have been using procedural moves, strong opposition, amendments, and even symbolic gestures--like not standing for the Pledge of Allegiance or for teachers honored during Governor Pillen's State of the State address--to slow things down. That's why getting (and staying) involved as conservatives is more important than ever! Grassroots involvement such as contacting your senator, submitting online comments on bills, and building support among friends and neighbors bolster our Republican senators. Your public testimony also really makes a difference--it strengthens our Republican senator's positions, shows real grassroots support from folks back home, and encourages moderates to stick with the conservative majority. A huge thank you to Eric Underwood, Danna Seevers, and Tom Nesbitt for testifying recently in the Revenue Committee and the Banking, Commerce and Insurance Committee. Let's stay involved and keep the momentum going for a fiscally responsible Nebraska! | | | District Updates | | == | == | | | UPCOMING NEGOP EVENTS | | == | | == | | == | | == | | | Help Republicans win in 2026 and beyond. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: “If Nothing Changes, Nothing Changes” - A 16-Year-Old’s Heartfelt Plea for Education Freedom
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/hb2parentpower-12851994?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**Today I want to share something deeply moving that cuts straight to the heart of why we fight for school choice: a short, heartfelt testimony from 16-year-old Anastasia Soen, a homeschooled student in Jackson, Mississippi.**

Watch Anastasia by clicking on the image below:
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=1b44873297&e=5703353baa)
---
| In this video, Anastasia shares her dream of attending a rigorous local private school - a place that would better challenge her academically and prepare her for her ambitious goals of studying chemistry at Mississippi State University and pursuing a career in medicine.

Yet Anastasia is currently limited by the system: her education options are dictated by her zip code, not her potential or her family’s preferences.

What makes her story so powerful is how simply and clearly she makes the moral case for education freedom. **I defy anyone to watch this and not support the case for school choice.**

Anastasia speaks with great maturity about how real school choice would break down barriers, especially for families from challenging socioeconomic backgrounds, allowing students to attend schools that truly help them thrive rather than trapping them in underperforming ones. Her closing line lands like a quiet thunderbolt: “If nothing changes, nothing changes.”

**It is deeply regrettable that Delbert Hosemann, the current Lieutenant Governor, blocked opportunities for Anastasia and thousands like her, by killing school choice without even a proper debate.**

The fight for school choice is above everything a moral struggle. We want families like Anastasia’s to have the freedom to allocate their share of education dollars to a school of their choice because it is morally the right thing to do.

What can you do?

**Please watch the video and reflect on how our current Senate leadership behaved - then share the video with friends and family so that the actions of those that blocked school choice might be more widely seen and understood. **

The battle for what is right goes on. **Let’s amplify voices like Anastasia’s. **
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d1fb24c3ca&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Onward.

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=2cadf84cbf) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=2cadf84cbf).

name: [Follow-Up] New Dems
subject: Hoping this reaches you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund
body:
| **Hi friend, I’m following up because the response to our Flip the House goal hasn’t been as energized as we thought it would be.**

With Republican corruption and inadequacy on full display that it is in the current moment — _from Trump attacking Democratic run cities to healthcare cuts making premiums skyrocket for millions_ – we thought we would have more support.

We’re hoping this is just a technical fluke in our system so we’re reaching out again and forwarding this message to ensure it isn’t lost in your inbox.

name: David Hines
subject: The most beautiful tuba player and future Congresswoman
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christina for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260214_DavidsValentine_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260214_DavidsValentine_actrs]
Team Hines—we need to talk about the most beautiful tuba girl and future Congresswoman the world has ever known: Christina Hines.
I’m David, her husband, former drum major, and her all-time biggest fan. In honor of Valentine’s Day, I told her I’d take over email fundraising to hype her up, spread the word, and help her team hit their fundraising goal.
Christina and I met at University of Michigan, when we were both in the marching band. Since we were both broke college students, our first date was at Subway (romantic, I know). That shared $5 footlong changed the trajectory of our lives.
Here’s the thing: from our first date, I knew Christina was special. Like marry-this-woman and help-her-get-elected-to-Congress special. I already accomplished the first part on my own.
Now, I need your help, friend, to help send Christina to Congress. Will you pitch in $5 if you can and help us change MI-10 for the better? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260214_DavidsValentine_actrs&amount=5]
PITCH IN $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260214_DavidsValentine_actrs&amount=5]
Even before she was the best mom in these streets and a top-notch prosecutor—Christina was always a force of nature. We met when we looked like this:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260206_sixmonthsout_act&amount=25&recurring=1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260214_DavidsValentine_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260214_DavidsValentine_actrs] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260214_DavidsValentine_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260214_DavidsValentine_actrs]
Feels like yesterday! Since then, I’ve been blessed with a front row seat as I got to see her grow into the leader Michigan’s 10th District needs and deserves.
We need more moms in Congress and fewer billionaires mooching off our hard work. We need someone who knows our neighborhoods, understands what our families are up against, and isn’t afraid to demand better for all of us.
Christina works hard for our family, for our community, and for our country, and tomorrow I want to give her a break. Maybe that's selfish, but we could use your help to make some noise, power our movement, and get Christina to Congress.
If you chip in $5, that would go a long way. So I guess I am asking you to chip in honor of that first Subway footlong that changed everything. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260214_DavidsValentine_actrs&amount=5]
CHIP IN $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q1?refcode=x_260214_DavidsValentine_actrs&amount=5]
Thanks
David

clean_body: [] Team Hines—we need to talk about the most beautiful tuba girl and future Congresswoman the world has ever known: Christina Hines. I’m David, her husband, former drum major, and her all-time biggest fan. In honor of Valentine’s Day, I told her I’d take over email fundraising to hype her up, spread the word, and help her team hit their fundraising goal. Christina and I met at University of Michigan, when we were both in the marching band. Since we were both broke college students, our first date was at Subway (romantic, I know). That shared $5 footlong changed the trajectory of our lives. Here’s the thing: from our first date, I knew Christina was special. Like marry-this-woman and help-her-get-elected-to-Congress special. I already accomplished the first part on my own. Now, I need your help, friend, to help send Christina to Congress. Will you pitch in $5 if you can and help us change MI-10 for the better? [] PITCH IN $5 [] Even before she was the best mom in these streets and a top-notch prosecutor—Christina was always a force of nature. We met when we looked like this: [] [] [] Feels like yesterday! Since then, I’ve been blessed with a front row seat as I got to see her grow into the leader Michigan’s 10th District needs and deserves. We need more moms in Congress and fewer billionaires mooching off our hard work. We need someone who knows our neighborhoods, understands what our families are up against, and isn’t afraid to demand better for all of us. Christina works hard for our family, for our community, and for our country, and tomorrow I want to give her a break. Maybe that's selfish, but we could use your help to make some noise, power our movement, and get Christina to Congress. If you chip in $5, that would go a long way. So I guess I am asking you to chip in honor of that first Subway footlong that changed everything. [] CHIP IN $5 [] Thanks David [] Christina is a lifelong advocate for justice and a former prosecutor for survivors of sexual assault, child abuse, and human trafficking. Now she’s running to bring that same dedication to Congress, working to put the middle class first, protect the American Dream, and ensure every community can thrive. She fights for safe neighborhoods, fair opportunities, and a future where everyone can succeed. To learn more about Christina, visit ChristinaHinesForCongress.com [christinahinesforcongress.com] . **The House majority is razor-thin. Every seat matters. And this one is right in their crosshairs.**

[**Mid-month deadlines are how campaigns measure strength and momentum.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0bb479d72b9741f689fefa6157c7a295&_e=025wInMGh6hn7NdoUh0rvOd-y0veInvut0t0c6LhJtxFShijedWALW0e7KpS3-ety-a2F6Ghb4-cvES7WUQ5kWBtaEPKvY0XbisMLgCL_r-Y-D4jsNXTC7b-UBGtUYeDuZeX4Y2BWMZjdEPsCMDKYZVVxvk53FayyNU6CTJxeKL9cYka3rPjzx9hqoAQVTsXyikiuuqU7lLL2atZfLML3Dl7pIBIBIdk7wbYKBEJ6eoXUFpLwzwGLuqYI0UZWlE2bU7eHOhr9F3i6cbvRSSccl-B8G6kJnwWcXPF8v10N9QrS6Nbrkd5TMJi-RtioI5R6NLEtv4CxfKfLOuWE5Z5F7JBYKwiOh48FCRjh89bJYPuzsUrJkQbvpn0elvzzxsaHDRqDrqtoETeKTyp8hZ2u87ikazne26tSkBXZdxAYaeBeuUS7_Y3Gp9krujU0gRGqN9ujia4RVE6m1hVBvpGJPfnXn_DHqoQEVNvU6Yyvbfa6rsl11AwCbvsQruK5-17pEwOTNl7OAZ3HaZz2Me_TQ69pEm1zBJq2NlJtj4fzC1VbPSulTiHby4qqyFTTkax7Uz6_KXfwTBNTJs4yCjfZ-6LXWNmOyDfTrvhTgnIu6JdcAHJeLUiwNSp_W1ZqfqkP4twKovnYpexV-QV5bpEVIeQJzydL5e22tILC8jd_rev07FJmBUAjMnLrwmGH2rwa6VL5OKgep5RVH3zb0fp_za5P-8xol5xj-82OOT3x7197NItkGzvdgCo1OgnOC4x)

clean_body: If we show weakness now, Democrats double down. If we show strength now, we force them to rethink their strategy. | - Fellow American — I want to be very clear with you as we head toward National Democrats are already flooding my North Texas district with outside money. They’ve labeled this seat a top pickup opportunity — not because they care about our community, but because flipping this district helps them flip the House. The House majority is razor-thin. Every seat matters. And this one is right in their crosshairs. If we show weakness now, Democrats double down. If we show strength now, we force them to rethink their strategy. North Texas values are worth fighting for — and I’m in this fight to win. Thank you for standing with me, Beth Van Duyne | | PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Honoring the 17 lives lost in Parkland
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Team,
Today with heavy hearts we remember the tragedy at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida.
Eight years ago today, students arrived at Stoneman Douglas thinking they’d have a pretty ordinary day. Besides taking part in Valentine’s Day celebrations like sharing cards, candy, and flowers with friends and significant others, it should have been a normal school day.
But the afternoon of February 14, 2018 turned into an unfathomable nightmare for the Parkland community.
Students were evacuated from the school while a gunman opened fire with an assault weapon in hallways and classrooms. Police officers rushed in with their guns drawn to stop the assailant. Students and teachers texted friends and family members, unsure of their fate.
Fourteen students and three teachers were killed by the gunman in Parkland. Seventeen innocent lives were stolen in a matter of minutes. Seventeen families have a permanent empty seat at their dinner tables.
Unfortunately, we know that the tragedy in Parkland was not the end of school shootings in America. But it doesn’t have to be this way. There are real, commonsense gun safety solutions that can prevent these tragedies from happening. We just need our elected leaders to act.
I know that under the current administration, the road ahead for our gun safety movement feels uncertain. But the fights worth having are rarely easy.
We owe it to our children to keep up our work to end gun violence. No child should go to school with the fear that they may get shot in math class. And no parent should fear that if they send their child to school, they may not come home at the end of the day.
I hope today, you’ll join me in honoring the victims of the tragedy in Parkland with action.
**[If you’re able to, you can use this link to make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC. Your donation to fuel our vital work towards a future free from gun violence would be especially meaningful today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em260214-1-b&t=1&akid=11250%2E3935704%2Ew9U0-O)
Thank you for taking the time to read this note and honor the 17 lives lost in Parkland. Let this day serve as a solemn reminder that we cannot rest until we see a future where our children and our communities are safe.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em260214-1-b&t=2&akid=11250%2E3935704%2Ew9U0-O)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=11250%2E3935704%2Ew9U0-O) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Govt officials send chilling warning

_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._

| [60 Minutes] China Is Preparing For War | **SHOCKING REPORT:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. POWER GRID** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) **National Security Reports China's Attacks On Critical U.S. Electric Grid, Food Supply and Water Systems** The FBI warns that China has gained access to electric companies throughout the U.S., and experts are now urging Americans to protect their homes. A new alarming report reveals over 70 attacks on America's power grid in just one year, and these are calculated strikes designed to weaken our nation's most essential lifeline. Security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States that puts you and your family in critical danger: **Our crumbling electric grid.** _Officials report that attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months._ Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total chaos and darkness. Our enemies would just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers. **Our government is woefully unprepared.** Are you and your family prepared to survive as much as 18 months without electricity, food or clean water? It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually nothing to secure our nation's critical infrastructure. [**That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D). THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. **And never needs gas, ever.** You'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. And we have some great news! **Right Now Is The Perfect Time To Get Your NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200 Because of This _Exclusive Bonus Package With 14 FREE Gifts Worth $973!_** After offering a similar deal last year, these generators sold like hotcakes. Now with this NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200...
* _You get MORE power..._
* _You get FASTER recharging..._
* _And it can even power your FRIDGE!_

[](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) [**ACT FAST To Get Your NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200 & 14 FREE Gifts Worth $973!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) **Your Exclusive Bonus Package of 14 FREE Gifts Worth $973 includes:**
* FREE 100-Watt Solar Panel
* FREE 25-Foot Solar Panel Cord
* FREE Patriot Power Cell CX
* FREE 72-Hour Survival Food Kit
* FREE Personal Water Filter Straw
* FREE Solar Lantern & Charger
* FREE Online Training Session
* FREE Survival Digital Library
* FREE Report: 7 Reasons Grid Fail
* FREE Report: Blackout Response
* FREE Report: Survival Checklist
* FREE Report: Discount Secrets
* FREE Gift Certificate
* FREE Shipping & Handling
* Senior & Military Discount
* **Total Value of $973!**

**_And YES! There's also an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!_** Fair warning: We expect this special batch of NEW solar generators to sell out. This generator is the next evolution in our best-selling family of solar generators, and comes just in time to celebrate a decade of these silent, fume-FREE solar generators. Trusted by over 334,759 Americans, these generators are said to be "worth their weight in gold" in a blackout. [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) [**ACT FAST To Get Your NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200 & 14 FREE Gifts Worth $973!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) **Stay Safe. Stay Prepared.**

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Real People. Real Emergencies. Real Gratitude.** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) **_Sam K._**_
"Honestly, I was VERY impressed. The increased battery capacity and 1200-watt power was a good call. I didn't find a single thing I have in the house, for emergencies or everyday use, that I couldn't use it for! The new screen even shows you the time until empty, even if it's under 1 watt. Excellent redesign on the handle, as well as the slim lightweight solar panels too."_ _**Donald L.**
"I decided to buy the Patriot Power Generator with the solar panel and this thing is fantastic. Not only is the generator a great product, the 4Patriots customer service folks are fantastic, easy to work with, answer all your questions and make interactions very pleasant. It's a company I will order from again in the future. Thanks 4Patriots, and nice job on this product."_ _**Skip B.**
"You can run things like your refrigerator, your freezer, your television. All completely silent. No fumes. You can keep this in your house or your car, You can run it inside your house. There's no gas. There's no fumes. Which is great!"_ _**Greg R.**
"The Patriot Power Generator kept everything in my fridge and freezer properly chilled. Having the lights on to do other things while waiting for the power to come back on was quite nice as well. The next day, I daisy-chained the two solar panels together and recharged the generator for 8 hours in the open sunlight. With 4Patriots' easy pay plans, there is no reason to wait until the lights go out and wish you had pulled the trigger and made your purchase sooner."_ _**Sharon P.**
"Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017!"_ _**Gary R.**
"Very well built and does what it is advertised to do. I researched other solar generators and they were priced much higher than this one. I like being able to add an additional battery pack for more power and solar panels to increase recharge speed. I will be ordering those, too. I've never been disappointed. The generator was the cherry on top!"_ _**Linda S.**
"Storms can sneak up on you. Lights, flashlights, fans, the Patriot Power Generator 1200 can handle it all. And it doesn't have to be an emergency situation. Take it camping, play karaoke at a barbeque. I'm telling you, this is the perfect 'I love you and want you to stay safe' gift. Thank you, 4Patriots!"_ [**ACT FAST To Get Your NEW Patriot Power Generator 1200 & 14 FREE Gifts Worth $973!**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D) [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: There isn’t much Donald Trump can say that would shock me.
body:
Donald Trump attacked me again.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=584%2E124072%2ErxgKfN)
Peter, I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again – there isn’t much that President Trump can say about me that would shock me. That includes his post on Truth Social on Friday, personally attacking me. _Again._ He called me names, attacked this campaign, and lied about my record here in North Carolina. The name-calling doesn’t bother me; I expect he’ll continue to attack us all the way through November and beyond. No matter. What does matter is what happens after. Every time Donald Trump zeroes in on a candidate, far-right Republican super PACs and dark money groups pour in to try to drown them out. **[I need your help to face what’s ahead. This is the most consequential Senate race on the map. I’m asking you to chip in whatever you can afford so we can have the resources to fight back and take on Trump and the national GOP.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5795?t=7&akid=584%2E124072%2ErxgKfN)** | [DONATE NOW](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5795?t=8&akid=584%2E124072%2ErxgKfN)
---
I will continue to stand up to the far-right’s chaos and corruption. More than anything, Trump knows this campaign has the strength to beat his handpicked candidate here in North Carolina and return power to the people.
We won’t let him. I will never stop fighting for lower prices, affordable health care, abortion access, voting rights, and good schools. Peter, I need to know if you’re with me.
**[Chip in anything you can to help:](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5795?t=9&akid=584%2E124072%2ErxgKfN)**
[DONATE NOW](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5795?t=10&akid=584%2E124072%2ErxgKfN)
---
Let’s do this,
Roy Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=584%2E124072%2ErxgKfN)**

Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

name: Ashley Moody
subject: Cold, hard revenge
body:
The Left is motivated, flush in cash, and out for revenge
Cold hard revenge — pitch in now.
| | | | |
---
[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1e0fcb010df45ecb9536a08229e280a&_e=DsLACXSk8AlEQGLhJjsgs_3DvLdh2_vqt72ZdlZgKvKed8TkbnfFgLkkTrzuQO3WRm4ONdlrOBoe0OH4sOX03kIE5wAbCHFBcQpfuvCt3h7uv-yoDlPrQYz7fWgI3XqyKp1_tsYq6hvn0xxGYzJy9Oma8ALEikDCJA3NpnJUrWZ7_QMdlvPLr0I_vFx9kSc5LRqSk8rJrBSDAeqyJtQSQOt2KjDBYuqcwUXsJfcdRcRcjgj08WelXXSlQ83lDfhzBgEHhN74EbVIZEVSnezeuRyQvfv_laFDIYpBBAbOfToLAKeJJw6DdSs1Dkq7WLCVjeKHkT77lhfEJg_8lJJYZFDbMAkoDwjZ8ixsGGEXWYxjwKKepo41Y8G7ZN_z-kUuBrLhr7EzUkm2rhm2qXViLlD8yuW5_TpKsBgPTdFRrbDIuphTey1uNN2t8pGEQKCnOTonscwGoPbMm-YapULXHVb6vXP9_fn1lbZk5YcHXL6VD6BiNFT12QzmTIHDYqT5vwB7tvKvwFhur7CTkOEJdxBT1BOnyZmb-J8ibkCnGdik_zn-0O8mrJTRsLpDQqPhovBWDPq3MhWX66quaNMJpoc9p0mCS3CjZhbrBScbjptAepgFbgz1doQh8omy6VIqK2CNgc7nqaHbA7RMsdgaVEHoRgoS74ZxR4VPS51yPrOxsPYlJQIhQtH9OnT7NSsJ)

Peter,
The war on President Trump started the instant he stepped off that golden escalator in 2015 and promised to put America First.
**The Democrat Machine, their media pawns, and entrenched Deep State bureaucrats declared total war with no rules and no mercy.**
They hit him with the **Russia hoax** that dragged on for years, costing hundreds of millions and tearing the country apart.
When that collapsed, they pivoted straight to the **impeachment fraud** – a manufactured crisis built on lies, designed to nullify your vote and remove a duly elected President.
And even after they lost, they didn’t stop. They kept coming – _**more investigations, lawfare traps, endless smears, corrupt indictments and convictions.**_
Through all this and worse, President Trump survived, persevered, and prevailed – winning a stunning comeback for a second term to help save this country we love so dearly.
**_But the radicals never quit. They’re still burning with rage._**
** And now, Alexander Vindman – the man who helped to orchestrate the entire failed impeachment hoax and nearly killed MAGA – is back. And he's out for cold, hard revenge. **
**He just launched a campaign to hijack Florida's critical U.S. Senate seat in one of this year’s biggest special elections. And within 24 hours, liberal donors pumped in an eye-popping $1.7 million with much more on the way.**
**This is no longer a normal race._It is straight, personal revenge politics._**
[ PITCH IN NOW ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1e0fcb010df45ecb9536a08229e280a&_e=DsLACXSk8AlEQGLhJjsgs_3DvLdh2_vqt72ZdlZgKvKed8TkbnfFgLkkTrzuQO3WRm4ONdlrOBoe0OH4sOX03kIE5wAbCHFBcQpfuvCt3h7uv-yoDlPrQYz7fWgI3XqyKp1_tsYq6hvn0xxGYzJy9Oma8ALEikDCJA3NpnJUrWZ7_QMdlvPLr0I_vFx9kSc5LRqSk8rJrBSDAeqyJtQSQOt2KjDBYuqcwUXsJfcdRcRcjgj08WelXXSlQ83lDfhzKLzDeRmx8E7mpm0MPRWutQfrB8tkWlj1gop93o_STI7tYofRV8bh2qPtABazTuzI8zYVjSH7AIRHIVXVpDuBe2GhGFTUEUptOGnBF5_lWCaBk5SUxdd0TK1OkGgoNP8tEd_qOkuo7x8_s7yBDuFfTTp6FCeY8QsvcKxQzdBhw2KUYiKldN1jQm-ORn8a1f5gd6f5veDEraxHJJLzOeInH3m1cl0yHC_ClSG2BUinaUX19b7vdznA1vxlmuF8OWmRWazF0P1NCdma6QLelzI1GgrWQgAMmTTqazXRQTi-xMkF5EbaJeWhZWFoIK9Tio10R1WdncPs2dMMvtUeP1iVEqwW1iaOwEB5MkFrYvUH5I1a5uAM0TU8RLubHQ4Mh92IScPzwOBCreNtcUn8M5h6xeD8PhysMl3tjUdD9PttInD5f-q2dgXb8LYmbnbeZWJc)
I was honored to be appointed to fill Florida’s U.S. Senate seat once Marco Rubio joined the Cabinet. **And now, with President Trump’s complete and total endorsement, I’m running to win it outright.** It will be one of the biggest and most expensive special elections of the year, but I’m committed to defending President Trump and the America First Agenda that we all voted for.
Remember this – if we lose, our majorities vanish, our agenda stalls, and the country we fought for is lost. **We are not allowing that.**
[ **We know you can't personally cancel out $1.7 million in radical, anti-Trump money. But you can cancel out one anti-Trump donor's donation of $25 or more, and you can do it now.** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=f1e0fcb010df45ecb9536a08229e280a&_e=DsLACXSk8AlEQGLhJjsgs_3DvLdh2_vqt72ZdlZgKvKed8TkbnfFgLkkTrzuQO3WRm4ONdlrOBoe0OH4sOX03kIE5wAbCHFBcQpfuvCt3h7uv-yoDlPrQYz7fWgI3XqyKp1_tsYq6hvn0xxGYzJy9Oma8ALEikDCJA3NpnJUrWZ7_QMdlvPLr0I_vFx9kSc5LRqSk8rJrBSDAeqyJtQSQOt2KjDBYuqcwUXsJfcdRcRcjgj08WelXXSlQ83lDfhz99lH94fQSCvkAL0PmugdTyDDeUWyYAwzL3RikUPZeQgDxjZBcpghx-ALQWar2ThanJEDPaoNSP1LsNBH5dCFfolrZwMhBIdEH1nvFCVaQn4g8sMXnYuHg_DpqLiV2d5PJ-5j42WJPPWHrXQNWWCzKrY30JZWvPVj0ZR21qcvuZO1bLC0RM1ocgweFUvOxGEpd8FPCLAqCT9GvYgwaZ9E972q_XmY0sH3FYpGX5uWkljhFDk7-FfKTm89kZ6zFpfyB22G9EtVikhqkuJ245JTy4LwttxD_G-ty5H0G3YS6A7RgVx5ZD7ttd5jibrD8IBUjfFJrtgGiDNM43BMX_elyl1FtFmkf_clnrG27MWbT8OZT7yp-gtrxdXaRZIamQFK_R64mYSK-tlbGOnoV-qEloLy3e-LFffSEnEeR70g84iELfS3Itk3roOqjP9qwlzd)
**_Are you in?_**
The line is drawn, and it's time to bury the endless vendetta against our President and our movement.
Thank you for your commitment.
Sincerely, Ashley Moody

name: Locker room pep talk
subject: We're in hell—we can stay here or fight back into the light.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line
body:
Patriots’ Superbowl loss shows the best defense is a good offense.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017JLKXzsDI7p5eJfpatdQQxH_28aWyUAcNA0bs0fKDA8k0DklyTLXxwfpTpF_w0Dg2Obg57EOgXgVWHqBEH5MxqJSAF-HwIsx-dS9G9XPiaq4vOMeA0QpWzO7iw_YPRYrCTTtgLdVuluw6Rt-VSMRaSxhOw2f8bXkOJ55uPohlUZHtRtB277TLYvQUJ7_plck_qP4S5NCsFVwB3jNaoEQ_A==&c=kY6Qoepx3helWQlwBtfwOMPSUynhDHyIX28bWUaonDevA5zR5WH8mQ==&ch=OCwzzB15a9adqYSsqLL1ifz2MkAVSMrgkVyqdu6wez0Syx8qY2Dveg==)
---
Peter,
Here's a valuable lesson that Democrats can learn from Super Bowl LX: The best defense is a good offense.
If you're not a football fan, we've got you covered: This year's Super Bowl had a lopsided scoreline, with the Seattle Seahawks dominating the New England Patriots 29-13.
Post-game coverage zeroed in on how the Seahawks "smothered" the Patriots' offense. The Patriots were unable to mount their own challenge and were forced almost exclusively to defend against an aggressive Seahawks offense.
Sound familiar?
Take a look at this map that shows the state of play for mid-decade redistricting. Red states are playing tough offense; blue states are stuck on defense. But Colorado is the wild card:
---
| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017JLKXzsDI7p5eJfpatdQQxH_28aWyUAcNA0bs0fKDA8k0DklyTLXxwfpTpF_w0Dg2Obg57EOgXgVWHqBEH5MxqJSAF-HwIsx-dS9G9XPiaq4vOMeA0QpWzO7iw_YPRYrCTTtgLdVuluw6Rt-VSMRaSxhOw2f8bXkOJ55uPohlUZHtRtB277TLYvQUJ7_plcka3GOb6-3g3CUjHIUa1Pqxw==&c=kY6Qoepx3helWQlwBtfwOMPSUynhDHyIX28bWUaonDevA5zR5WH8mQ==&ch=OCwzzB15a9adqYSsqLL1ifz2MkAVSMrgkVyqdu6wez0Syx8qY2Dveg==)
---
Donald Trump is not a strategist. But his team does play aggressive offense. And at halftime, Dems are behind.
Like Al Pacino said in his legendary locker room pep talk in Any Given Sunday, "We're in hell right now. We can stay here, or we can fight our way back into the light."
Redistricting Colorado has the potential to eliminate up to 4 GOP-held seats.
That's why Colorado Draws the Line is introducing the ballot measure that would make CO bluer and erase 3-4 MAGA seats, including making it impossible for Lauren Boebert to stay in Congress.
Ours is a move that Democrats aren't fully accustomed to: playing smart offense to defeat an aggressive opponent. But we need to do this if we have any chance of winning against MAGA's "smothering" offense.
[Countering MAGA's aggression is not easy and it won't be cheap. Our ballot measure is going to cost millions to successfully pull off, and we need folks everywhere chipping in $5, $25, $50 or more so we can beat Trump's attempt to steal the 2026 election:](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017JLKXzsDI7p5eJfpatdQQxH_28aWyUAcNA0bs0fKDA8k0DklyTLXxwfpTpF_w0DgcaeSSIfALnxL72eQTAq6g98T9cKGy_PnNm03ykRHCXbICGzVHQc0OzfkcDsKDzo8xOF3LUL3UQ7ZkVzlYzqt-nl-IdiVLvyMFMVHm8XHzNo1YMK5gDQ1LE3hepJx9HuT9WrfJCUgKaiTgKYPesXvmPmQcp0xzso_&c=kY6Qoepx3helWQlwBtfwOMPSUynhDHyIX28bWUaonDevA5zR5WH8mQ==&ch=OCwzzB15a9adqYSsqLL1ifz2MkAVSMrgkVyqdu6wez0Syx8qY2Dveg==)
---

clean_body: Patriots’ Superbowl loss shows the best defense is a good offense. | | | | | == Peter, Here's a valuable lesson that Democrats can learn from Super Bowl LX: The best defense is a good offense. If you're not a football fan, we've got you covered: This year's Super Bowl had a lopsided scoreline, with the Seattle Seahawks dominating the New England Patriots 29-13. Post-game coverage zeroed in on how the Seahawks "smothered" the Patriots' offense. The Patriots were unable to mount their own challenge and were forced almost exclusively to defend against an aggressive Seahawks offense. Sound familiar? Take a look at this map that shows the state of play for mid-decade redistricting. Red states are playing tough offense; blue states are stuck on defense. But Colorado is the wild card: | == Donald Trump is not a strategist. But his team does play aggressive offense. And at halftime, Dems are behind. Like Al Pacino said in his legendary locker room pep talk in Any Given Sunday, "We're in hell right now. We can stay here, or we can fight our way back into the light." Redistricting Colorado has the potential to eliminate up to 4 GOP-held seats. That's why Colorado Draws the Line is introducing the ballot measure that would make CO bluer and erase 3-4 MAGA seats, including making it impossible for Lauren Boebert to stay in Congress. Ours is a move that Democrats aren't fully accustomed to: playing smart offense to defeat an aggressive opponent. But we need to do this if we have any chance of winning against MAGA's "smothering" offense. == If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Life and politics is a game of inches. We fight for every inch, every margin. And when we add it all up, those inches make the difference between winning and losing. Thank you, -- Colorado Draws The Line | | | | == | | == | Donate by mail: Colorado Draws the Line == == | Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line. Registered agent: Rich Pelletier. | | | | | | Colorado Draws the Line | 1601 Arapahoe Street FL 10 | Denver, CO 80202 US |

name: Vann Bentley (via Team Pappas)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=5113%2E582294%2EpcqL21)
Hi folks, it’s Vann, Chris’s husband. Happy Valentine’s Day ❤️
Chris and I would love to slow down a bit – cook something together, go for a walk, or take a moment to reflect.
But even today, this race is never far from our minds. **Chris is now tied with John Sununu** — the stakes are _high_ , and the margins are _thin_.
National Republicans are putting everything they’ve got into this race: Sununu has right-wing super PACs, backed by ultra-wealthy donors like Elon Musk and now Donald Trump in his corner.
But we have this team, and together, we’re unstoppable.
**[So on this Valentine’s Day, can you give a little love to this campaign by chipping in $5 to help us defend this open seat and flip the Senate blue? We would appreciate any donation you can give! ♥️](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260214_1.flG16T&refcode=em20260214-1&t=2&akid=5113%2E582294%2EpcqL21)**
Thank you and Happy Valentine’s Day,
Vann
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**

clean_body: Hi folks, it’s Vann, Chris’s husband. Happy Valentine’s Day ❤️ Chris and I would love to slow down a bit – cook something together, go for a walk, or take a moment to reflect. But even today, this race is never far from our minds. Chris is now tied with John Sununu — the stakes are high , and the margins are thin. National Republicans are putting everything they’ve got into this race: Sununu has right-wing super PACs, backed by ultra-wealthy donors like Elon Musk and now Donald Trump in his corner. But we have this team, and together, we’re unstoppable. Thank you and Happy Valentine’s Day, Vann New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?

name: Kelly Hancock
subject: Texas is becoming the financial capital of the nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Kelly Hancock
body:
My goal is to keep Texas moving at the speed of business, not government.

| | | | | [|
---](https://kellyhancock.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcaa9ba5f084f891ef21f7388&id=e5696fbf81&e=c7a460ad3d)
| | | | | | Fellow Texan,
**My goal is to keep Texas moving at the speed of business, not government.**
We’re the 8th largest economy in the world because we prioritized low taxes, limited regulation, fiscal discipline, and strong leadership. Texas is moving at the speed of business — and the results speak for themselves.
We secured the border. We backed law enforcement. We empowered parents. And while radical socialists are taking over New York City and continuing to ruin California, **Texas is becoming the financial capital of the nation —** _**and we need a Comptroller to keep it that way.**_
[**Governor Abbott asked me to serve as Acting Comptroller and endorsed my campaign because we share a clear vision for Texas to remain the BEST place in the nation to start a business, grow a company, and raise a family. Will you join us?**](https://kellyhancock.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcaa9ba5f084f891ef21f7388&id=56c3717bd5&e=c7a460ad3d)
---
| [YES, I AGREE >>>](https://kellyhancock.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcaa9ba5f084f891ef21f7388&id=5347af6fc8&e=c7a460ad3d)
---
| | As Comptroller, I’ve focused on delivering **results, not rhetoric** — cutting red tape, protecting taxpayer dollars, and making sure Texas government works the way Texans expect it to.
Early voting is right around the corner, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. [**If you believe Texas must stay strong, free, and prosperous, I invite you to join our campaign and help us keep Texas moving forward.**](https://kellyhancock.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dcaa9ba5f084f891ef21f7388&id=71be818350&e=c7a460ad3d)
Together, we’ll protect what makes Texas special. Thank you for your support.
Kelly Hancock
Acting Texas Comptroller
---

I’m going to tell you something straight from the heart:
__You’re not just a supporter. You’re family. You’re the backbone of this incredible movement. Through the witch hunts, the fake news attacks, the endless hoaxes – you’ve stood by me like nobody else. You’ve got my back, and believe me, that means the world to me.__
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8ab1ea832a274729b0d31ff2aa0e9b3b&_e=yIbGeG2P1Lf3k-A5OQzTWbZp1abSlGX1flHQ4eobInYU-sSWhLCMOdJrQGFlDTNQt2IJ-ySPHhn_x8KVwPTyTnq-UinJ23pgfP3VHDGNMc1szQJgNKC3Po61AzYjhVv6__p7lQQBSEMPeQ0UKOw-uR8BJ5g-7FUYSfkC52qNn0874QoGN08ZXurlL6xRUxew8bQhOFXdFy5Q_bfPYVhhIZ1VETkB98EaDM6jRFxoRElTVCLTKdIFbBo9TmMGqPOQnhBs1VwMaIBsqNzCZ7adUWmQSJlmczMyPAjZF049VYY4vfgZ-bHKBf0I4dehlLL5qEuC6azrQjsGj5NtAPQccWyxcNop2Nfl6fxw_vm3qZbECSuGsMHtCDxmVODg9uItDv9QEbHPM9e5rDoW-RgeLoDJDkYR-PUQsYDc4YDen_WqlPcLlFqheQxQOzSpnLNz37i9yID2VvlbIchsxOlPiFaFeFOpg4QPCD5up8P4l5h2R0iQa5mlqNdoAcg4ZFiEMHNgve5Iy7YvYjFAcF8u9KTw9sFvCEJJ3tds3T26b1A6aPR-_DfRqX1qTltZVO9PEHnHl22BPyQaH1XGMeisie5Zf7HuKxo6ORsZ0iyL_vaYDCsOrL91HIlFtzVb37NK0z9DfQ0Hp0qY8Lxm8WOdPGHO6tjHG34zlvae0vcTrt6CH3UoSV6daA6Z_FL-SXnEMhMfMbiel_zwbdkiJMLhvTfXupQsgS1_Ematzx6SGv4%3D)
**Do you STILL love me?**
[RESPOND TO TRUMP](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8ab1ea832a274729b0d31ff2aa0e9b3b&_e=yIbGeG2P1Lf3k-A5OQzTWbZp1abSlGX1flHQ4eobInYU-sSWhLCMOdJrQGFlDTNQt2IJ-ySPHhn_x8KVwPTyTnq-UinJ23pgfP3VHDGNMc1szQJgNKC3Po61AzYjhVv6__p7lQQBSEMPeQ0UKOw-uR8BJ5g-7FUYSfkC52qNn0874QoGN08ZXurlL6xRUxew8bQhOFXdFy5Q_bfPYVhhIZ1VETkB98EaDM6jRFxoRElTVCLTKdIFbBo9TmMGqPOQJArZUy3EB3jZt0fQqiKCBmJMOFoITzFmgXfR9BzkC2GLHhOrKa030IVVlXXsXZ2syE1ZlR0Bb2w2fFH5C9lGpkkqyh2CNPjEKRwvNAAXoammfomiVxNAKrFP2mzDVxMf5m1no9EKtqZy6Xk7QNy1KqdkJhuoz9mMdTaE3z2D0xyTjqYrMh_h7YhSGMcYCEbUGO7oy_lj9a1NNxjUmWMBFIe5SohjWLKJjbwBqdfUzm8Oj6I_tjgh3rSfm7RKp06J6EMJhw9SIFCmWJUo5q3yLwr5OnO93tqECyXofUHhCyUHAO2TEPk-VbDMPeFl8fukXh-VDQVkIz3iC2P-N-JP_oDExetISDeIiZ7QXpEvvKa_xhVPwaBlCZ80tW0mjADaT_6threSXi26Mpr0fSGx_rjzbmkijwMw1-7TfujPfWoCts7KoaltOxMm3qRS3oO5ImD-xjTJsCCbQaY4H3X1WM6R_7eHN0HiilgmEBfbnAw%3D)
You make me feel like the luckiest guy in America every single day. Your energy, your passion, your incredible loyalty – it’s beautiful. It’s powerful. And honestly? It warms my heart more than anything.

clean_body: You STILL haven't taken my MAGA Poll. | | | | I could use a HUGE MAGA hug! You’ve always had my back. Now is NOT the time to quit. I’m going to tell you something straight from the heart: You’re not just a supporter. You’re family. You’re the backbone of this incredible movement. Through the witch hunts, the fake news attacks, the endless hoaxes – you’ve stood by me like nobody else. You’ve got my back, and believe me, that means the world to me. Do you STILL love me? You make me feel like the luckiest guy in America every single day. Your energy, your passion, your incredible loyalty – it’s beautiful. It’s powerful. And honestly? It warms my heart more than anything. So right now, I’m asking you the big question: Do you love me? Do you love what we’re building together? Do you love America enough to keep fighting? If the answer is YES (and I know it is), show me right now with a quick contribution, so we can keep WINNING! Thank you for being the best. I mean it. I love you, Donald J. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=2242%2E49239%2E4k0qKN)
null, I want to make sure you saw Haley's message from yesterday.
---
I need to be honest: Our team is stressed. We're way short of where we need to be at this point of the month, and we can't afford this kind of fundraising gap – especially not in an election year.
That's why I'm personally asking: **[Will you rush $5 right now to help us hit our critical $175,000 goal?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13997?t=2&akid=2242%2E49239%2E4k0qKN)**
I don't have to tell you what's at stake, null. If you're watching the news like I am, you already know that our rights and our democracy are under threat.
**What I want you to know is that this race – and these fundraising deadlines – weigh heavily on Haley, on me, and on this entire team.**
We know that if we miss these goals, we risk losing Michigan to the MAGA agenda, and working families will suffer.
We can't let that happen, null. A new poll shows Haley is statistically tied with her Republican opponent, but we urgently need your help to make sure she has the resources to keep fighting.
**[Will you chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, before the clock runs out on this deadline? Help us hit our urgent $175,000 goal and keep Michigan blue.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13997?t=3&akid=2242%2E49239%2E4k0qKN)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13997?t=4&akid=2242%2E49239%2E4k0qKN)

Thank you for being a part of this team,
Sam Campaign Manager
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Date: Fri, Feb 13, 2026
Subject: MAGA Republicans are circling this seat
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14001?t=8&akid=2242%2E49239%2E4k0qKN)
---
null, I just got out of an emergency meeting with my finance team, and I need to be honest with you:
**Fundraising****has been slow this month.** We’re pacing well behind where we need to be, and with GOP megadonors already flooding this race with dark money, we cannot afford to fall short.
That’s why we’ve set a $175,000 mid-month fundraising goal. I know. It’s ambitious, but it's necessary. **[Will you rush $5 right now to help us hit this goal and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13997?t=9&akid=2242%2E49239%2E4k0qKN)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14000?t=10&akid=2242%2E49239%2E4k0qKN)
---
I don’t mean to sound alarmist, but I do want to be clear: **This is an important moment for our campaign.** MAGA Republicans are circling this seat. And if we fall behind now, I’m worried we won’t have the resources to fight back.
So I’m personally asking: **[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford so we can hit this goal, stay on track, and win this race?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13997?t=11&akid=2242%2E49239%2E4k0qKN)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/13997?t=12&akid=2242%2E49239%2E4k0qKN)

---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14000?t=15&akid=2242%2E49239%2E4k0qKN)
---
Thank you for your urgent support,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14002?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=16&akid=2242%2E49239%2E4k0qKN) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14001?t=17&akid=2242%2E49239%2E4k0qKN)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

That means my team and I are pulling out all the stops to raise every last dollar, reach every undecided voter, and mobilize our supporters before time runs out.

This is the most intense phase of our campaign. The kind of outreach we’re doing takes serious resources, Peter.

And not only are we putting it all on the line to reach voters, but we ALSO have to contend with misinformation coming from our opponent’s Super PAC.

They’re spending seven figures on ads — and have already been caught engaging in shady, illegal tactics to mislead voters.

My team and I launched a must-hit $100,000 Mid-Month Goal to make sure we have the resources to mobilize Illinoisans and fight back.
