name: Geoff Duncan, Democrat for Georgia
subject: This is how we win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Duncan for Governor
body:
|
---

| | Hey everyone,

The first time I ran for office, I faced an entrenched incumbent. But I knocked on doors across the district so I could talk to voters face-to-face about my vision for change. _I won by just 55 votes._

**I know we can win this race the same way I won my first election: by making the case directly to voters that we need to change course. But I’ll be blunt. We don’t have much time, and every day counts.**

**_[I can’t win without your help. If you’re with me, will you make a quick donation today to my campaign to be Georgia’s next governor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125378806/601603230/985402107?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&refcode=EM_RTI_GD_20260214_FR_2H_T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA3MDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk1ZmMzNGItYjYwOS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jSM2bmPNlJ0b74O71AUYNB3K5hw5fn7gknWQ2dcpTLA=)_**

Ever since I announced my campaign, I’ve been traveling across the state to talk to Democrats, independents, and fed-up Republicans about how we can build a stronger future together.

I’ve met with small business owners -- the backbone of Georgia’s economy. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125378807/601603231/985402107?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_GD_20260214_FR_2H_T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA3MDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk1ZmMzNGItYjYwOS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jSM2bmPNlJ0b74O71AUYNB3K5hw5fn7gknWQ2dcpTLA=)
---
I’ve visited rural hospitals and heard from nurses how Donald Trump’s attacks on our healthcare system are hurting families.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125378808/601603232/985402107?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_GD_20260214_FR_2H_T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA3MDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk1ZmMzNGItYjYwOS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jSM2bmPNlJ0b74O71AUYNB3K5hw5fn7gknWQ2dcpTLA=)
---
I’ve met with faith leaders to discuss our shared hopes for Georgia.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125378809/601603233/985402107?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_GD_20260214_FR_2H_T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA3MDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk1ZmMzNGItYjYwOS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jSM2bmPNlJ0b74O71AUYNB3K5hw5fn7gknWQ2dcpTLA=)
---
**We’re building a grassroots campaign fueled by Georgians who believe in common-sense leadership -- and this is just the beginning.**

**_[I hope you’ll join me with a donation of $5, $10, or whatever you can give. When everyone pitches in, it goes a long way to help me continue meeting voters where they’re at.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125378810/601603234/985402107?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&refcode=EM_RTI_GD_20260214_FR_2H_T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA3MDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk1ZmMzNGItYjYwOS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jSM2bmPNlJ0b74O71AUYNB3K5hw5fn7gknWQ2dcpTLA=)_**

Together, we can build the biggest tent possible and defeat Trump’s MAGA party.

\-- Geoff

**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125378811/601603235/985402107?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&refcode=EM_RTI_GD_20260214_FR_2H_T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA3MDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTk1ZmMzNGItYjYwOS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jSM2bmPNlJ0b74O71AUYNB3K5hw5fn7gknWQ2dcpTLA=) **

name: Election Watch via Our Revolution
subject: BREAKING: Susan Collins just launched her re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34620?t=1011&refcode=email-20260214_v&akid=10226%2E5885482%2EX-Jcsp ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Republican Senator Susan Collins from Maine just kicked off her campaign
for a *sixth term* in office. And together we're going to finally unseat
her.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34620?source=email-20260214&t=1025&akid=10226%2E5885482%2EX-Jcsp ]Headline: Headline: Maine Republican senator Susan Collins launches
re-election bid for pivotal seat

Her seat is the tipping point for Democrats’ chances of taking back the
Senate and making Trump a lame duck. And so Collins and her billionaire
backers are gearing up for one of the hardest-fought races this cycle,
with a HUGE right-wing war chest being assembled to protect her.

That’s why Our Revolution is all-in for Graham Platner to run against her
– a bold, progressive champion ready to FIGHT for real change. Graham’s
running a people-powered campaign: no corporate PACs or dark money – and
we’re building the voter turnout operation to help make sure he wins the
Democratic primary *and* defeats Collins in the general.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34620?t=1021&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20260214nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10226%2E5885482%2EX-Jcsp ]It’s a crowded primary and we need to start organizing now. Can you rush a
$5, $10, or $27 donation right now to help unseat Susan Collins and take
back Congress from MAGA?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34620?source=email-20260214&t=1024&akid=10226%2E5885482%2EX-Jcsp ]Graham Platner graphic stating 'Nobody is coming to save us. We need to
organize, build power, and weild it to make change happen.'

Collins has a record of saying one thing in Maine, then voting with Trump
in D.C. She rubber-stamps court and cabinet picks who are greenlighting
authoritarianism, rolling back abortion rights, and gutting environmental
protections.

Graham Platner has the progressive vision to ignite the base and beat her,
but it’s a crowded primary. So here’s the plan: Our Revolution has 73,000
supporters on the ground in Maine, and we’re already hard at work training
organizers to mobilize voters with one-on-one conversations proven to
change people’s minds and turn people out.

Our goal is to reach EACH ONE of these essential voters with repeated
outreach to ensure they get to the polls. Because this isn’t just a chance
to flip a Senate seat – it’s a fight to take back power from Trump. And
we’re not stopping there – we’re mobilizing organizers across the country
to make sure progressives WIN up and down the ballot.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34620?t=1015&amount=22&refcode=email-20260214nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10226%2E5885482%2EX-Jcsp ]Every $1 you donate enables our volunteers to make SIX voter contacts. If
500 of us chip in $10 each today, that's enough for 30,000 voter
conversations. Will you help us fuel a people-powered movement to take
back power in these crucial midterm elections?

When we organize, we win.

clean_body: [ ]Our Revolution logo Peter Willis, Republican Senator Susan Collins from Maine just kicked off her campaign for a sixth term in office. And together we're going to finally unseat her. [ ]Headline: Headline: Maine Republican senator Susan Collins launches re-election bid for pivotal seat Her seat is the tipping point for Democrats’ chances of taking back the Senate and making Trump a lame duck. And so Collins and her billionaire backers are gearing up for one of the hardest-fought races this cycle, with a HUGE right-wing war chest being assembled to protect her. That’s why Our Revolution is all-in for Graham Platner to run against her – a bold, progressive champion ready to FIGHT for real change. Graham’s running a people-powered campaign: no corporate PACs or dark money – and we’re building the voter turnout operation to help make sure he wins the Democratic primary and defeats Collins in the general. [ ]It’s a crowded primary and we need to start organizing now. Can you rush a $5, $10, or $27 donation right now to help unseat Susan Collins and take back Congress from MAGA? [ ]Graham Platner graphic stating 'Nobody is coming to save us. We need to organize, build power, and weild it to make change happen.' Collins has a record of saying one thing in Maine, then voting with Trump in D.C. She rubber-stamps court and cabinet picks who are greenlighting authoritarianism, rolling back abortion rights, and gutting environmental protections. Graham Platner has the progressive vision to ignite the base and beat her, but it’s a crowded primary. So here’s the plan: Our Revolution has 73,000 supporters on the ground in Maine, and we’re already hard at work training organizers to mobilize voters with one-on-one conversations proven to change people’s minds and turn people out. Our goal is to reach EACH ONE of these essential voters with repeated outreach to ensure they get to the polls. Because this isn’t just a chance to flip a Senate seat – it’s a fight to take back power from Trump. And we’re not stopping there – we’re mobilizing organizers across the country to make sure progressives WIN up and down the ballot. [ ]Every $1 you donate enables our volunteers to make SIX voter contacts. If 500 of us chip in $10 each today, that's enough for 30,000 voter conversations. Will you help us fuel a people-powered movement to take back power in these crucial midterm elections? When we organize, we win. Peter, this is Felicia Blakely-Agostini, the new Executive Director at the Democratic Party of Georgia. I’m fired up to make real Democratic gains across the Peach State together. But before we can make those gains, I need your help. Tomorrow is the deadline for our $16,000 mid-month goal — **and we’re still short.** For years, Trump and his allies have targeted Georgia — trying to overturn our votes, spreading lies to undermine trust, and now working to seize control of our elections from the ground up. That’s why this deadline isn’t about hitting a fundraising target — it’s about building the defense we need to stop the Trump administration's attack on Georgia’s right to vote. We’re building a full-scale defense to protect our democracy. **_Your support directly funds:_**
* **Legal Action:** Challenging voter suppression in court.
* **Organizing:** Empowering voters by ensuring they know their rights.
* **Voter Protection:** Ensuring every Georgian can vote and be counted.

[But if we miss this goal, we cannot scale these efforts. We cannot leave our democracy undefended, Peter. Will you rush $10 before tomorrow's deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125380417/601608357/-951696519?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_021426_B1_MM3_D1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2ExMWZmOS1iNzA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DMVqYKjefR632Ao0DhUtz9sih0OWUQKktO6EwgOuxVg=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The Trump Administration’s economic policy is hollowing out the middle class, _because it’s designed to serve billionaires and Trump’s cronies_ — not folks like you. George is hard at work fighting back against the reckless MAGA agenda — but Republicans are targeting vulnerable Democrats across the country. So Peter, we need to meet each and every fundraising benchmark if we’re going to take back the House and hold Trump accountable. _Begin forwarded message from George Latimer:_
Peter, it's George Latimer.
During these past few months, I’ve heard the same stories from folks across Westchester and the Bronx: people are working hard to provide for their families, and doing everything right — but costs have skyrocketed and the bills can feel never ending.
So I was shocked when I heard Donald Trump’s latest message on affordability:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125380661/601608923/126481460?amount=10&source=GL_EM_FR_021426_B1_MM02&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTlhYzdmMWEtYjgwOS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3BcuaH4y_p5OTS8tZ6ZlSjcuzbM4XoQdnoP5XF_wK1I=)
In the midst of Trump’s affordability crisis — _caused by his administration's policies_ — he’s speaking out _against_ lowering the cost of housing. Peter, this is a slap in the face to every American struggling to keep the lights on, put food on the table, or pay for their medications.
I ran for Congress to focus on practical solutions — not ego-driven policies that leave working families holding the bag.
That’s why I’m fighting for lower costs, a stable trade policy that strengthens our economy without punishing consumers, and accountability in Washington so Republicans stop playing political games while folks are struggling to make ends meet.
**But the only way we can achieve these goals is to elect a Democratic majority in November.[We have a mid-month deadline coming up, and I need to know I can count on you. Will you chip in $10 right now to make sure I can keep fighting back against Trump’s agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125380663/601608925/126481460?amount=10&source=GL_EM_FR_021426_B1_MM02&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTlhYzdmMWEtYjgwOS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3BcuaH4y_p5OTS8tZ6ZlSjcuzbM4XoQdnoP5XF_wK1I=)**

clean_body: We can’t take this election for granted. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hey Peter, it’s the team here at Latimer HQ. We wanted to reach out and make sure you saw George’s email about Donald Trump’s comments on affordability. The Trump Administration’s economic policy is hollowing out the middle class, because it’s designed to serve billionaires and Trump’s cronies — not folks like you. George is hard at work fighting back against the reckless MAGA agenda — but Republicans are targeting vulnerable Democrats across the country. So Peter, we need to meet each and every fundraising benchmark if we’re going to take back the House and hold Trump accountable. The clock is ticking on our mid-February fundraising goal, and we know we can’t reach it without your help. George needs to raise $5,000 by tonight to ensure we’re prepared for the challenges that lie ahead. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, and please take a moment to read George’s original message below. Team Latimer Begin forwarded message from George Latimer: Peter, it's George Latimer. During these past few months, I’ve heard the same stories from folks across Westchester and the Bronx: people are working hard to provide for their families, and doing everything right — but costs have skyrocketed and the bills can feel never ending. So I was shocked when I heard Donald Trump’s latest message on affordability: = In the midst of Trump’s affordability crisis — caused by his administration's policies — he’s speaking out against lowering the cost of housing. Peter, this is a slap in the face to every American struggling to keep the lights on, put food on the table, or pay for their medications. I ran for Congress to focus on practical solutions — not ego-driven policies that leave working families holding the bag. That’s why I’m fighting for lower costs, a stable trade policy that strengthens our economy without punishing consumers, and accountability in Washington so Republicans stop playing political games while folks are struggling to make ends meet. But the only way we can achieve these goals is to elect a Democratic majority in November.= If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, George Latimer | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

name: Jim Taylor
subject: I get to see up close how deeply Chris cares about Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Hi there! I’m Jim, Chris’s husband. ❤️
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260214-1122&t=1&akid=1127%2E294397%2EmawVFI)
Hi there! I’m Jim, Chris’s husband. ❤️
Today is Valentine’s Day, which usually means flowers, chocolate, or maybe a lovely dinner together. And don’t get me wrong — we’ll still find a moment to celebrate.
But with Election Day less than two months away, this time of year looks a little different than most.
I get to see up close how deeply Chris cares about Wisconsin and how much heart she’s poured into this race. Watching her give so much of herself — day after day — makes me incredibly proud.
So today, I’m reaching out with a small Valentine’s ask. **Instead of roses or chocolates, the best Valentine’s gift Chris could get is knowing that people like you have her back in these final weeks.**
[**If you’re able, will you chip in $10 or whatever you can right now to fuel her campaign as we head into the final weeks?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260214_1_ak.ZwQRKn&amount=10&refcode=em20260214-1122&t=3&akid=1127%2E294397%2EmawVFI)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260214_1_ak.ZwQRKn&amount=10&refcode=em20260214-1122&t=22&akid=1127%2E294397%2EmawVFI)**
Thank you for standing with Chris and our family. It means the world to us.
With gratitude,
Jim
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260214_1_ak.ZwQRKn&amount=10&refcode=em20260214-1122&t=23&akid=1127%2E294397%2EmawVFI)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20260214-1122&t=24&refcode2=1127_294397_mawVFI&akid=1127%2E294397%2EmawVFI)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=1127%2E294397%2EmawVFI)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1127%2E294397%2EmawVFI)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)

PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701

name: *Not* seeking arrangements
subject: This Democrat doesn’t need a sugar daddy
body:
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017O8BeJ-IrXMNGnSLv7ZWJucxZMEZ0tcTZi_cpv-pkvSORCvIO7E5m-VtMZkKCtp-DxLcESc6d3zrPremtB2J3TVtlLfYcCjRBmc608YWwkPJE_q2yXLEIiBRRcURFuwJCCYXgMzkbb90AXiCppH1gZq9uDNrd4kl-Pon4PmGEb5MlTKk68jlKnz7kROoxidyGud_KSBwah0mgWcp6JeyWiTEMYmbs_gl&c=SeYZ5pz8fUntU4uc_7XBHacFM0G6ojmxzRpmG_gAkXiNL_U0ZJhUyA==&ch=AL3duCTpfizvo5ddwAHHRAglnPw-CAktXjF3EBFljTTsfHvzqT9jhA==)
---
|
Peter,
Running a congressional campaign as a young, progressive Democrat is hard. Really hard. That's why what Bushra Amiwala is doing in Chicago should be on the radar of Democrats everywhere.
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017O8BeJ-IrXMNGnSLv7ZWJucxZMEZ0tcTZi_cpv-pkvSORCvIO7E5m-VtMZkKCtp-DxLcESc6d3zrPremtB2J3TVtlLfYcCjRBmc608YWwkPJE_q2yXLEIiBRRcURFuwJCCYXgMzkbb90AXiCppH1gZq9uDNrd4kl-Pon4PmGEb5MlTKk68jlKnz7kROoxidyGud_KSBwah13L71CBU4pPAjSEn2iBgd1&c=SeYZ5pz8fUntU4uc_7XBHacFM0G6ojmxzRpmG_gAkXiNL_U0ZJhUyA==&ch=AL3duCTpfizvo5ddwAHHRAglnPw-CAktXjF3EBFljTTsfHvzqT9jhA==)
---
| Bushra is a 28-year-old elected official, organizer, and activist, who has been showing up for her community and earning its trust for the past decade. That's why her movement has gained so much momentum already, making her the frontrunner to be the next Congresswoman for IL-09.
Congressional campaigns operate at a massive scale. Field programs. Digital. Mail. Polling. Communications. None of it is cheap. That is exactly why you don't see many young Democrats like Bushra even try to run, let alone win.
It's also why you see so many politicians are seeking arrangements to sell their souls to the highest bidder in return for campaign cash.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017O8BeJ-IrXMNGnSLv7ZWJucxZMEZ0tcTZi_cpv-pkvSORCvIO7E5m-VtMZkKCtp-DxLcESc6d3zrPremtB2J3TVtlLfYcCjRBmc608YWwkPJE_q2yXLEIiBRRcURFuwJCCYXgMzkbb90AXiCppH1gZq9uDNrd4kl-Pon4PmGEb5MlTKk68jlKnz7kROoxidyGud_KSBwah0ba9uxmo3ZSGO_wN-41KkR&c=SeYZ5pz8fUntU4uc_7XBHacFM0G6ojmxzRpmG_gAkXiNL_U0ZJhUyA==&ch=AL3duCTpfizvo5ddwAHHRAglnPw-CAktXjF3EBFljTTsfHvzqT9jhA==)
---

But Bushra refuses to sell out (and they've tried). While the old guard chases corporate money and special interest checks from their billionaire sugar daddies, Bushra is choosing to raise money directly from the people--$25, $10, and even $5 at a time.
That keeps her independent. That lets Bushra be Bushra. And it allows her to make decisions with only one goal in mind: serving her community.

### Why Mississippi Should Follow Oklahoma's Lead on Suppressors
| | [Dana Criswell](https://substack.com/@danacriswell)
---
| Feb 14
---
| [](https://substack.com/@danacriswell)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=187700398&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg3NzAwMzk4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3MTA4MzQwMywiZXhwIjoxNzczNjc1NDAzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTUyNjc4MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Khcf5ALfaieQ5VE_qTHrQxqKgfA6ddXWS6oT2Orwgx0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ba24742-9ffd-4d71-8ac4-65c0227de8d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As a Mississippian watching what Oklahoma is doing with SB463, I cannot help but ask: why do we not have this kind of commonsense reform here at home?
For many Mississippians, the phrase "firearm suppressor" still brings to mind Hollywood myths about silent assassins and spy thrillers. In reality, suppressors are nothing like that. They are safety devices--more like ear protection for your firearm than anything out of a movie. That is why Oklahoma's Sportsman Hearing Protection Act is such a smart move, and why Mississippi should follow suit.
SB463 does something simple and practical: it clearly defines how firearm suppressors can be lawfully manufactured in Oklahoma under state law. It provides a straightforward legal framework so that law-abiding citizens and local businesses understand the rules, can comply with them, and can operate without fear of vague or arbitrary interference. It even carries an emergency designation, recognizing that protecting constitutional rights and supporting lawful enterprise should not be delayed.
In plain terms, suppressors do not make guns "silent." They reduce the sharp, damaging blast of a firearm to a safer level--less likely to cause permanent hearing loss and less disruptive to neighbors, livestock, and rural communities. Here in Mississippi, hunters, farmers, and landowners know exactly what that blast can do. Many have skipped ear protection in order to hear approaching game or communicate in the field, only to deal later with ringing ears and irreversible hearing damage.
Why should the law treat basic safety equipment as something sinister?
By clarifying lawful suppressor manufacturing, Oklahoma is advancing two principles Mississippi ought to embrace.
First, it affirms that responsible adults have the right to choose safe, lawful equipment for their firearms. The Second Amendment is not just about owning a firearm in theory--it is about being able to use it responsibly for hunting, sport shooting, self-defense, and protecting property. When government layers on confusing, overlapping restrictions around a simple safety device, it burdens that practical right. Oklahoma's bill recognizes suppressors for what they are: legitimate tools for responsible gun owners, not an excuse for more red tape.
Second, it supports local industry and economic freedom. Mississippi is home to skilled machinists, manufacturers, and small businesses that could compete in this space. But unclear or overly restrictive laws discourage investment and innovation. By setting clear guardrails, Oklahoma is giving its entrepreneurs confidence to build, hire, and grow within the state. That is how limited government and free enterprise are supposed to work: establish reasonable boundaries and then get out of the way.
Critics often assume that anything related to firearms automatically increases danger. The facts do not bear that out. Suppressors do not make firearms more lethal; they simply reduce noise and protect hearing. In many countries with far stricter gun laws than ours, suppressors are treated as ordinary safety equipment and even as a courtesy to neighbors.
At its core, Oklahoma's approach is about trusting law-abiding citizens more than bureaucracies. It protects constitutional rights, encourages small-business growth, and keeps government focused where it belongs--on punishing crime rather than regulating responsible conduct.
Mississippi lawmakers should take note. We value our hunting heritage, our rural way of life, and our constitutional freedoms. A clear, pro-safety, pro-business framework for suppressors would reflect those values. Protecting both liberty and hearing should not be controversial--it is simply common sense for Mississippi.
**Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi**

Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Dana Criswell Mississippi ? ?

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: “A more perfect Union”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
On this day, 114 years ago, Arizona was admitted to that union.
#

Friends,
Our founders wrote the Constitution with a purpose: “to form a more perfect Union.”
And on this day, 114 years ago, Arizona was admitted to that union.
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=.0B8tYu&refcode=em260214-1&t=1&akid=6369%2E6688874%2ER4CHoY)
This country has never been perfect, but the reward of perfection comes in its pursuit. This year marks 250 years of Americans from all backgrounds coming together to strive for a better life for themselves and their children. It marks 114 years of Arizona, a place imbued with the spirit of American independence but built through generations of cooperation and community.
These anniversaries are a reminder that there is no limit to what we can do when we put aside our differences and embrace the things we share.
Mark has served this country since he was 22 years old. He is proud to serve the people of Arizona in the United States Senate. And it is one of the greatest honors of his life that you have chosen to support him in that work.
We hope you’ll join Mark in celebrating the 114th anniversary of the founding of Arizona, and in working towards many more in the years to come.
Thank you,
Team Kelly
**[ADD YOUR NAME
ENDORSE MARK KELLY](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-feb26-endorse?source=em260214-1&akid=6369%2E6688874%2ER4CHoY)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=6369%2E6688874%2ER4CHoY).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. | | **House GOP passes sweeping anti-voting bill that could disenfranchise millions, sends measure to Senate**
_—Democracy Docket_ We don’t have much time. Just a few days ago, the U.S. House of Representatives voted to pass the SAVE Act, a sweeping voter suppression bill backed by Donald Trump that could block tens of millions of Americans from voting. The bill will head to the U.S. Senate next. Donald Trump is lighting a fire under Senate Republicans to pass this voter suppression bill with measures that one historian called **“the most extraordinary attack on voting rights in American history” and “an attempt to destroy American democracy as we know it.”** The so-called SAVE Act could block tens of millions of eligible American voters from casting their ballots. It’s a modern-day poll tax that would force people to show expensive government documents in person before registering to vote — documents that 21 million Americans do not have easy access to. **We’re fighting to stop the SAVE Act by mobilizing people in key states to contact their Senators. We’re raising the alarm about the harm this bill would do to our democracy. And we’re working to make sure voters have the information they need to participate in free and fair elections.** [**But we count on strong grassroots support to drive this work forward. Please rush a donation today as Trump goes full speed ahead to get this voter suppression bill through Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125382722/601615676/-1792285512?refcode=emm_ffa_20260214_T1_SAVEActNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDA2OWUyZi1iYjA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Szl7S77Mrffwboe6dl_vCJrLLn35jcQIwrMiUDyTNj4=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125382723/601615677/1336426399?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=emm_ffa_20260214_T1_SAVEActNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDA2OWUyZi1iYjA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Szl7S77Mrffwboe6dl_vCJrLLn35jcQIwrMiUDyTNj4=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125382724/601615678/1336426399?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=emm_ffa_20260214_T1_SAVEActNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDA2OWUyZi1iYjA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Szl7S77Mrffwboe6dl_vCJrLLn35jcQIwrMiUDyTNj4=)

We should all have an equal say in our democracy, but anti-voter laws limit whose voice gets heard in elections.
The SAVE Act would put particular burdens on working-class Americans, communities of color, military voters, tribal citizens, rural Americans, survivors of natural disasters, and tens of millions of married women who’ve changed their names.
It could also enable future voter purges, which are notorious for removing eligible Americans from the rolls.
And Senate Republicans are so eager to pass this anti-voter bill that they’re scheming about changing the filibuster rules — which could allow them to ram through this legislation on a party-line vote.
By passing laws that place new obstacles between voters and the ballot box, extreme lawmakers think they can shield themselves from accountability.
They think they can give themselves free rein to enact radical, unpopular policies — like more tax breaks for billionaires and more health care cuts for working people — without worrying about fair competition in fair elections.
**But we’re fighting to stop their voter suppression. And activists like you have the power to help defend the freedom to vote from anti-democracy forces.**
[**Make a donation today to help block anti-voter bills like the SAVE Act and help grow our movement for free and fair elections.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125382729/601615683/-1792285512?refcode=emm_ffa_20260214_T1_SAVEActNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDA2OWUyZi1iYjA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Szl7S77Mrffwboe6dl_vCJrLLn35jcQIwrMiUDyTNj4=)
In solidarity,
The Fair Fight Action Team

**P.S. Senators are still making up their minds, and they need to hear from you — constituent voices go a long way to show where the public stands on critical issues. Contact your Senators by calling the switchboard at (202) 224-3121 and demand that they oppose the SAVE Act.**

body:
Here’s exactly what your grassroots support makes possible.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125382749/601615734/1328794144?refcode=ea.facf450f-ba09-f111-832e-0022482a9733&ms=ea.facf450f-ba09-f111-832e-0022482a9733&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhY2Y0NTBmLWJhMDktZjExMS04MzJlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTczMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HMRDVi1l4iFLohTGFwKjaSGKFcTduLL62XwzoZfRlfw=&emci=f6a8c3f0-5308-f111-832e-0022482a9733&emdi=facf450f-ba09-f111-832e-0022482a9733&ceid=4823105)

| Friend — **[Before we ask you to make your first donation of 2026 ahead of our critical mid-month deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125382750/601615741/2105508926?refcode=ea.facf450f-ba09-f111-832e-0022482a9733&ms=ea.facf450f-ba09-f111-832e-0022482a9733&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhY2Y0NTBmLWJhMDktZjExMS04MzJlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTczMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HMRDVi1l4iFLohTGFwKjaSGKFcTduLL62XwzoZfRlfw=)** , we want to be clear about exactly what your support makes possible and why we’re counting on your help _today._ As you read this message, our team is making strategic decisions that will shape the fight for the House this November – and whether we can execute them depends on what we raise during quiet months like February, when most people aren’t paying attention. We’re determining: _→ Which candidates in competitive districts to endorse
→ Where early investments can put vulnerable Republican seats in play
→ Which primaries could send even more climate champions to Congress_ Why does this matter? Because we’re just **three seats away** from flipping the House. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125382751/601615748/2105508926?refcode=ea.facf450f-ba09-f111-832e-0022482a9733&ms=ea.facf450f-ba09-f111-832e-0022482a9733&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhY2Y0NTBmLWJhMDktZjExMS04MzJlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTczMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HMRDVi1l4iFLohTGFwKjaSGKFcTduLL62XwzoZfRlfw=) Think about it. Three seats stand between Trump's unchecked, authoritarian agenda and _real_ accountability. We’re doing everything in our power to build a firewall of climate champions in Congress who will stand up to Trump and Big Oil, but building that firewall requires early investments in the right races. That’s where your grassroots support comes in. **[We need to raise $20,000 in grassroots donations before 11:59 pm tomorrow to fund these early strategic investments and give our endorsed candidates the resources they need to compete and win. clean_body: Here’s exactly what your grassroots support makes possible. | | Friend — = , we want to be clear about exactly what your support makes possible and why we’re counting on your help today. As you read this message, our team is making strategic decisions that will shape the fight for the House this November – and whether we can execute them depends on what we raise during quiet months like February, when most people aren’t paying attention. We’re determining: → Which candidates in competitive districts to endorse → Where early investments can put vulnerable Republican seats in play → Which primaries could send even more climate champions to Congress Why does this matter? Because we’re just three seats away from flipping the House. = Think about it. Three seats stand between Trump's unchecked, authoritarian agenda and real accountability. We’re doing everything in our power to build a firewall of climate champions in Congress who will stand up to Trump and Big Oil, but building that firewall requires early investments in the right races. That’s where your grassroots support comes in. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = – Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Justice Democrats
subject: Let’s give AIPAC another loss next month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

AIPAC thinks it can fill retiring Rep. Jan Schakowsky’s U.S. House seat
with a Democrat who will keep unconditionally supporting and arming
Israel’s genocide in Gaza.

Working-class progressive Kat Abughazaleh is running to stop them, and
she’s our twelfth primary endorsement of the 2026 election cycle.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260214-ka.b9TNYi&refcode=em20260214-37467&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37467%2E1203867%2EaNqy5a ]Tweet by Akela Lacy: EXCLUSIVE: Justice Democrats & the new PAL PAC are
endorsing Kat Abughazaleh in IL-09. This comes as AIPAC is flooding IL
with cash to influence four upcoming races. Abughazaleh is JD’s 12th
endorsement this cycle & PAL PAC’s first insurgent candidate.

Illinois is one of AIPAC’s top targets this year.

Though they haven’t officially endorsed a candidate in this race, The
Intercept reports their donors have flooded one of Kat’s opponents with
fundraising support, and they are suspected of sneakily dropping almost
half a million dollars on ads through a brand new shell PAC called “Elect
Chicago Women.”

As Kat has pointed out, “AIPAC is so toxic that they have been doing
everything they can to pretend that they are not in our race when they
very clearly are.” But now more than ever, voters “understand the stakes,
and they’re sick of their tax dollars being used to commit crimes against
humanity.”

AIPAC experienced a surprise upset in their first primary fight in New
Jersey this month — let’s give them another loss on March 17th in IL-09.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260214-ka.b9TNYi&refcode=em20260214-37467&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=37467%2E1203867%2EaNqy5a ]Fuel Kat’s campaign and Justice Democrats in these final weeks before
her heated primary: pitch in ANY amount to help us defeat AIPAC and elect
a Democrat who has the moral clarity to oppose bottomless budgets for
Israel’s ethnic cleansing.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260214-ka.b9TNYi&refcode=em20260214-37467&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37467%2E1203867%2EaNqy5a ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260214-37467-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37467_1203867_aNqy5a&akid=37467%2E1203867%2EaNqy5a

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37467%2E1203867%2EaNqy5a

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster, PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: DNC HQ
subject: 60 seconds — that’s it
body:
---
Hi Derek, We’ll keep this brief: In less than 60 seconds, we’re going to ask you to make a donation to the DNC. [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?refcode=em_20260214_6107_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6107_22930333_o5gv_k&akid=6107%2E22930333%2Eo5gv_k) Not tomorrow, not next week, but _today._ Here’s the deal: The midterms are approaching quickly. The _only_ way we can bring Trump’s agenda to a grinding halt is by taking back Congress. But, to do it, we’ll need a huge sum of resources to scale up our voter outreach efforts. Your contribution today will help us:
* Register thousands of Democratic voters across the country.
* Support local and state parties by moving resources where they’re needed, and when they’re needed most.

[**The earlier we’re able to make these strategic investments, the better our odds of reclaiming Congress this year. Chip in $7, or whatever is meaningful to you, to join the thousands of other Democrats chipping in today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260214_6107_fr&refcode2=6107_22930333_o5gv_k&akid=6107%2E22930333%2Eo5gv_k) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260214_6107_fr&refcode2=6107_22930333_o5gv_k&akid=6107%2E22930333%2Eo5gv_k)**

Please give what you can to Laura’s campaign today. **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125383376/601617470/798536563?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2026-02-14_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTAxY2QyOS1iYzA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=surQrYqGtu6sCX9Pe1FdWvnnrXHmpzdnBToUho7Inbc=)

* * *
**The Big Picture**

Across the country, Democrats are gaining momentum. Last year's recent elections in New Jersey and Virginia showed that voters are rejecting extremism and chaos.

But here on Long Island, the trend is moving in the opposite direction. Republicans are gaining ground locally, and national GOP operatives see flipping this district as one of their best opportunities to hold the House.

**Where Things Stand**
* **Republican Fundraising Advantage:** Trump and national Republicans have built a record-shattering war chest. For the first time in years, Democrats are being outraised.

* **Relentless GOP Attack Ads:** Republican super PACs are already running negative ads in our district, trying to distort Laura’s record and weaken her standing early.

* **Rising GOP Strength on Long Island:** While Democrats have seen strong results nationally, local Republican gains show this race will be harder than ever to hold.

**What's At Stake**

If Republicans flip this seat, they’ll have an even stronger grip on the House and a clearer path to push their extreme agenda. But if we hold it, Democrats are one step closer to taking back the House — and exposing the corruption, chaos, and abuses of power that have defined this Republican Congress.

**What Laura Needs**

We’re building the infrastructure now to win this year, but it’s going to take consistent support to stay competitive. The next few months are critical to:
* Fund our field and voter contact programs

* Counter GOP attack ads already running in the district

* Build the early resources needed to compete against national Republican spending

* * *
We can’t afford to miss a single fundraising goal when so much is at stake.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Disturbing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Please stick with me for a minute:

This is a deeply disturbing time in our country. Please stick with me for a minute:
1. Trump and his allies are **sending costs for working families through the roof** and ripping away the affordable health care that they rely on.
2. Trump’s DHS Secretary Kristi Noem is sending lawless **ICE agents into our communities** and tearing families apart.
3. **Trump’s Republican majorities are rubber-stamping every part of his reckless agenda.**

The 2026 elections are our opportunity to put a check on Trump’s power by taking back the Senate, before he continues to run our country into the ground. [**_Will you please pitch in anything you can to take back the Senate?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125383514/601617958/-671935818?amount=1&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.14_Disturbing_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjAxY2QyOS1iYzA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fJWcnmbF8NtnRTmL4NCkmmNNo-GZLOx_Qe-DZtDm2G0=)

The future of our country rests on whether Democrats win or lose the midterms.

The GOP has already dropped tens of millions of dollars in attack ads into states like Georgia and Texas to undermine Democrats’ chances of reclaiming our Senate majority.

They have a rolodex of billionaire donors. We have YOU.

It’s going to take every single one of us pitching in when we can in order to win back our Senate majority — and take back our country from these extremists. [**_Before our mid-February deadline tomorrow, I’m asking you to please contribute anything you can to our fight to take back the Senate. clean_body: Please stick with me for a minute: This is a deeply disturbing time in our country. Please stick with me for a minute: 1. Trump and his allies are sending costs for working families through the roof and ripping away the affordable health care that they rely on. 2. Trump’s DHS Secretary Kristi Noem is sending lawless ICE agents into our communities and tearing families apart. 3. Trump’s Republican majorities are rubber-stamping every part of his reckless agenda. The 2026 elections are our opportunity to put a check on Trump’s power by taking back the Senate, before he continues to run our country into the ground. = The future of our country rests on whether Democrats win or lose the midterms. The GOP has already dropped tens of millions of dollars in attack ads into states like Georgia and Texas to undermine Democrats’ chances of reclaiming our Senate majority. They have a rolodex of billionaire donors. We have YOU. It’s going to take every single one of us pitching in when we can in order to win back our Senate majority — and take back our country from these extremists. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = With every good wish, Maggie Hassan = If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Team Ilhan
subject: Trump is a tax-avoiding, insurrection-leading, Constitution-defying, crypto-scamming, pedophile-protecting president
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2084%2E791427%2EQdGbLu)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb26.5-Kap5&refcode=em260214-1-180&t=2&akid=2084%2E791427%2EQdGbLu)
Friend, if our justice system was operating fairly, Trump wouldn’t be president — he’d be behind bars.
The US has more people in prison than any other country on earth. Folks who lost the best years of their lives for having a little marijuana on them. Kids who were sentenced to be locked away for years without a second chance. People who were left behind by a system that sees mostly Black, Brown, and low-income people put in jail cells.
But if you’re a wealthy, tax-avoiding, insurrection-leading, Constitution-defying, crypto-scamming, pedophile-protecting president like Donald Trump, you get off scot-free. **It’s a miscarriage of justice.**
Ilhan Omar is fighting for reelection and working to build our progressive power so we can win a majority in Congress and go on offense against this lawless administration.
That means using the power of the legislative branch to put a check on our criminal president and investigate his corruption with real consequences on the table.
**[If you can, chip in $10 today and help Ilhan Omar lead the movement for accountability and equal justice under the law. We’ve seen what happens when we let Trump and MAGA get away with their lawless behavior. It’s time for Democrats to do the right thing and ensure real justice.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb26.5-Kap5&refcode=em260214-1-180&t=3&akid=2084%2E791427%2EQdGbLu)

name: Jason Crow
subject: Trump’s DOJ tried to indict me. They failed.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
| | **Donald Trump’s Department of Justice just tried — and failed — to indict me in front of a grand jury. ** This is all retribution, friend. This abuse of power is chilling and wrong. Trump is weaponizing the justice system and going after his political opponents, or any American who dares speak out against him. None of us want to live in a country where the President can abuse his powers to attack free speech rights and go after their perceived enemies. I took an oath to defend the Constitution as a paratrooper, Army Ranger, and now Member of Congress. I’ve dedicated my life to defending our democracy and the nation I love, and nothing Trump does will stop that. **[With Trump’s DOJ coming after me, will you split a contribution between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us keep fighting to defend our democracy and our Constitution?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125383704/601618529/-1841405370?refcode=260214_jc_split_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjg1NzU5Mi1iYzA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZdxM36xIc6J_g5rgt2PUMcgyZyCyJ2GC8Sti_3vAmgU=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125383713/601618539/-1841405370?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=260214_jc_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjg1NzU5Mi1iYzA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZdxM36xIc6J_g5rgt2PUMcgyZyCyJ2GC8Sti_3vAmgU=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125383714/601618541/-1841405370?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=260214_jc_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjg1NzU5Mi1iYzA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZdxM36xIc6J_g5rgt2PUMcgyZyCyJ2GC8Sti_3vAmgU=)

name: Michigan COV
subject: Momentum Is Building – Petitions Due Feb. 25 and We’re Making Headlines
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/263a8bc50616/breaking-news-citizens-only-voting-amendment-submitted-to-board-of-canvassers-8371450?e=ecf60db114)
---
[|
---](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=c9c8f2242a&e=ecf60db114)
| | | | | [DONATE TODAY](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=fc47c2b712&e=ecf60db114)
---
|
---
| |

Good morning!
We are excited to share several important campaign updates as we head into a critical stretch for the Citizen Only Voting Michigan effort. Thanks to your hard work and commitment, we are nearing turn in time and the momentum is undeniable.
First and most urgent, we need all signed petitions returned as soon as possible. To ensure every signature counts, please have all petitions back to us no later than February 25.
A few very important reminders to protect the validity of your petitions:
• Please return ALL pages. Do not detach anything.
• Each petition sheet must include voters from only one county.
• Be sure to sign and date the circulator box only after you are completely done collecting all signatures you plan to collect on that sheet.
• Mail petitions so that we receive them by February 25 to:
620 N. Kane Road
Webberville, MI 48892
If you have any questions, please email [info@michcov.com](mailto:info@michcov.com). We are always happy to help.
Second, we need your engagement on an important development in Detroit. The Detroit City Council is considering a resolution to oppose the Citizen Only Voting amendment. This is a common sense proposal, and it is critical that supporters make their voices heard.
The City Council meeting will take place on Tuesday, February 17 at 10:00 a.m. at the Coleman A. Young Municipal Center, 2 Woodward Avenue in Detroit. If you are able, we strongly encourage you to attend and submit public comment in support of our effort.
If you cannot attend in person, you can still show your support by emailing [citycouncil@detroitmi.gov](mailto:citycouncil@detroitmi.gov). Please clearly state your name, address, and the agenda item or topic you are addressing.
You may also participate Tuesday online using this link:
[https://detroitmi.gov/Online-CC-Meeting](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=6beda342d5&e=ecf60db114)
Finally, in case you missed it, our campaign is getting attention across the state and region. Recent coverage highlights the strength of this grassroots effort and the growing support for ensuring that only U.S. citizens vote in Michigan elections.
The Midwesterner recently [reported on our progress toward the 2026 ballot](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=b55f0ddf03&e=ecf60db114), underscoring the incredible work of volunteers across Michigan and the momentum behind this initiative. Michigan News Source also covered the broader national conversation and [pointed to Michigan as a leader](https://michcov.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=12ae025e5876fdceb812e1ab0&id=69b701e9fe&e=ecf60db114) taking action to safeguard election integrity.
This kind of coverage matters, and it is happening because of you.
We are in a crucial moment. Every petition returned and every voice raised right now helps ensure a strong finish. Let’s keep the energy high and finish strong together. Thank you for all you are doing to protect election integrity in Michigan.
With gratitude and excitement,Citizen Only Voting Michigan

---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Our plan:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
A bold, aggressive strategic plan to end Trump's Senate majority...
| | | It's Senator Schiff.

When I first became a DSCC Vice Chair, we promised a bold, aggressive strategic plan to _end_ Trump's Senate majority. Not long ago, our team unveiled that plan -- and it's a simple one:

**Defend Georgia, Michigan, and New Hampshire** \-- our three most endangered Democratic seats.

**Flip 4 out of 6 Republican ‐held seats** among Alaska, Iowa, Maine, North Carolina, Ohio, and Texas.

In other words, if we hold our own seats and win just **_one better than break ‐even_** among the most vulnerable Republican‐held seats... **we flip the Senate.**

I don't want to make it sound easy, because it's not. But it is _essential_ if we ever want to put a real check on Donald Trump.

**As a Vice Chair of the DSCC, I'm confident this is the plan that will win a Democratic Senate, rein in Trump and his out ‐of‐control administration, and give us the best chance of still having a Democracy when Trump is long gone. Now we need your help to put this plan into action. **

**[If you believe in the power of this grassroots team, please pitch in $5 to the DSCC TODAY to flip the four out of six seats we need to flip the Senate blue. The election year is here, and we can't waste a single minute >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/22370?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20260214-AdamSchiff-ViceChairsBGMap1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260214-AdamSchiff-ViceChairsBGMap1-Pros-sl1&akid=22739%2E9716520%2EoWk58P)**

subject: Right now, I am madder than a wet hen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/9a0g5v2E06Vuwnh5IhJdAPUkbx3gup1YLcDgLaIp1lubXjdLqH5mtPjXX0fJvVPp9za9VR8tDhC5malbD2qwrsNP5u-Y5x4Z72V-p_OhGzjbdMwTwLDmGho2pioLx3V8J3jq91wsciFP1FDbg2JrFIx18Kx1V8AcRmR_ckrN240Xixa0oGxRCktLJuW6qBkjyuYn0E7Od2clluOTl0xh8ZnWLDf4VkXNxiJDHIuM0bFU9sLj_WbIhZZVIGRBgyApkOPKClt2ijZqAZe8_s7rwF8E7H2fWLjAJpmgj1wnubT4Tz7T_tAELjGArxoRZhtX_OOwnT5hwHlU4hVleHtxLLDs3G8aszhTo0ddWYzec8Z4bRFxsytxQtCWJoPeKGjj5Y8IrFSTt-u2ZAzrJyUhPds3V_U9v-qqCCiMMnLMlno1-ZxoqxEIoAuaaDCpK1CZjgThfR14eiwjI9alBx-8eesmExJk-v8dFQKRc0K_f15oWbKiyVhoAid5Gp8oT2nF-b9wBn5Kdwj2PL23BrmGOqYclwbVw2bXenLr0urp5_DYlSkXibWzdX2z8j-2hyyWqb-AQPL9xjHGuROazLv0bbeB5McJUHmTcmPDb_kjxOXW5H9wD4LD1Yf9vWFSK4yB53wld1rCQf5yHc8OR7pylmqc0APANUOzi1fPgOGvJAxVgdIgn7pjhgRTrLRuRZyTflnfIJlOjcjvBcLcAtxUvh2HVW1V-qGHWhwCfUkZudFooyorPrKKgH3w5LAdYYs9STjVDdW2CTjQxbmDEZFU5RBJwuyLtFspRxLbM7haEns4-HIe2lQTGU-kdPW2UqYl8a8W7hFD1p2ZX_LywA/WFu1XwvUJ-GSAfSNwW3Ch3VNxrTuHjTR/17)The way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack.
This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior.
Whether it's...

* Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory
* Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement
* Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities

It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING.
_But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place._
Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact.
After seeing that, I knew I had to step in.
**_[So my good friend Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I got to talking. clean_body: way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack. This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior. Whether it's... Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING. But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place. Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact. After seeing that, I knew I had to step in. Do you reckon you could be one of those Conservatives? we all step up and work together I think we'll be able to keep these Democrats at bay and continue to deliver wins for good, hard workin' Americans. But I can 't do it without you, Peter. Thanks for hearing me out, John N. Kennedy + top Conservative leaders at the heart of our MAGA Movement have reached out with GRAVE WARNINGS on the state of the Midterms like NEVER BEFORE... Democrat controlled House would be the worst-case scenario for the MAGA Movement. One thing I _don’t_ love? Billionaire donors setting politicians’ agendas. **This campaign will never break your trust by prioritizing those who are already the wealthiest and most powerful among us.**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I love Colorado
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
I’m proud to represent our state in DC and fight for the things we all hold dear

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125385998/601625988/-1473932214?refcode=logo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTBmZmIzZS1iZTA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QNhIACZIJwEtE9pztC3yFXCR4JQtSOBYbgx8rNNbDo=) There are a lot of things I love: spending time with Robin, Teddy, and Jack, a good hike, a cool, fresh beer after a long week, playing the banjo, and of course... **Colorado!** I love our great outdoors, craft beers, beloved sports teams, and the people. I’m proud to represent our state in DC and fight for the things we all hold dear: our families, our communities, our small businesses, our public lands, and much more. In the Senate, we’re focused on putting Colorado first. That’s why we’ve worked to lower prescription drug prices, fight climate change, and protect health care — and we’re ready to continue fighting for working folks in Washington every single day. But the truth is, I’m one of the only first-term Senate Democrats up for re-election this year, and there’s _zero path_ for us to take back the Senate without this seat. **Trump and the GOP would LOVE to flip Colorado back to red and tighten their grip on Washington — but we’re not going to let that happen.** **_[If you love Colorado as much as I do, I’m humbly asking you to chip in today to help us defend this seat and keep pushing for real results for our state. clean_body: I’m proud to represent our state in DC and fight for the things we all hold dear = There are a lot of things I love: spending time with Robin, Teddy, and Jack, a good hike, a cool, fresh beer after a long week, playing the banjo, and of course... Colorado! I love our great outdoors, craft beers, beloved sports teams, and the people. I’m proud to represent our state in DC and fight for the things we all hold dear: our families, our communities, our small businesses, our public lands, and much more. In the Senate, we’re focused on putting Colorado first. That’s why we’ve worked to lower prescription drug prices, fight climate change, and protect health care — and we’re ready to continue fighting for working folks in Washington every single day. But the truth is, I’m one of the only first-term Senate Democrats up for re-election this year, and there’s zero path for us to take back the Senate without this seat. name: Demand Justice PAC
subject: Citizens United: Worst. Decision. Ever. →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260214-61171&t=1001&akid=61171%2E1407376%2E0Zd9MH ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260214-61171&t=1002&akid=61171%2E1407376%2E0Zd9MH ]Demand Justice PAC

Sixteen years ago, the Supreme Court handed corporations a blank check in
Citizens United — and our democracy has been paying the price ever since.

That one decision opened the floodgates to unlimited corporate cash,
drowning out everyday people and rigging the system for billionaires and
special interests.

Corporations pad their profits. Lobbyists write the rules. And the
guardrails meant to protect the public interest are deliberately torn
down.

Now, the damage is spreading to the courts.

Donald Trump and his allies are working overtime to stack the federal
bench with loyalists who put politics, power, and corporate donors ahead
of the rule of law. These judges are the downstream consequence of
Citizens United: a captured system that rewards self-dealing and punishes
accountability.

Demand Justice PAC refuses to accept courts that serve the ultra-wealthy
instead of the Constitution.

We’re fighting for independent courts, holding senators in both parties
accountable for confirming dangerous nominees, and building a movement to
restore the rule of law in America.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260214.GliKZK&refcode=em20260214-61171&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61171%2E1407376%2E0Zd9MH ]If you’re furious about what Citizens United has done to this country —
and determined to take our democracy back — chip in $5
today to fuel this fight.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260214.GliKZK&amount=5&refcode=em20260214-61171&t=1022&akid=61171%2E1407376%2E0Zd9MH ]Donate $5 ››

# _Forget the middle man._

I wanted you to hear this **DIRECTLY** from me!
[RESPOND TO TRUMP](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ce9ebc53224a4110bb8e8301573c7e89&_e=pISel8FdVD04kvtVpOqeCeX9qnRwW3K81fhOTPlb7Gwqye3AgTTsJ8bpiBxmHkzTAXGJJYt5xndlRVY_1OYrX7AP9qESBX8Ni1_4jV15xBlnFAt0Utv3rsgcRyQ1lX_dNcunpdTxmnKH7VAMmsdnv8MLBlfEOOmAdHrWZ11Rge9WztiP9IaDrKHf-GvScw_DVTgRznGGWq9amkEr_eWFrk09ys4r5zT0E9mV4QHCZCaR8FP4E2wCF35KJ4N1BRkwaSsYQQaUrbjUIgKcG13l4-DCpiXhpkQQOEuuKa2DnfQ6ctEuoq8e9Rj6dnq2YQ2lMTO0M5o6RdW50NLYAlrlUvAdAR-Y2jYTMw_iOMxR5rAQhcaTwgTWKG8MF4JZG6ODNe65XLjXuvJRMQxTLfHXlb59Zjwrq8etpiJodDtnBXBfwgQR5AlcTdBDmhICh4t6zV9NgmxhvYN1lm0c1-IVPR_EVKutRzLCeXlb2MjnHBBheOWU57vI4E1T6waFaL8dPx9XtV0uu78WkrOIFMZcXfKBgWz93JM3xKxCZLNFR0o3QEC0SHThTVNS5ls64HsKPtBSmjr1Z7wwAosYuOG7u_EirQXOu6iFVgR_NG7rcX9Kar6Qjwblid9iCcMigko-PfFdUOQp6oWWJcAeJCrDUv3xa6l8H_Oivh_dRxdq3oku4Veo37jfCzhMpFa0y30dfyOzklOp30hngy3QexSRdt4DoQEceStaVU7X6Dz1_9k%3D)
Thanks to **YOU** , a year ago I was inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States.

We’ve done **SO** much, and it’s truly been a**HELL OF A RIDE**.

Our border is **SHUT** , gas prices have hit a **FIVE-YEAR LOW** , inflation is **UNDER CONTROL** , the economy is **BOOMING** , and the USA is finally **RESPECTED** again.

The Democrats **CAN’T STAND** that the American people are winning again, and they’ll **USE** **EVERY DIRTY TACTIC** possible to destroy our progress.

And make no mistake, Patriot: when they come after me, they’re really coming after **YOU**!

I’m just standing in their way.

We’ve been through **HELL** together, and**NOTHING** has torn our bond apart.
[RESPOND TO TRUMP](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ce9ebc53224a4110bb8e8301573c7e89&_e=pISel8FdVD04kvtVpOqeCeX9qnRwW3K81fhOTPlb7Gwqye3AgTTsJ8bpiBxmHkzTAXGJJYt5xndlRVY_1OYrX7AP9qESBX8Ni1_4jV15xBlnFAt0Utv3rsgcRyQ1lX_dNcunpdTxmnKH7VAMmsdnv8MLBlfEOOmAdHrWZ11Rge9WztiP9IaDrKHf-GvScw_DVTgRznGGWq9amkEr_eWFrk09ys4r5zT0E9mV4QHCZCaR8FP4E2wCF35KJ4N1BRkwCV2z3Z3y69GWS0coZlCnRhhLDpAtwaSYwGtUR7NxUoDYzQdMPgu4Bcl7HEDu22sdDVdZnr3jg94caud1z8TVn4DwxlHKu1Gm6CTdOxthKcfyzSf3TJGvwgOeOXtuamIbMWNFVi2L0O3h7FAt6OCuwcam9aeNpq21eNGSF3YsQbqkt2MLowH7WVR_Qg1Aj1Iay-P1FE88NfDS8Z9Auv5kofTNRINVjJft1_-rrk8rhUxEVDtzgWRXVV3c_XE3nZsIHy6yYvmS7b4ywdtlDwViHEklzQM7GEEWAHvc86YhF3GyZgBgLkIf3dVH66rQnvef-bEmhxDk0MP50Y5IhGeCgmq2Rq9o-imD8Fi8CMm_MiYQm6PNunoozFdhy6GPemUVtzDZ-0clB5vn3VVSLfutDfwWRH9ibhGCd2HH4up-sxqDxYNkOqHQjjVyqDEE6oODNiuNUf5SQ8mdWaNi9frOZroLz7ZnR1BmVAd5ZbpjPo4%3D)
Unlike the Democrats, I **UNDERSTAND** how much you love our country and how hard you work every day to live the American dream.

And I **NEVER** forget who I’m fighting for:

**YOU!**

clean_body: I just stepped out of the Oval Office to send you this | | | | Forget the middle man. I wanted you to hear this DIRECTLY from me! Thanks to YOU , a year ago I was inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States. We’ve done SO much, and it’s truly been aHELL OF A RIDE. Our border is SHUT , gas prices have hit a FIVE-YEAR LOW , inflation is UNDER CONTROL , the economy is BOOMING , and the USA is finally RESPECTED again. The Democrats CAN’T STAND that the American people are winning again, and they’ll USE EVERY DIRTY TACTIC possible to destroy our progress. And make no mistake, Patriot: when they come after me, they’re really coming after YOU! I’m just standing in their way. We’ve been through HELL together, andNOTHING has torn our bond apart. Unlike the Democrats, I UNDERSTAND how much you love our country and how hard you work every day to live the American dream. And I NEVER forget who I’m fighting for: YOU! Together, we will finish what we started. Together, we will keep MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. — President Donald J. name: =?utf-8?q?Ray_=28Mallory=E2=80=99s_husband=29?=

body:
# [](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?refcode=&t=1&akid=4080%2E898137%2ELpXvDg)
Hey there! It's Ray, Mallory’s husband.
While most people are spending Valentine’s day with their loved ones, Mallory is traversing the Upper Peninsula, meeting with voters and braving the cold with them. That’s just who she is. She will never take a single voter for granted. And hey, she’s still going to make it home in time for a late Valentine's dinner with me.
[**Mallory deserves all the love and support we can give her. That's why I hope you’ll help me surprise her by signing a Valentine’s Day card for her that I’ll give her tonight when she gets home!**](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-2026-Valentines?refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260214_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=4080%2E898137%2ELpXvDg)
[SIGN ON 🩷](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-2026-Valentines?refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260214_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=4080%2E898137%2ELpXvDg)
---
Being a campaign family means making some sacrifices, and being apart on days like today is one of them. But I know why she’s out there. She’s fighting for a future where every family in Michigan has the same opportunities we want for our daughter.
[](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-2026-Valentines?refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260214_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4080%2E898137%2ELpXvDg)
_Here’s us (admittedly many years and gray hairs ago) at Kitch-iti-kipi in the UP._
Mallory is simply the best, and while she’s hard at work meeting Michigan voters across the state, I’m doing what I can to make her feel loved and special today. And you can help!
[**So will you take a moment to add your name and a note to this Valentine’s Day card before I give it to her tonight? It means a lot to me and I know it’ll mean a lot to Mallory.**](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-2026-Valentines?refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260214_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4080%2E898137%2ELpXvDg)
[SIGN THE CARD](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-2026-Valentines?refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260214_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4080%2E898137%2ELpXvDg)
---
Thank you!
\- Ray

name: Deb Haaland for New Mexico
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=7484%2E400544%2El71B7L)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/4677?refcode=jtk264-fr-nd&t=2&akid=7484%2E400544%2El71B7L)
---
Deb Haaland doesn't come from wealth, friend. Unlike her GOP opponents, she's never had the means to self-fund a campaign. She's running a people-powered campaign that relies entirely on grassroots support from folks like you.

That’s exactly why she’s better prepared to lead. She understands affordability because she’s lived it. She knows how critical strong public schools, accessible health care, and safe communities are because her family relied on them. These issues aren’t abstract — they’re personal. And beyond her lived experience, she’s led at the highest levels of government, serving in Congress and as U.S. Secretary of the Interior, taking on tough fights and delivering real results. She knows how to fight for working families — and how to get things done. Experience matters. Leadership matters. And she’s ready.
---
But with the GOP gearing up to spend whatever it takes to flip this seat red, we need YOU to help move us toward a future where everyone can thrive.
---
**_[Please, use this link to chip in $27 (this is what most donors are giving!) or whatever you can spare before Deb's mid-month deadline and help us reach our $30,000 goal.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/5131?refcode=jtk264-fr-nd&t=3&akid=7484%2E400544%2El71B7L)_**

Team Deb

body:
And shameless GOP politicians are letting him get away with it. Will you help us fight back?
#
**Donald Trump is lying to America, Peter** – and shameless GOP politicians are letting him get away with it. We’ve seen it happen over and over and over again.
They lied about what happened in Minnesota.
They’re lying about how much it costs to live in our country right now.
**They’re lying to make themselves richer and more powerful, at the expense of all of us.**
**The Democrats we elect this year will be responsible for holding these lying politicians accountable... so we need to make sure they have the resources to compete and WIN.** And today, that’s why we’re asking for your help, Peter:

They’re lying to make themselves richer and more powerful, at the expense of all of us. The Democrats we elect this year will be responsible for holding these lying politicians accountable... so we need to make sure they have the resources to compete and WIN. And today, that’s why we’re asking for your help, Peter: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Here's the truth about why they’re lying, Peter: The GOP knows they can't win on the issues, so they're resorting to brazen lies and fear-mongering to distract and divide us. With your help, we can prove that their tactic is a LOSING one. Grassroots supporters like you, from all across the country, are already coming together to reject their agenda of extremism. And now, we need your continued support to uplift the Democratic candidates who are working so hard to expose their lies. Thank you for standing with us, SDC HQ Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

# [Prosecute Bondi for Lying under Oath](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2c6fd1e2-d499-4df4-82ac-54991d960560/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

She hurled insults, and refused to answer questions, responding instead with freeform bullshit. And she wouldn't even acknowledge the Epstein survivors in the room. Oh, and as Rep. Ted Lieu noted, it appears [she also lied](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e47878a-0376-4c2c-bd1a-5a712945a804/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Which is a regular occurence for her, but this time it was _under oath_. **Which is punishable by up to 5 years in prison. **Oops. **Add your name, and join us in calling for Bondi to be prosecuted, tried, and punished to the fullest extent of the law. **

subject: Do you need a hug?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
Because it’s Valentine’s Day, I wanted to tell you that I will always love you for supporting me no matter what!
| | | | [I LOVE PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
# **_PRESIDENT TRUMP:_**
# **_HAPPY VALENTINE’S DAY!_**
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
I’ve been thinking a lot about our journey together, Friend.
We’ve accomplished some incredible things together.
**#1** We made **AMERICA SAFE** again.
**#2** We took on the **DEEP STATE.**
**#3** We made America the most **FEARED AND RESPECTED** country on Earth.
But I would LOVE to hear which of our great accomplishments YOU are most proud of!

**_[Before Valentine’s Day is over, can you leave me a quick personal note? I’m dying to read it>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
[RESPOND TO TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**[]()** Hearing your kind words encourages me to keep fighting against the Radical Left Democrats - even in the face of **_endless witch hunts, impeachment threats and relentless attacks on MAGA._**
You give me the strength to FINISH THE JOB.
**_[I would LOVE to hear from you before Valentine’s Day is over: RESPOND TO TRUMP!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
Thank you and God bless you, **[]()**

Donald J. Trump **[]()**

clean_body: | | Peter, what Republicans are doing is absolutely shameful. Donald Trump demanded Republicans rig the midterm elections by gerrymandering the congressional map. Then he boasted he’d nationalize the midterm election so he could steal it. He can get lost. We will never let that happen. = = Team Extreme can feel its power slipping away. They know 56% of Americans = of Donald Trump. They know Democrats are = in the polls. They know Democrats only need to flip = to take back the House. They know they can’t beat us at the ballot box, so they’re manufacturing a voting crisis and padding their war chest to try to salvage their razor-thin majority. It’s pathetic. Democrats will bring about a better America and make our nation the best version of itself. = | | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. He can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? Every donation includes a 2026 Jeffries Democratic Membership, giving you exclusive access to member-only content. = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste.
