name: Adam Schiff
subject: Eve will always be my Valentine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9537%2E5257348%2Ep2f3tk)
Hi Derek — Wishing you and your loved ones a happy Valentine’s Day!
This is a special week for me and my wife, Eve — our wedding anniversary is just a few days away on February 19th.
I know it can be hard to be hard to avoid the trauma going on in the country even for a day. Even the simple question — how are you — is more complicated than it used to be. But Eve and I have so much to be grateful for at this time of year.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=EG_2602_Valentines.RmsyXk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20260214_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=9537%2E5257348%2Ep2f3tk)
If you had told me that a tennis date in Playa Del Rey with Eve Sanderson would lead to the life and family we’ve built together, I might have made it to the tennis courts on time.
After tennis, I asked her out and we went to a great Italian place (the kind with Christmas lights up all year) and then off to hear some jazz. And I’m convinced that she only went out with me because — how often does an Eve go out with an Adam?
We’ve weathered the many, many Adam & Eve jokes together ever since.
While we get ready to celebrate Valentine’s Day, and later our wedding anniversary, I have to ask:
[**Will you take a moment to sign my card for Eve? I want her to feel extra special today, and a note from you all would mean so much to her.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=EG_2602_Valentines.RmsyXk&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20260214_AM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=5&akid=9537%2E5257348%2Ep2f3tk)

clean_body: | Hi Derek — Wishing you and your loved ones a happy Valentine’s Day! This is a special week for me and my wife, Eve — our wedding anniversary is just a few days away on February 19th. I know it can be hard to be hard to avoid the trauma going on in the country even for a day. Even the simple question — how are you — is more complicated than it used to be. But Eve and I have so much to be grateful for at this time of year. If you had told me that a tennis date in Playa Del Rey with Eve Sanderson would lead to the life and family we’ve built together, I might have made it to the tennis courts on time. After tennis, I asked her out and we went to a great Italian place (the kind with Christmas lights up all year) and then off to hear some jazz. And I’m convinced that she only went out with me because — how often does an Eve go out with an Adam? We’ve weathered the many, many Adam & Eve jokes together ever since. While we get ready to celebrate Valentine’s Day, and later our wedding anniversary, I have to ask: Thanks for being a part of our team. Eve and I are so appreciative of all your support. — Adam | | 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE Sign up to receive or . Text JOIN to 724433. **** For the love of all that is good and decent... Who knew one man could harbor so much vile, concentrated hate? Donald Trump’s recent decision to share a vile, racist video of the Obamas isn't just a gaffe. It’s the desperate, petulant flailing of a man who knows _he will never measure up._ Think about the contrast: Barack and Michelle Obama moved through the White House with grace, intelligence, and a legacy of service that still commands global respect.

_Not Trump._ He’s a supreme criminal stuck in a cycle of childish bullying and racist tropes. He’s obsessed with the Obamas because their success is a constant reminder of his own moral smallness in every respect. He isn't a leader; he’s a vicious narcissist fueled by a bottomless ego and a history of depravity, from his "friendship" with Jeffrey Epstein to his status as a convicted felon and sex abuser. _He is a national disgrace, and it’s time to usher this tired, hateful act off the stage for good._ **Cedar Key Progress is raising funds to expand our IMPEACH TRUMP NOW billboard campaign and working to elect a Congress that has the spine to finally FINISH THE JOB.** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvY5hIpYyZFo4TAxtBXDcsHs7iGep3vX1mO61FC5l6ShuLHIwHpwcEWLg7hup-uSswzoYfc6VRdLm2dbsIOyRSclrMG-g7nRSRKYGG_SJ9ZoESeyPqhpCf3ikd-MoUTn6896wX37Ld4ZdoXidMCdUxewo6DP9qMCQahGasGuRQXDOEFrjMWMpWdp_jxXTmzywqjz2jLo49ufKIjsBXbCKdEL1y8xLrgCpt9LN6_OYzQpFvygkrX95k1L8L2FPVLzX4gHZiutEncf8fomAQ6U0hgORSH8KZdF3JDpQLXHFYnrg7SpJPWLNg8-PY6RMJTV8akdKB7j7YPf0QqgffVeKpsNZy3w8ey25eYe92YrOUq-NpR0Zgjdh-vcU-qqQ5IMv0/4o5/e5efZ2QUT9udT3QjXxCFNA/h2/h001.eHoLSEGT7HR5lwT4sGYj6tjQpeGVQO__dtQm3Cc3LLg)

clean_body: | | | ** It is long past time to usher this tired, hateful act off the stage and elect a Congress that will finally hold him accountable. For the love of all that is good and decent... Who knew one man could harbor so much vile, concentrated hate? Donald Trump’s recent decision to share a vile, racist video of the Obamas isn't just a gaffe. It’s the desperate, petulant flailing of a man who knows he will never measure up. Think about the contrast: Barack and Michelle Obama moved through the White House with grace, intelligence, and a legacy of service that still commands global respect. Not Trump. He’s a supreme criminal stuck in a cycle of childish bullying and racist tropes. He’s obsessed with the Obamas because their success is a constant reminder of his own moral smallness in every respect. He isn't a leader; he’s a vicious narcissist fueled by a bottomless ego and a history of depravity, from his "friendship" with Jeffrey Epstein to his status as a convicted felon and sex abuser. He is a national disgrace, and it’s time to usher this tired, hateful act off the stage for good. Cedar Key Progress is raising funds to expand our IMPEACH TRUMP NOW billboard campaign and working to elect a Congress that has the spine to finally FINISH THE JOB. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. With fury and resolve, \- Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. To donate by check, send to: Cedar Key Progress c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- \- Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Cedar Key Progress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: =?utf-8?b?U2FyYWggKEFiZHVs4oCZcyB3aWZlISk=?=
subject: A little Valentine’s Day story from me 💕
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1703%2E251025%2EVCDnuN ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1703%2E251025%2EVCDnuN ]Abdul for US Senate

Hi Peter, happy Valentine’s Day!

Since love is in the air, I thought it’d be fun to share the story of how
Abdul and I met.

Years ago, as an undergrad at the University of Michigan, I was tabling
for a student organization on the Diag — the central quad everyone passes
through between classes. As I was trying to get students to sign up, Abdul
walked up to the table and we had some great banter.

My honest first impression of him was that he was whip smart, funny, and
easy on the eyes.

He was somehow both the jock who wore his Michigan lacrosse sweats
everywhere, but also “the Orgo nerd” — the organic chemistry lab
instructor who tutored everyone and applied himself intently to his
studies.

From the start of our relationship, I noticed that Abdul was extremely
principled and earnest. What you see is what you get. That part hasn’t
changed, but he swapped out the lacrosse gear for black v-necks 🤣.

[ A ]A throwback pic of Abdul and Sarah

I see him carry those same principles into this campaign by refusing
corporate PAC money and advocating tirelessly for working people.

Running for office isn’t easy on a family. We have two amazing daughters
with whom we’re juggling bedtime routines, school projects, sports, and so
much more. But we’re cheering Abdul on because we know he’ll fight for
real, lasting change in the U.S. Senate.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260214-1-ak.mgehUl&amount=10&refcode=em20260214-1696&t=1004&akid=1703%2E251025%2EVCDnuN ]So, if you’re feeling a little love for that kind of politics today, I
hope you’ll consider supporting this campaign. Your contribution gives
Abdul the chance to keep showing up exactly as he is.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260214-1-ak.mgehUl&amount=10&refcode=em20260214-1696&t=1023&akid=1703%2E251025%2EVCDnuN ]Donate $10 ››

Thank you so much! Your support means the world to us.

With love and gratitude,

Sarah 💕

[ Sarah ]Sarah and Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this help us stay connected with grassroots supporters like you, so thank you for taking the time to read this message. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1703%2E251025%2EVCDnuN
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1025&akid=1703%2E251025%2EVCDnuN

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

subject: You’re on the shortlist, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Add your name: Hold the ghost gun industry accountable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?amount=25]
Let me be clear: Promoting and facilitating the unlawful manufacture of 3D printed firearms and machine guns violates California law — and we will hold anyone doing this accountable.
I filed a new landmark lawsuit against two companies for unlawfully distributing computer code for 3D printing ghost guns, illegal large-capacity magazines, machine gun conversion devices, and other related products.
If you agree we need to hold the ghost gun industry accountable, please sign on right now. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/7aEz6qTRfUGQN3y2PIgStQ2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/7aEz6qTRfUGQN3y2PIgStQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/7aEz6qTRfUGQN3y2PIgStQ2]
These companies are getting creative in how they get deadly weapons into the hands of individuals who shouldn’t have them — so my office is getting creative in how we hold them accountable and protect public safety.
Enabling people who are too young or too dangerous to pass a firearm background check to illegally print these deadly weapons is directly putting California’s public safety at risk.
I won’t stand by and let that happen.
If you’re with me on this, I need to know — add your name now to join my fight against illegal ghost guns. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/7aEz6qTRfUGQN3y2PIgStQ2]
SIGN ON [https://secure.ngpvan.com/7aEz6qTRfUGQN3y2PIgStQ2]
Bottom line — these weapons are designed to end life, and an industry that skirts the law to arm people who never passed a background check must be held accountable.
With this effort, California is leading the way for states around the country and Congress to comprehensively address the ghost gun crisis nationwide.
Thanks for reading, and for raising your voice on this critical issue.
—Rob
Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?amount=25]
To contribute via check, please address to:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Thank you for supporting Rob Bonta. Grassroots supporters like you help us protect California’s working families, advance criminal justice reform, and keep our communities safe. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If we're going to protect and serve the people of California, we need you with us every step of the way.
If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, click unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/tsXL_NR2qEmgRRek5GtgsA2?unsubscribedata=SrcT1%2FxzlpLzhnwWx96oJpSNajz5fWZGRtJMcWTromJ5IFn2RZw8bZpQd%2FTbdMfZZs1jcmGIwS1Qd%2FTyQph8Qr%2Fm%2FxrNzbWygFFk5OH616N0o7V2a7tX83D5rXJ4j4REjHu%2BbP3zI0wMD69LJk6ixKlycqhfJklUlC1n21CHs7EQNLnAuo00HBWMLUm3o4s82xg6vQimKXnbRgquA%2FcV63UuKV5KbyBIOC7ShMPYzTJKOXXqy4r2E4yuZ%2FFqyQau2OaHAKFbcsdGbwPLlF%2FIBRc7%2B5Mjf9hE1LU%2BLopFsqjaqDaAwG02O6reGV8OtMtWm3OGuSsJ1PvWkvp8iqghErllEz9g0xYdrK1mU%2F7ArOKo%2FPZ6yUDS6Gh9DnxCNLKg9xF2u3S2Fdfz%2Fu5c09Ud4VF5dwszEz75VfmpDM609%2FuYe7Io6qkqWH16NZMhtKqY .
From all of us at Team Bonta, thank you for your support!

body:
I’m a firefighter, a dad, and someone who has spent his life working hard for myself, my family, and my community.
#

Hey, it’s Ruben. The most important thing we can do right now is win elections. I’m sending over an email from Bob Brooks. He's running for Congress in PA-07, and I’d appreciate you taking a look and chipping in if you can.
---

Peter, I'm Bob Brooks. I'm a firefighter, a dad, and someone who has spent his life working hard for myself, my family, and my community.
I'm running to defeat Republican Ryan Mackenzie in PA-07. Last year, he won this race by just one percentage point. Next year, we have the chance to defeat him.
[**I want to tell you a bit more about who I am and why I'm running for Congress, but if you're already with me in the fight to flip this competitive seat, then I'm humbly asking you to split a donation between Ruben Gallego and me →**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-brooks.ZnxeRo&refcode=em260214-1-30&t=1&akid=4072%2E734936%2EGEhR2N)
[DONATE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-brooks.ZnxeRo&refcode=em260214-1-30&t=2&akid=4072%2E734936%2EGEhR2N)
From a young age, I worked plenty of different jobs. Paperboy, fry cook, dishwasher, bartender, pizza delivery driver — you name it, I did it. I know what it's like to clock in early, work hard, and still wonder if you're getting ahead.
But in 2005, I found my passion: I became a firefighter with the city of Bethlehem.
I spent 20 years there because fighting fires was more than just a job for me — it was about serving my community and standing up for the people who keep us safe.
**That's why I'm so proud to have earned the endorsements of Senator Bernie Sanders, Governor Josh Shapiro, Senator Ruben Gallego, and Secretary Pete Buttigieg. They know what this fight is about — standing up for working people against the billionaires and special interests.**
Republicans in Congress like Ryan Mackenzie are spending their time prioritizing Donald Trump and the wealthy billionaires who back their campaigns.
While families in PA-07 struggle with rising costs and making ends meet, Mackenzie is busy supporting policies that slash Medicaid and SNAP to pay for tax cuts to the rich and powerful.
We deserve better. We deserve someone who understands what working class families and small business owners are going through. We need someone who knows what it means to work hard and still wonder if you're going to get by.
I spent 20 years there because fighting fires was more than just a job for me — it was about serving my community and standing up for the people who keep us safe.
[**I'm that person, Peter. I'm running so that I can fight for you, the people.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-brooks.ZnxeRo&refcode=em260214-1-30&t=3&akid=4072%2E734936%2EGEhR2N)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution to Ruben Gallego and Bob Brooks instantly._

---
****

Peter,
With early vote starting Tuesday ( get more info here! [https://govotetexas.org/] ), TOP PAC is knocking on doors and connecting with voters to elect candidates who’ll stand up to Trump AND pass policies that lift up working Texans.
Congresswoman Jasmine Crockett [https://www.jasmineforus.com/] , running for U.S. Senate, and State Rep. Gina Hinojosa [https://ginafortexas.com/] , running for Texas governor, are community-driven women ready to deliver for ALL Texas families. They’re TOP PAC-endorsed champions with the experience, vision, and tenacity we need to deal MAGA a huge blow in the midterms.
Working together, we can power these two fighters to primary wins on March 3rd. But we need your help to make that happen.

Primary election excitement is building, Peter. A political vibe shift is underway, and MAGA knows it.
Momentum is on OUR side, and we have to use it!
DONATE NOW to expand our get-out-the-vote program to reach more Texans in the midterms! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=TwoTexasFighters&amount=10.00&refcode2=cc6ed4a2-ce09-f111-832e-0022482a9733]

Onward,

name: Britney VanCitters
subject: Urgent: Stop the SAVE Act in the Senate
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/_iTZp7BTakm3bNgqSA8P2g2?contactdata=hnn910FPTqmBW7gcRLU/nMoXBf1bOfZw1eOBMnAGQsps/T8h2iLfqXQ0U2IJHkouo9RGB7OsV1AZJMrq+gyulwcL9cQdagaaztCsSFeKwhjQWw72t54nuMQLPsyPBlkk [https://secure.ngpvan.com/_iTZp7BTakm3bNgqSA8P2g2?contactdata=hnn910FPTqmBW7gcRLU/nMoXBf1bOfZw1eOBMnAGQsps/T8h2iLfqXQ0U2IJHkouo9RGB7OsV1AZJMrq+gyulwcL9cQdagaaztCsSFeKwhjQWw72t54nuMQLPsyPBlkk]
Hi Peter,
We need your help to stop the dangerous SAVE Act from passing the U.S. Senate.
Congressional Republicans announced plans to renew their efforts to pass the anti-voter SAVE Act, even going so far as to introduce new SAVE Act bills under new names, essentially SAVE 2.0.
But we’re not fooled by this latest attempt to trick us into making it harder for millions of eligible voters to cast their ballot. To stop this bill in its tracks, we need to flood the phone lines of our Senators with our vocal opposition to SAVE and SAVE 2.0.
Email your Member of Congress today and tell them to vote NO on the SAVE Act! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/_iTZp7BTakm3bNgqSA8P2g2]
If passed, the SAVE Act would require every single American citizen to provide either a passport or an original copy of their birth certificate when registering to vote, and anytime they update their voter registration. Do you know where the original copy of your birth certificate is?
Exactly – the problem is that 21 million American citizens don’t have these documents readily available.
This bill would especially burden military voters, tribal voters, rural voters, survivors of natural disasters, communities of color, and married women who have changed their last names.
Tell Congress to vote NO! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/_iTZp7BTakm3bNgqSA8P2g2?contactdata=hnn910FPTqmBW7gcRLU/nMoXBf1bOfZw1eOBMnAGQsps/T8h2iLfqXQ0U2IJHkouo9RGB7OsV1AZJMrq+gyulwcL9cQdagaaztCsSFeKwhjQWw72t54nuMQLPsyPBlkk]
That’s why we need to take action today: Email your Member of Congress and tell them to vote NO on the SAVE Act. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/_iTZp7BTakm3bNgqSA8P2g2]
Thank you for standing up for democracy,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Britney_signature-removebg-preview.png]
Britney VanCitters (she/her)
OLCV Political & Organizing Director
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

clean_body: | | | Friends, With Valentine’s Day today, I’ve been thinking about what I love. I love our community, our democracy, and our fundamental freedoms. When it comes to the things I love, I will never stop fighting to protect them. With constant attacks on our values and so much extremism dividing our country, fighting for the things we love most is more important now than ever. And standing up for what – and who – we love matters now more than ever. So this Valentine’s Day, I’m asking for you to show this campaign some love as well. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Love, Doris As a Member of Congress, Doris works to ensure that the voices of her district’s constituents are heard in Congress, and fights for the needs of the Sacramento region. name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: A love letter to Michigan, Michiganders, and our movement 🫶
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
I love Michigan |
#
---
Team — Happy Valentine’s Day! I love Michigan. I love our state’s gorgeous wild places, from Pictured Rocks, to Sleeping Bear Dunes, to the crystal clear waters of the Great Lakes that surround us. I love Michiganders. Our grit. Our determination. The way we lean on each other when times are tough. We don’t give up, and we don’t back down. And I love that we came together to reject chaos, protect fundamental freedoms, pass commonsense gun laws, create a 100% clean energy future, and make our economy work for working families. clean_body: I love Michigan | Team — Happy Valentine’s Day! I love Michigan. I love our state’s gorgeous wild places, from Pictured Rocks, to Sleeping Bear Dunes, to the crystal clear waters of the Great Lakes that surround us. I love Michiganders. Our grit. Our determination. The way we lean on each other when times are tough. We don’t give up, and we don’t back down. And I love that we came together to reject chaos, protect fundamental freedoms, pass commonsense gun laws, create a 100% clean energy future, and make our economy work for working families. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, and have a great day! 🫶 — Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. Friend,

We’re halfway to the first FEC deadline of the election year, and the spotlight on this race is growing larger by the day.

Here are three things you need to know:
1. Experts at the _Cook Political Report_ rated CA-45 as the most vulnerable Democratic-held seat in Southern California. After flipping this seat by 653 votes, we can’t take anything for granted.

2. With multiple Republican challengers in the race and the slimmest of margins separating House control, we expect a flood of outside money and GOP attacks in a desperate attempt to keep power.

3. Despite the noise, Derek is delivering real results and listening to the voices usually left behind. Derek isn’t your typical Congressman -- he knows the struggles many in our communities have faced because he’s lived them. He’s fighting for better healthcare and protecting our democracy.

**[Now, we’ve set an aggressive mid-quarter goal to keep Derek on offense and scale up early organizing to reach new voters in this district. If you’re able, chip in $3 today to help us stay competitive and defend this seat in November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125398881/601658783/-1429052514?refcode=em-2.14.26-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2I2ZWE2NTAtY2YwOS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=n6MMl0G90oXNBSl6n62j3CX4nfUiOoj6LCwIZNUV1wA=)**

body:
Trump’s assault on Social Security is ramping up
| **First,** Trump slashed Social Security staffing by nearly 11%.

**Then,** Social Security Offices across the country shuttered due to lack of staffing. [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103166?t=6&akid=22992%2E878179%2EpxT2oh) **NOW,** the benefits of millions of Americans are hanging by a thread, and if there isn’t massive public outrage ANYTHING is on the table, from **privatizing Social Security to raising the Retirement Age.**

Friend, we need more people to know that their Social Security is in danger and _we need your help._ [Rush $7 to prevent Trump from getting away with his “quiet” cuts! >>](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103166?t=7&akid=22992%2E878179%2EpxT2oh) | [RUSH $7 TO SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY >>](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103166?t=8&akid=22992%2E878179%2EpxT2oh)
---
Most Americans – _76%_ – don’t know that Social Security is profoundly underfunded, but you know who does? Trump’s billionaire donors, **who see a huge opportunity.**

**Privatizing Social Security would be a windfall for Wall Street while leaving everyone else without a critical safety net.**

But most people are tuned out, friend, so it’s up to us to mount a defence against Trump and his billionaire cronies. If enough people step up we can still stop them. [Rush $7 to Save Social Security! >>](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/103166?t=9&akid=22992%2E878179%2EpxT2oh)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Here’s where we’re headed next week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240690%2E444211%2EXi4tPw)
Last week, Powered by People and myself were on the road at Texas State in San Marcos, UTSA, Waco, and UTEP—meeting people where they are, listening to them and then doing two incredibly important things. 1) Get them registered; and 2) Personally stay in touch with them to answer all of their questions about voting over the next 9 months and pushing them come election time to cast that ballot.
This is the work that works. In 2024, our organizing model took a turnout rate of 37% for 18-29 year olds to over 79%.
These students know what time it is—they see innocent civilians murdered in the streets, they see the wealthy and powerful immune from justice for rape and child trafficking, they know we’re about to lose this country once and for all. So Powered by People is there to work with them to turn their anger and frustration into action and victory.
In just a few days, we’ll be back on the road at Midwestern State University in Wichita Falls, University of North Texas in Denton, and University of Texas at Arlington. Different colleges, different communities, different faces—but the mission stays the same: showing up, listening, organizing, and turning out voters to win elections.
We’re halfway through February tomorrow and I’d like to know if we can keep moving at the pace we’ve kept so far this year. Every dollar helps connect us with students on campuses, allows us to host town halls, keeps us registering voters, and building relationships with communities across Texas.
**This is the work it will take to win. So, we’re asking:**
[**Can you pitch in $3 to Powered by People today to ensure we can continue to do the work that works?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260214._UD8ox&refcode=ema20260214-240690&t=3&akid=240690%2E444211%2EXi4tPw)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260214._UD8ox&refcode=ema20260214-240690&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=240690%2E444211%2EXi4tPw)**
Thank you,
Beto

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20260214-240690-footer&t=23&refcode2=240690_444211_Xi4tPw&akid=240690%2E444211%2EXi4tPw)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/update-contact-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=240690%2E444211%2EXi4tPw)

---
I know that’s a direct ask—and I don’t make it lightly. I work carefully and closely with my team to discuss when we ask and how much we ask for. So let me tell you why your donation to help us reach this goal is so important:
We need to hit this goal so that we can ramp up our operations as we get further into the election year. It ensures we have the resources to fight back against Donald Trump’s weak agenda—and win.
_And the last year has made it clear that fighting back is more important than ever._
Trump pardoned the criminals who stormed our Capitol and beat the crap out of cops. He imposed reckless tariffs that have made life even more expensive. He tried to gut and privatize the VA, putting my fellow veterans’ earned care at risk. He has attacked our democracy, ignored the Constitution, and threatened those who disagreed with him—even calling for my death after I restated a basic truth about our Constitution.
And my Republican colleagues in the House have fallen in line with the President, cowering in fear of him. They rammed through his pathetic budget plan that defunds the basics of government, gutting healthcare and food assistance, all to pay for tax handouts to billionaires and huge corporations and massive increases to ICE’s budget.
Derek, with so many urgent issues facing Western PA, this is what Trump and his allies are prioritizing?
We need people in Congress who will stand up to Trump whenever he puts his priorities over yours. That’s what I’m doing in Congress, but I need your help to keep this fight going.
**_[Before midnight tomorrow, please make a donation to help me continue taking on Trump’s weak agenda and fighting for you in Congress →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125399251/601659738/-1542703181?amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=email_021426_personal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTczY2E1Yy1jZjA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4wZb5eLpDafI99VLUZYVTY3t2XNrYv63GufMFJz1pZc=)_**

clean_body: Derek, I am asking for your help. = | | = I know that’s a direct ask—and I don’t make it lightly. I work carefully and closely with my team to discuss when we ask and how much we ask for. So let me tell you why your donation to help us reach this goal is so important: We need to hit this goal so that we can ramp up our operations as we get further into the election year. It ensures we have the resources to fight back against Donald Trump’s weak agenda—and win. And the last year has made it clear that fighting back is more important than ever. Trump pardoned the criminals who stormed our Capitol and beat the crap out of cops. He imposed reckless tariffs that have made life even more expensive. He tried to gut and privatize the VA, putting my fellow veterans’ earned care at risk. He has attacked our democracy, ignored the Constitution, and threatened those who disagreed with him—even calling for my death after I restated a basic truth about our Constitution. And my Republican colleagues in the House have fallen in line with the President, cowering in fear of him. They rammed through his pathetic budget plan that defunds the basics of government, gutting healthcare and food assistance, all to pay for tax handouts to billionaires and huge corporations and massive increases to ICE’s budget. Derek, with so many urgent issues facing Western PA, this is what Trump and his allies are prioritizing? We need people in Congress who will stand up to Trump whenever he puts his priorities over yours. That’s what I’m doing in Congress, but I need your help to keep this fight going. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks, Chris | Make sure this email goes to your inbox. name: Josh Riley via Team Gillibrand
subject: Donald Trump just endorsed my opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I need your help to fight back and keep Upstate New York blue.
Folks, it’s Josh Riley, the Democrat representing Upstate New York in Congress. **Donald Trump just endorsed my Republican opponent, Peter Oberacker.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125399417/601660460/-38420661?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.02.14_Riley_Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_30do30dc60dd_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWFhZWU5NC1jZjA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3doyxtql3gEyCSq3HgGzbyWeH8tLBtq-2LAq08R8kSw=) Oberacker is an Albany insider who has spent his career taking orders from the special interests and then selling us out. He cashed checks from utility monopolies and voted against legislation to lower utility bills, all while they jacked up rates for families across Upstate New York. Now, he’s running for Congress to do their dirty work in Washington, and Donald Trump’s endorsement means even more MAGA money is about to come his way. **[_I need your help to fight back and keep Upstate New York blue. Names that appear - and the power structures behind them. In this episode, I read directly from Jeffrey Epstein's emails - no commentary, no opinions - and documents now available in the public record, naming the individuals referenced and examining who these people are (hint: they're all at the top of every index of life).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dde5a4c2-c3be-4913-bf62-72a9c47321df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

This episode examines the growing problem of influence without responsibility in conservative media, using Candace Owens as a case study. After a viral post sparked over 100,000 impressions and intense backlash, Kathy Barnette breaks down how conspiracy thinking, grievance culture, and moral permission slips are radicalizing parts of the Right.

The First Amendment protects Americans from government censorship - not from basic laws, consent, or common sense.

Freedom of the Press does not grant access to private property, does not override freedom of religion, and does not allow reporters to disrupt worship services.

Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
**FBI's Urgent Warning Sounds the Alarm** America's enemies have found a way to strike without firing a single shot. Hackers are attacking city water systems, overriding safety protocols to weaponize our utilities against us and positioning themselves to strike when the signal comes. National security experts warn China isn't alone. Iran, Russia and North Korea are preparing coordinated attacks. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems we trust to keep us safe. **Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link.** Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... _**But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.**_ If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like...
* **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.**
* If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water.
* **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.**
* Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out.
* **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.**
* Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it.

FREE Gift #1: FREE Aqua-Tote Collapsible Water Container ($16.95 Value) FREE Gift #2: FREE Personal Water Filter Straw ($24.95 Value) FREE Gift #3: FREE "Water Solutions" Online Class ($149.00 Value) FREE Gift #4: FREE Water Survival Digital Guide ($9.95 Value) FREE Gift #5: FREE "What's in your Tap Water" Digital Guide ($9.95 Value) FREE Gift #6: $25.00 Savings Certificate FREE Gift #7: FREE Shipping and Handling The best part is... This advanced filtration technology filters the nastiest, filthiest, bacteria-riddled and parasite infested water using no chemicals, no electricity and no moving parts! It's powered by the same technology that the U.S. Military and NASA trust to filter their water. But now available for you in your home. You're among the first to get access to these advanced, carbon-block water filters designed to filter water on your countertop at a sub-micron level without power or water hookup. So you can reduce... Harmful Bacteria – up to 99.9999% Life-Threatening Viruses – up to 99.99% Disease-Carrying Cysts – up to 99.9% Plus, this table-top unit targets 200+ dangerous contaminants from your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, arsenic, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, VOCs and more. All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in their homes. The NEW & improved Filtration System may look the same... But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. They're MORE reliable and easier to replace, too. So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family. But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while. In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually. And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out. And YES there's an interest-FREE payment plan! Yes, right now, you can get your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System on a convenient, no-credit-check, interest-FREE payment plan. We know you're good for it. You'll have the peace of mind knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come. Stay Safe. Stay Prepared. Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. Derrick loves the convenience of his MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System: "It was so easy to install. Within minutes we had water that tasted so good, we couldn't believe it. We don't like the chlorine in tap water and we got tired of lugging around cases of bottled water." Customers Love Their Ultimate Water Filtration System! Cyndi L. "No question... beats the competition. After reviewing several other companies and seeing that I was not the only one thinking this way, as everyone was sold out of products, I decided to go with 4Patriots. They seem to be good people who are very helpful and their products seemed above average to others." Michael B. "Saves me a ton of money and grocery-store headaches. During the pandemic, water wasn't always available. Not so with the Purifier. We love it and I have 5 gallons of water on hand all the time." Faith P. "Water you can actually trust. This is so much better than storing gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make existing, natural water sources drinkable. I feel really good knowing that in an emergency situation, we'd be able to filter our water." Carol B. "Stop worrying about what's in the water! We use our system for drinking and cooking but you can use it almost anywhere. It's easy to use and it doesn't take long to filter. The water tastes pure and delicious." Rick O. "Easiest way to upgrade your drinking water. We chose this one because it handles everything and it's affordable. You never know when things will go out on you." Thomas P. name: Committee To Elect Zuri For CD5
subject: Volunteer Extravaganza Feb 21st, SAVE Act, PPLD and Black History Month, Southeast Community Plan
body:
RSVP for our Volunteer Extravaganza, Phone Bank! Call Senators about the SAVE Act, Cultural displays at PPLD and Southeast Community Plan

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5df45869427b/happy-new-year-a-bit-of-what-ive-been-up-to-4792724?e=738470dca6)
---
|
---
| | | | | |
# Hi Everyone!

---
| | **You’re Invited:**
******We would love to have as many people as possible, even if you just stop by for a little bit.**
**We will also have postcards you can write to people detained in ICE custody and would love donations of Spanish language books**
**Other Ways to Support** **Zuri’s Campaign:** Ways to get involved and support our campaign.
[Sign up](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=9955b6ed69&e=738470dca6) as a delegate for Zuri and if you want to go above and beyond volunteer for Zuri at Caucus (at the same link).

**Phone Banking:****Monday Phone Banking** Dates: February 16th, 23rd, March 2nd, 9thTimes: 5:30pm-7pmLocation: Online[REGISTER HERE](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=e860ad401e&e=738470dca6)Once you are trained you can make calls at any time
**Friday Phone Banking** Dates: January 20th, 27th, March 6th, 13thTimes: 5:30pm-7pmLocation: Online[REGISTER HERE](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=0c781f5ae8&e=738470dca6)Once you are trained you can make calls at any time
**Wednesday Caucus and Assembly Training:** Dates: February 18th, and 25thTime: 6-7pm (the first 25 minutes are the vital part, the last half is open to questions)Location: Online[REGISTER HERE](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=4f7f07e740&e=738470dca6)
[**Donate**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=6ec09b89ca&e=738470dca6) \- Donations help with buying at table at Caucus and Assembly
**Local and National Update:**
**I’m sorry that I’m not out in the community as much while I focus on gaining support at Caucus and Assembly. Here are some issues that have been coming up in the meantime:**
[ The SAVE Act](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=71b9e5b466&e=738470dca6) \- The SAVE Act has passed the House. Contact Senators Hickenlooper and Bennet to ask that they vote no on the SAVE Act which would require a birth certificate or passport to vote. This would amount to a poll tax. About 55% of Citizens do not have a passport and would be required to purchase one. Married women with name changes would be especially affected by this.Call Senator Bennet: 202-224-5852Call Senator Hickenlooper: 202-224-5941
[Check out the Southeast Strong Neighborhood Plan](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=ecdf52564d&e=738470dca6) \- Let City Council know your thoughts on the plan, the goal of the plan is to invest in the Southeast and make it a region that thrives while uplifting its’ current residents. Email AllCouncil@ColoradoSprings.gov to provide feedback before February 24th the next City Council meeting.
[Board of Trustees Meeting](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=2af5890f5c&e=738470dca6) \- Staff at Pikes Peak Library District have been instructed not to have a Black History Month Display. This is in line with their policy to not host cultural displays or displays with cultural emphasis. This has been confirmed by a current and former library worker. We are not accurately reflecting our community when we don’t have displays from a variety of cultures and we are not accurately representing our history.
Attend the PPLD Board of Trustees next meeting, February 18th at 5pm at Library 21c to address the issue. Public comment on issues not on the agenda will be after the meeting.
[**Help Reunite Edwin with his Fiance and Kids**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=b1fc6656ba&e=738470dca6)[****](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=b8307a181e&e=738470dca6)Their whole family has been through so much. Please donate to help them visit Edwin. Edwin was the main breadwinner for their family and it’s hard to recover from his loss of income and costs incurred while he was in ICE custody. Anything helps.
**Congressional District 5 Forum:** Here’s a [link](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=646c0ba85b&e=738470dca6) to watch the forumHere’s a [link](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=42b1bafb7d&e=738470dca6) to watch me answer additional questions that we weren’t able to answer at the forum.
**John Mikos’s Video in Support of My Candidacy:** Thank you for reaching out to share your support:[](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=68e818bab0&e=738470dca6)**Part of Zuri’s Speech in Honor of Alex Pretti :**
[****](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=a4b7d20054&e=738470dca6)
**Zuri met with CC students at a dinner hosted by****Colorado Springs Sunrise Movement:**
****
We need a progressive in this fight who wont back down.
I will be your fighter.
**With love,****Zuri Horowitz****Candidate for Congress, CO-5****www.ZuriforCD5.com**
**No Contract, No Coffee.** Support striking Starbucks workers! Don’t cross the line while workers are on strike.
---
| | **Listen to my**[**podcast**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=99f26874ac&e=738470dca6)**episode with Loving the Springs!****We talk about the importance of putting people first when it comes to all areas of policy.**
---
| | **Updates:**[**Donate**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=e055ee8177&e=738470dca6)**-** We made our first [ad](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=916dd5d65f&e=738470dca6) with an Emmy winning editor. Now we need enough money to hire staff, and expand our outreach via door knocking, texts, postcards, and mailers.
[**Volunteer**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=783fd6751c&e=738470dca6)**-** Our outreach strategy will rely on volunteers & minimize paper waste. If you haven’t signed up already, please do!
**Social Media \- **We have the biggest community on [**TikTok**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=e0162fc331&e=738470dca6)**** out of all of the candidates (we made it to 2000+ people) although we may not continue on that platform due to censorship, we have the biggest community on [**Instagram**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=126f92c256&e=738470dca6) , and we’ve got a ways to go on [**Facebook**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=da59ef66c9&e=738470dca6)**,** we are also on****[**BlueSky**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=498c768cb3&e=738470dca6).
Your _follows_ , _likes_ , and _shares_ help a lot to let people know about our campaign!
---
| [Subscribe to my email list](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=6ed86c9b05&e=738470dca6)
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=141754d7cc&e=738470dca6)
---
[](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=7c72d3b11a&e=738470dca6)
---
[](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=6231079db7&e=738470dca6)
---
[](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=772107c51d&e=738470dca6)
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | _Copyright (C) 2026 Committee To Elect Zuri For CD5. All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
Committee To Elect Zuri For CD5 204 S 25th St # 6040 Colorado Springs, CO 80904-3005 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=797f17cda5&e=738470dca6&c=56eff114fe) or [unsubscribe](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=797f17cda5&t=b&e=738470dca6&c=56eff114fe)
---
|

Peter,

Ever since Scott announced his campaign to represent San Francisco in Congress, MAGA World has **completely** lost it. We’re talking full-blown, rage-posting meltdown.

**So we figured - what better way to respond than with a Valentine from Scott and his grassroots supporters... straight to his MAGA Fan Club?

[_Add your name to the card below and help us send a clear message: Scott’s grassroots movement is stronger than ever, and we’re not backing down:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125400578/601664243/528294591?refcode=SW_EM_PT_180DO_260214_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDY5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjI3OWJjYi1kMjA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cQzlZ8m4e-OcyCRnE2grXTJvsr1DCNpeFQZGByVUKqU=&emci=f3279bcb-d209-f111-832e-0022482a9733&emdi=ff279bcb-d209-f111-832e-0022482a9733&ceid=53530144)**

_Why are Kristi Noem, Megyn Kelly, Laura Loomer & Co. so obsessed with Scott?_

Because he doesn’t back down. He unapologetically stands up for LGBTQ people, pushes back on hate, and has a real record of delivering progress - from building affordable housing and strengthening public transit, to taking on corporate healthcare and holding ICE accountable.

They can’t stand it.

But Scott won’t be intimidated - and our movement is growing every day.

[_**Sign on now to send a clear message to MAGA: we’re not going anywhere.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125400581/601664246/528294591?refcode=SW_EM_PT_180DO_260214_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDY5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjI3OWJjYi1kMjA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cQzlZ8m4e-OcyCRnE2grXTJvsr1DCNpeFQZGByVUKqU=&emci=f3279bcb-d209-f111-832e-0022482a9733&emdi=ff279bcb-d209-f111-832e-0022482a9733&ceid=53530144)

❣️Team Wiener

Hey folks,
Adam Mockler and I jumped on for a quick Saturday bonus episode, and it turned into one of the most fired-up conversations I've had in a while. Adam and I went deep on the Epstein files, Pam Bondi's testimony, the surveillance of members of Congress, and what it's going to take to actually break the "Epstein class."
Here are five moments you don't want to miss:
* **[00:01:00] Bondi 's House Judiciary performance blows up in her face** - We break down the moment Rep. Pramila Jayapal had survivors stand up after Bondi claimed they had access to the DOJ... and every hand went up saying they didn't. It's a jaw-dropping exposure of what's really happening behind the scenes.
* **[00:08:08] The "Epstein class" framing changes everything** - I explain why I'm done relitigating old partisan fights. There are two groups in this country: the Epstein class and everyone else. If we don't break that class, average families will never get economic breathing room again.
* **[00:15:06] Florida, Gaetz, and the culture of protection** - Adam and I connect the dots between Matt Gaetz investigations, Mike Johnson blocking oversight, and how power protects power. This part is raw, but it's essential.
* **[00:21:24] The 2028 path: populism + anti-corruption or bust** - We lay out what Democrats actually need to run on: the most aggressive economic populist agenda since FDR and the toughest anti-corruption platform since Teddy Roosevelt. Big primary. Big ideas. Let the people decide.

With urgency,
--Mike

name: Susan Collins
subject: My Decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQ1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDIxNF9FUS1GUi4xMTQ1MTBfdDE4MjA3OTYtMTE0MiZleF90aWQ9MjAyNjAyMTRfRVEtRlIuMTE0NTEwX3QxODIwNzk2LTExNDIifQ/RQvFd_SbxWDW8vNFhDAQ9w)Peter -
I believe that only American citizens should vote in American elections.
Peter, I announced that I will vote for the SAVE America Act because the law and the Constitution are clear - citizens of other countries should not be voting in American elections.
The radical Left is in a total frenzy. They want to dilute your voice. I am the last line of defense, and I am under siege.
The Left-wing Democrats running against me oppose requiring people to prove their citizenship when they register to vote. They are using Chuck Schumer's and Bernie Sanders' money to try to silence you and me.
Radical far-left dark money groups are pouring millions into Maine this week to try to break my resolve and flip this seat. They don't just want to defeat me; they want to kill the SAVE Act to advance their radical agenda.
I will not be intimidated. I will not back down. But I cannot do this alone.
If you want to ensure that only American citizens decide American elections, I need you to stand with me in the next 60 minutes. Your support will help us win![SECURE THE VOTE. STAND WITH SUSAN
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTQ1JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDIxNF9FUS1GUi4xMTQ1MTBfdDE4MjA3OTYtMTE0MiZleF90aWQ9MjAyNjAyMTRfRVEtRlIuMTE0NTEwX3QxODIwNzk2LTExNDIifQ/C4EA_zm4tmx6dkM-ppByUQ)This is the moment of truth. Let's make it count.-- Susan Collins

* * *
| [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-vUc-mqjMRLA)As the only Republican Senator in a state Kamala Harris won, Senator Susan Collins is the Democrats' [#1 target](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.). [They know that if they flip Maine, they flip the Senate.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
[Maine and Susan Collins are the KEY to America's future.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
This isn't just about politics; it's about protecting Mainers and building a firewall that Chuck Schumer's millions cannot breach.
[Stand with Susan Collins and help protect the future of America by making an instant online contribution of $25, $45, $75 or more before it's too late.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Have you seen what's going on right now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:

| | |

Derek, do you know what's happening with the GOP's Senate majority right now?
**FIRST:** We saw Trump's enablers in the Senate rubber-stamping each and every part of his harmful agenda – unleashing chaos and violence on our country.
**THEN:** Republican megadonors started stockpiling dark money to pour into key battleground races to hold on to their Senate majority – because they know Americans are outraged by their agenda.
**NOW: Trump-aligned super PACs have $400 MILLION on hand (and counting!). That means they have a massive cash advantage over us.**
If Democrats are going to fight back against the flood of GOP dark money coming our way and flip the Senate blue, we need to start building up a grassroots war chest. Right here, right now.
**That's why we set an ambitious $30,000 mid-month goal, but with time running out before tomorrow's midnight deadline, we're still way short.**
**So Derek, we've gotta ask:** **[Will you pitch in $5 right now to help us close this gap, defeat Trump's enablers in Congress, and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52872?t=2&akid=10592%2E434096%2EwmbbC_)**

This year’s National GOP attacks have already revealed what they think about Democrats like me:
They think it’s a weakness that I’ve stood up to the President and his reckless economic agenda.
They think it’s a weakness that I’ve stood tall against their cruel attacks on LGBTQ+ kids.
They think it’s a weakness that I’ve put my constituents first — not some political boss in DC.
**These politicians are welcome to think whatever they’d like. But I’m not running away from my record. I’m not running away from who I am and who I’m fighting for. And no amount of far-right spending will ever change that.**
**_[I think my record is a strength, not a weakness — but now, I need your help to get that message out to voters all across this competitive district. subject: This is where the money goes

body:
No mystery. Just the work.

| | | | |

Peter, We’re still here, and it’s because of supporters like you. Still making calls.
Still showing up at community events.
Still building the operation it takes to win. That work doesn’t happen on vibes alone. It runs on real resources — the kind that keep a campaign moving day to day. Here’s what that looks like right now:
* $10 helps print 30 palm cards for volunteers to hand out at events.
* $20 covers snacks and water for six volunteers putting in hours on the ground.
* $50 helps fund gas and travel to reach voters across the district.
* $100 supports the tools we use to track outreach and stay organized.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Help us keep our movement strong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our movement of nonviolent resistance is growing every single day, but we need you with us to keep up our momentum.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260214-5909-footer&t=1&akid=5909%2E420207%2E6k9Hwo)
The clock is ticking, Peter!
We have until midnight tomorrow night to reach [**our $15,000 mid-month fundraising goal**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/51821?c0=pj-em-20260214.h8VWju&refcode=em20260214-5909&t=2&akid=5909%2E420207%2E6k9Hwo), and we need your help to keep this movement strong.
Right now, our democracy and our communities are facing attacks on every front. Kristi Noem and her rogue ICE agents are carrying out violent raids with impunity, the National Guard is occupying our cities, all while healthcare premiums and grocery prices continue to skyrocket.
**But we’re fighting back. We are growing our movement of nonviolent resistance. And we are progressing forward every single day.**
Pramila is on the frontlines in Congress demanding justice, defending our communities, and holding power to account. She doesn't answer to special interests — she answers to the people. Her work is sustained by small dollar donations from grassroots supporters like you, _not_ corporations or billionaire donors.
**[To keep up our momentum and continue building this people-powered movement, we need to hit our $15,000 mid-month goal by midnight tomorrow night. Can you pitch in $3 right now to help us get there?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260214.4Fdrcy&refcode=em20260214-5909&amount=3&t=3&akid=5909%2E420207%2E6k9Hwo)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260214.4Fdrcy&amount=3&refcode=em20260214-5909&t=22&akid=5909%2E420207%2E6k9Hwo)**
Every contribution strengthens our grassroots movement and ensures Pramila has the resources to keep fighting in Congress. To keep fighting for our communities.
Thank you for showing up and standing with us.
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260214-5909-footer&t=23&refcode2=5909_420207_6k9Hwo&akid=5909%2E420207%2E6k9Hwo)**

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: News you'll love
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|

name: Brian Lenney
subject: why are we doing this in Idaho of all places?
body:
😲

| |
---|---|---
|
# why are we doing this in Idaho of all places?
### 😲
| | | [Brian Lenney](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
| Feb 14
---
| [](https://substack.com/@brianlenney)
---
Hey Happy Valentines Day,
You know what the Idaho House just voted for? Almost unanimously?
A bill that would track your kid's every single click online.
Every website. Every search. Every video. All of it logged and tracked by private companies who pinky-promise they'll keep it safe...
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/93776048-22d5-42a0-b8f7-e4b047c41eeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And they voted for it because out-of-state lawyers who wrote the bill told the sponsor it would **" protect the kids."**
You can't make this up.
If enacted, it'd build the infrastructure for mass surveillance.
_**And they 're using your children as the excuse to do it.**_
George Orwell is doing backflips in his grave.
The Mountain State Policy Center broke down exactly how bad this is:
» **[Idaho online safety bill would track a child's every click](https://substack.com/redirect/5396cc29-9391-46f1-b319-6044949ebfa3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Read it. Then get angry. Then contact the Senate State Affairs committee once you calm down and tell them to kill this thing before it's too late. Of course we want to protect kids.
_But this bill ain 't it. _
Your weekend project? Stop this disaster.
Brian
**P.S.** I went down the rabbit hole on this myself and it's worse than I thought. [Read my write up on it here](https://substack.com/redirect/dac87e01-270f-4502-a31e-933945447ec2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**P.S. #2:** Email these senators directly: [JGuthrie@senate.idaho.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/d8fc1343-48b5-4b9f-9c68-24e43247ba70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [TBernt@senate.idaho.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/3146ee9f-fe29-43e6-a801-837796309cfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [KAnthon@senate.idaho.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/3f69964e-5090-4850-a58a-4aa36254dab4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [MHarris@senate.idaho.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/c2122c92-8b12-4f85-ad81-f0650d02b181?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [BToews@senate.idaho.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/f62bb306-e331-4518-9860-6234b609d137?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [LDenHartog@senate.idaho.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/fd11b92b-0cef-4416-b783-94cc03923c44?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [BAdams@senate.idaho.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/7d1e5d90-fa13-41d8-a08f-84f941a4d23b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [BShippy@senate.idaho.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/6b323abb-1ab5-4359-962b-951c3673122f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [JRuchti@senate.idaho.gov](https://substack.com/redirect/ec4fab2b-2d94-42c0-adfb-065753642ce4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**P.S. #3:** Even better? CALL them. Here are their numbers:
1. Sen. Jim Guthrie (Chair) - (208) 332-1348
2. Sen. Treg A. Bernt (Vice Chair) - (208) 332-1331
3. Sen. Kelly Arthur Anthon - (208) 332-1327
4. Sen. Mark Harris - (208) 332-1429
5. Sen. Ben Toews - (208) 332-1322
6. Sen. Lori Den Hartog - (208) 332-1340
7. Sen. Ben Adams - (208) 332-1336
8. Sen. Brandon Shippy - (208) 332-1325
9. Sen. James D. Ruchti - (208) 332-1406

(C) 2026 Brian Lenney

Peter,

Under the Republican majority, working families are paying _more_ for _less_. The affordability crisis continues to worsen, and healthcare subsidies costs have skyrocketed.

**It doesn’t have to be this way -- and it shouldn’t be this way.** I came to Congress to solve real problems, and instead of prioritizing lower costs for our communities, the GOP majority is doing Trump’s bidding.

This week, House Republicans passed the SAVE America Act, which would disenfranchise millions of law-abiding Americans. Under the guise of stopping non-citizens from voting, which is already illegal, Republicans are making voting harder by requiring unneeded extra documentation. If your name doesn’t match your birth certificate, you won’t be able to vote without updated documentation -- costing you money, time, and privacy.

**They know it’s wrong. And they know that their House majority is hanging on by a thread.**

clean_body: | = = Peter, Under the Republican majority, working families are paying more for less. The affordability crisis continues to worsen, and healthcare subsidies costs have skyrocketed. It doesn’t have to be this way -- and it shouldn’t be this way. I came to Congress to solve real problems, and instead of prioritizing lower costs for our communities, the GOP majority is doing Trump’s bidding. This week, House Republicans passed the SAVE America Act, which would disenfranchise millions of law-abiding Americans. Under the guise of stopping non-citizens from voting, which is already illegal, Republicans are making voting harder by requiring unneeded extra documentation. If your name doesn’t match your birth certificate, you won’t be able to vote without updated documentation -- costing you money, time, and privacy. They know it’s wrong. And they know that their House majority is hanging on by a thread. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, GW | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. | | Peter — When people see a Republican incumbent with a $2.2 million war chest, they usually think the race is over before it starts. The GOP is betting on that. They think their mountain of corporate PAC money makes this seat un-flippable. **But as a mom and a teacher, I know how to make a budget stretch. And we have a secret weapon:_Math._** The new 1st District was redrawn into a seat that voted for the Democratic ticket by nearly 24 points last year. It is one of the best flip opportunities in the country. This kind of lead is a great start, but it doesn’t pay for the stamps or the yard signs we need to actually get out the vote. To win a seat this important, we have to match their corporate cash with our people power. I’ve spent my life in classrooms and at kitchen tables, not in corporate boardrooms. I don’t have a rolodex of lobbyists to call for a $5,000 check. I have a strict No Corporate PAC Money pledge and a record of winning the races they said were impossible. **Since it’s mid-month, I wanted to show you what "people power" actually buys vs. what his corporate cash covers:**
* **$15:** Feeds a volunteer for a canvass shift.
* **$25:** Covers the cost of five yard signs for local supporters.
* **$50:** Prints 500 mailers to reach neighbors at their front door.

Friend, Trump is weaponizing federal power for political gain – and the courts are starting to call it out. A federal judge just shut down Trump’s Department of Justice after it tried to force the state to hand over sensitive voter data. The judge warned the DOJ’s plan to create a “nationwide database of confidential voter information” and use it for immigration enforcement is**“chilling.”** Friend, this is not normal. This is what happens when extremists start treating voter information like a weapon. We can’t let Trump and his allies bully states into handing over sensitive data – or intimidate election officials into compliance. Our Democratic Secretaries of State are fighting back, but they can’t do it without grassroots support. clean_body: I want to say hi and introduce myself. | | = Hi Peter, I’m Kevin Ralph, Josh Harder’s new Finance Director. Josh told me this community is the heartbeat of this campaign, so I wanted to reach out to introduce myself with a bit of a challenge. = = Over the past decade, I’ve helped Democratic candidates win up and down the ballot and I’m so proud to be joining Josh’s team during this critical cycle. I chose to work for Josh because he actually lives out the values I want to see in a Democrat. He isn’t scared to fight back against Trump, or call out Democrats when they are being cowards. Josh also runs his campaign the right way: without taking a single penny of corporate PAC money. That means we don’t rely on billionaires. We depend on grassroots supporters like you to fund our digital ads and organizing programs that actually win elections. But all of this requires funding and that is where I come in to help. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- I’m super excited to be hitting the ground running with you! — Kevin Ralph Finance Director, Harder for Congress *

People here in our part of PA don't sit around and wait for someone else to fix their problems.
They roll up their sleeves and get things done.
They expect their representative to do the same. But he isn't.
Dan Meuser hasn't lifted a finger to deliver for our district. All he's done in Congress is sell us out and get himself rich. He doubled his own net worth while voting to rip away health care and drive up the cost of living. And he thinks we're going to accept that.
Meuser thinks he doesn't need to get out and face his constituents. He thinks he doesn't need to defend his record. **He thinks his war chest of billionaire and special interest money is going to save him.**
It won't. We're making sure of it.
Our campaign is built door to door, neighbor to neighbor. It's based on hard work, showing up, and solving problems. It's real and it's going to win.
**[But I'm counting on your support. Can you chip in before our mid-month deadline to keep us on track to flip this seat?](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ddbd629a-4e03-415c-bf8c-bbb349166fe1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ddbd629a-4e03-415c-bf8c-bbb349166fe1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thanks for being a part of this.
- Rachel Wallace

body:
My dad, Andy Beshear ❤️

Peter, it's Winnie Beshear here.

First Pup.

Goodest Girl.

Loyal companion to my dad, Andy (or, Gov. Andy Beshear if we want to get technical).

My dad has been doing A LOT lately. Like...a lot a lot. And it's making him very happy. Which makes me very happy, which usually means more tail wags, more couch time, and (if I'm lucky) _extra treats._

He's out here helping amazing candidates all across the country — the most goodest people who actually want to help other people (and dogs). He works super duperrrr hard every single day trying to make things better, and then comes home tired but smiling, and I'm like wow, that's my dad!

Also, full transparency: I sit in his office chair all the time. So I see everything. The calls. The meetings. The serious thinking face. The hopeful face. He really, really cares about this work. And boy oh boy, does he LUV Kentucky with his whole heart. He brings that care and compassion to everything he does, everywhere he goes.

So if you're supporting In This Together PAC, you're helping my dad do what he loves most — showing up for people (and dogs), backing the right races, and trying to make things better wherever he can.

And I just wanted to say thank you, dad, I luv you ❤️

**[If u want to help me make his val-em-times-day (is that how you spell it?) extra special, show him some puppy-luv and chip in anything you can today. clean_body: My dad, Andy Beshear ❤️ Peter, it's Winnie Beshear here. First Pup. Goodest Girl. Loyal companion to my dad, Andy (or, Gov. Andy Beshear if we want to get technical). My dad has been doing A LOT lately. Like...a lot a lot. And it's making him very happy. Which makes me very happy, which usually means more tail wags, more couch time, and (if I'm lucky) extra treats. He's out here helping amazing candidates all across the country — the most goodest people who actually want to help other people (and dogs). He works super duperrrr hard every single day trying to make things better, and then comes home tired but smiling, and I'm like wow, that's my dad! Also, full transparency: I sit in his office chair all the time. So I see everything. The calls. The meetings. The serious thinking face. The hopeful face. He really, really cares about this work. And boy oh boy, does he LUV Kentucky with his whole heart. He brings that care and compassion to everything he does, everywhere he goes. So if you're supporting In This Together PAC, you're helping my dad do what he loves most — showing up for people (and dogs), backing the right races, and trying to make things better wherever he can. And I just wanted to say thank you, dad, I luv you ❤️ = = Ok love u bye, = Winnie 🐾 Professional Napper Full-Time Dad Fan First Dog of Kentucky | | Andy and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. * * *
**Cliff 's Note:** _From my new weekly show w/ Joe Walsh, Tequila Talk, which you**must watch** **every Thursday 6pm et.** We both imbibe a drink we love, tell funny stories & connect the tequila of the day to our current politics._
### Tequila Talk w/ Joe Walsh & Cliff Schecter
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0bb81270-66a7-47cb-a0ac-511ca415ac4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The year 1800 in U.S. politics was a special one for a number of reasons particularly relevant today. Joe and I explained why, and I'm about to be redundant below, like Trump getting Hepatitis B. But let's take a step back for just a minute.
There's something poetic about **1800 Tequila** taking its name from the year tequila producers first began aging the spirit in oak casks--a year, coincidentally, Chuck Grassley also began aging himself in an oak cask. I digress.
Before that, tequila was raw, immediate, a punch to the senses. But aging it in oak? That added depth, character, patience. Time became an ingredient.
The brand leans into its history--11 generations of one family rooted in Jalisco, Mexico--built on 100% blue Weber agave, tied to the moment when craft met maturation. 1800 ain't a random date on a bottle, friends. It's about refinement. What happens when something fiery's forced to sit still long enough to develop complexity.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1308fb5a-bd5e-4106-b3df-d1abab988a98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
#### **American History: 1800**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/523cb029-eea2-4283-83bb-f278fc75a67b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Now here's where American history wanders into the cantina. The year 1800 wasn't just about oak barrels in Mexico. _**It was the year of the first peaceful transfer of power between political parties in the United States**_ --when John Adams handed the presidency to hated rival, Thomas Jefferson, after a bitter election. It may not sound revolutionary, but in a world drenched in coups, crowns, and guillotines, it was a shock to the system.
Our young republic proved then it could survive partisan rage without reaching for muskets--unlike, say, the guy in the "Camp Auschwitz" sweatshirt, Jim Jordan, googly-eyes Kash Patel, the weirdo QAnon Shaman wearing the horns, and the bloated, goat-carcass serving as President of the United States then and now, sadly, 220 years later. It was democracy aged in oak instead of exploding in gunpowder.
* * *
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.g4_6yRynlAFaufmEKlGUBoDriitdwI_8F29Xb-tSYQ4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=187702168)
* * *
1800 marked another transition: the federal government moved from Philadelphia to the newly constructed capital of Washington, D.C. The capital had been in New York City in our early years, but **the Founders wanted to separate financial from political power** after watching Europe's elite, cocksure cretins blend the two into a cocktail of corruption. They didn't want Wall Street and Congress sharing a lunch table.
So the government migrated south--into what was, quite literally, **a swamp** along the Potomac. The symbolism writes itself. A brand-new experiment in self-government was planted in wetlands, surrounded by mud and mosquitoes, hoping their idealism would outpace nature's decay.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4d19ef2e-8855-4fdb-b954-dafa166f8190?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So when you see "1800" on a bottle, you're looking at more than a marketing hook. You're looking at a year when aging in oak became a metaphor for patience. When American democracy proved it could mature without collapsing. **It was the moment the republic chose ballots over bloodshed** --and our capital took root in a swamp that would, over time, become synonymous with power, ambition, and yes, corruption.
Today, those who toil in the city's political edifices more resemble Genghis Khan than they do either John Adams or Thomas Jefferson. An American Dark Ages we must end.
* * *
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=187702168&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg3NzAyMTY4LCJpYXQiOjE3NzEwOTczOTQsImV4cCI6MTc3MzY4OTM5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4YJmBh5L3_wWiSziWnV-6wGmlzyCG9ErdIOivYR2HbM)
* * *
One year. Two origin stories. One about a spirit that gets better with age, and another about a nation still trying to prove its spirit can rise above those who purposefully divide it. Joe and I found a way to make Happy Hour...happy, so we could end the week with the kind of shots that don't infest a battlefield during a civil war.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5c104558-e823-4d03-a7c3-1bed3349948a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So watch Tequila Talk(!)--for the laughs and lessons!--either up at the top of the page on Substack or right below on Youtube.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c1de0dc8-bb62-495b-93c2-ea15fa184d17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Thank you [Ellie Leonard](https://open.substack.com/users/39376636-ellie-leonard?utm_source=mentions), [Noble Blend](https://open.substack.com/users/21659563-noble-blend?utm_source=mentions), [Dave from California](https://open.substack.com/users/313921534-dave-from-california?utm_source=mentions), [Lynn Germiller](https://open.substack.com/users/186889967-lynn-germiller?utm_source=mentions), [Melanie Canuck](https://open.substack.com/users/245412771-melanie-canuck?utm_source=mentions), and many others for tuning into my live video with [Cliff Schecter](https://open.substack.com/users/31941177-cliff-schecter?utm_source=mentions) and [Joe Walsh](https://open.substack.com/users/263371025-joe-walsh?utm_source=mentions)! Join me for my next live video in the app.
