clean_body: Watch now (54 mins) | Former GOP Rep. turned Never Trumper Joe Walsh & Cliff Schecter discuss Trump's billionaire predators, Jan 6, and their connection to the tequila Cliff drank, "1800" | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? | | Former GOP Rep. turned Never Trumper Joe Walsh & Cliff Schecter discuss Trump's billionaire predators, Jan 6, and their connection to the tequila Cliff drank, "1800" | | , , and | Feb 14 | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- Blue Amp Media is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support our work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. Cliff 's Note: From my new weekly show w/ Joe Walsh, Tequila Talk, which youmust watch every Thursday 6pm et. We both imbibe a drink we love, tell funny stories & connect the tequila of the day to our current politics. Tequila Talk w/ Joe Walsh & Cliff Schecter | | ---|---|--- The year 1800 in U.S. politics was a special one for a number of reasons particularly relevant today. Joe and I explained why, and I'm about to be redundant below, like Trump getting Hepatitis B. But let's take a step back for just a minute. There's something poetic about 1800 Tequila taking its name from the year tequila producers first began aging the spirit in oak casks--a year, coincidentally, Chuck Grassley also began aging himself in an oak cask. I digress. Before that, tequila was raw, immediate, a punch to the senses. But aging it in oak? That added depth, character, patience. Time became an ingredient. The brand leans into its history--11 generations of one family rooted in Jalisco, Mexico--built on 100% blue Weber agave, tied to the moment when craft met maturation. 1800 ain't a random date on a bottle, friends. It's about refinement. What happens when something fiery's forced to sit still long enough to develop complexity. | | ---|---|--- American History: 1800 | | ---|---|--- Now here's where American history wanders into the cantina. The year 1800 wasn't just about oak barrels in Mexico. It was the year of the first peaceful transfer of power between political parties in the United States --when John Adams handed the presidency to hated rival, Thomas Jefferson, after a bitter election. It may not sound revolutionary, but in a world drenched in coups, crowns, and guillotines, it was a shock to the system. Our young republic proved then it could survive partisan rage without reaching for muskets--unlike, say, the guy in the "Camp Auschwitz" sweatshirt, Jim Jordan, googly-eyes Kash Patel, the weirdo QAnon Shaman wearing the horns, and the bloated, goat-carcass serving as President of the United States then and now, sadly, 220 years later. It was democracy aged in oak instead of exploding in gunpowder. 1800 marked another transition: the federal government moved from Philadelphia to the newly constructed capital of Washington, D.C. The capital had been in New York City in our early years, but the Founders wanted to separate financial from political power after watching Europe's elite, cocksure cretins blend the two into a cocktail of corruption. They didn't want Wall Street and Congress sharing a lunch table. So the government migrated south--into what was, quite literally, a swamp along the Potomac. The symbolism writes itself. A brand-new experiment in self-government was planted in wetlands, surrounded by mud and mosquitoes, hoping their idealism would outpace nature's decay. | | ---|---|--- So when you see "1800" on a bottle, you're looking at more than a marketing hook. You're looking at a year when aging in oak became a metaphor for patience. When American democracy proved it could mature without collapsing. It was the moment the republic chose ballots over bloodshed --and our capital took root in a swamp that would, over time, become synonymous with power, ambition, and yes, corruption. Today, those who toil in the city's political edifices more resemble Genghis Khan than they do either John Adams or Thomas Jefferson. An American Dark Ages we must end. One year. Two origin stories. One about a spirit that gets better with age, and another about a nation still trying to prove its spirit can rise above those who purposefully divide it. Joe and I found a way to make Happy Hour...happy, so we could end the week with the kind of shots that don't infest a battlefield during a civil war. | | ---|---|--- So watch Tequila Talk(!)--for the laughs and lessons!--either up at the top of the page on Substack or right below on Youtube. Thank you , , , , , and many others for tuning into my live video with and ! Join me for my next live video in the app. | | ---|---|--- You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

name: James Talarico HQ
subject: A great rebuke to billionaire and corporate mega-donors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
$5. That’s the donation James needs you to make today to win the Democratic primary on March 3.
If you already understand that billionaire and corporate donors are doing everything they can to stop James because they know he is our best chance to take back Texas, then please use this link to contribute today:
**[https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/take-back-Texas](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260214-1-ak&t=1&akid=446%2E1347274%2Ed7OW2M)**
Otherwise, here’s the latest, Peter:
With 3 days until early voting, Politico just reported that a brand new super PAC is preparing to spend at least $1 MILLION on ads attacking James.
Reporting suggests this is being funded by one billionaire donor who could invest millions more to stop James without even thinking about it.
We knew these attacks were coming. James said when we launched this race that the status quo would fight back. That’s the risk that comes with picking a fight with the billionaire and corporate mega-donors who buy politicians and rig the system.
But our movement will not go down without a fight. We have proven time and time again that people-power can go toe to toe with the wealthy, powerful interests who profit from the corruption.
This is going to be tough. Millions of dollars spent on last-minute false smears could drown us out. The ONLY way we will have the resources to overcome it is with folks like you giving what you can.
**[So please, use this link to contribute $5 to James Talarico’s campaign for U.S. Senate. We need a huge number of donations to send a powerful rebuke that this seat is not for sale. We cannot let billionaire and corporate donors buy another election in Texas.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q1.AKJ3HX&refcode=em260214-1-ak&t=2&akid=446%2E1347274%2Ed7OW2M)**

subject: He's treating New Jerseyans like a bargaining chip
body:
Just to get his name on a train station

| |
---
Hi friend, Let’s be very clear about what’s happening right now: **This administration is holding New Jerseyans and New Yorkers hostage!** **First** , we secured funding for the Gateway Tunnel. A critical infrastructure project for our region. This investment will mean safer commutes, stronger economic growth, and reliable transit for hundreds of thousands of people. Everyone knows it needs to be built. **Then** , when NJ and NY Democrats refused to bow down to the administration, they decided to punish us. They pulled back Gateway funding to avenge their petty political grievances. That money belongs to New Jersey, and they are holding it hostage to score partisan points. _**Now** , President Trump is saying that he will release the money if we rename New York’s Penn Station to Trump Station. _ This is a gross abuse of power. It puts our economy at risk, hurts working people, and undermines trust in government. Plus, thousands of workers are losing their jobs right now. _Nellie is fighting back. She is demanding answers, pushing for the release of these funds, and calling out this corruption for exactly what it is._ But to really put the pressure on and stop this madness, we have to take back the House and restore accountability in Washington. **[We’re fed up with this administration abusing power and stealing from New Jersey families. name: Mazie Hirono
subject: I voted no
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
No guardrails, no funding. It’s that simple, Peter. We cannot have a federal agency that acts with such lawlessness and zero accountability — kidnapping people off the streets, ripping families apart, and killing people in broad daylight. **That’s why I voted AGAINST allowing ICE to continue to terrorize our communities without measures in place to protect people.** So-called ICE agents should _not_ wear masks. They _should_ have bodycams. They must be required to have warrants before barging into people’s homes. These are common-sense guardrails that would keep people safe from ICE, but Republicans would rather shut down the Department of Homeland Security than do anything to hold this regime accountable. [**I voted no, and I will continue voting no until ICE is under control. If you agree that Congress should not fund DHS until Republicans join Democrats in reigning in the chaos of this regime, please add your name to my petition today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125403537/601673605/-2110619788?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260214_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTY2YWRmOC1kZDA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N0PDVvA52e-odAkbUVpB7fWE7zErfpABYCkiQzIiV7A=&emci=422d4037-dc09-f111-832e-0022482a9733&emdi=1966adf8-dd09-f111-832e-0022482a9733&ceid=23190490) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125403538/601673606/-2110619788?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260214_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTY2YWRmOC1kZDA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N0PDVvA52e-odAkbUVpB7fWE7zErfpABYCkiQzIiV7A=&emci=422d4037-dc09-f111-832e-0022482a9733&emdi=1966adf8-dd09-f111-832e-0022482a9733&ceid=23190490)

clean_body: | No guardrails, no funding. It’s that simple, Peter. We cannot have a federal agency that acts with such lawlessness and zero accountability — kidnapping people off the streets, ripping families apart, and killing people in broad daylight. That’s why I voted AGAINST allowing ICE to continue to terrorize our communities without measures in place to protect people. So-called ICE agents should not wear masks. They should have bodycams. They must be required to have warrants before barging into people’s homes. These are common-sense guardrails that would keep people safe from ICE, but Republicans would rather shut down the Department of Homeland Security than do anything to hold this regime accountable. | People have had enough of ICE’s reckless behavior. Enough is enough. Thank you for standing with me. — Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

This is a direct attack on our democracy, and we can't afford to look away. But it also reveals something crucial: _Donald Trump knows he's weak -- and he believes he'd lose a free and fair midterm election!_

So it's our job to **make sure Trump's worst fear comes true.** We MUST win big in November, and that work starts by ensuring that EVERY Democrat is standing opposed to Trump and his GOP cronies! We've launched an URGENT Live Petition to galvanize support for democracy, **but we need 83 more signatures in Pennsylvania by midnight -- please:**

Thank you for subscribing to The Angry Democrat, and especially if you are a paid supporter, because this post is for you. This week I put out a run of articles that sparked real heat and real conversation online, and some of it got contentious fast, which is exactly why I wanted to keep this recap and my personal commentary exclusive to the people who are actually backing the work. You are not just paying for words on a screen, you are funding the freedom to say things plainly, take the hits that come with it, and keep pushing into the topics a lot of people would rather silence or sanitize. If you are on the fence about becoming a supporter, this is what you are supporting: independent writing, independent analysis, and the ability to scale what I am building here, because I have big plans for where this goes next and I want the growth to be driven by readers, not gatekeepers.

clean_body: I just stepped out of the Oval Office to send you this | | | | Forget the middle man. I wanted you to hear this DIRECTLY from me! Thanks to YOU , a year ago I was inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States. We’ve done SO much, and it’s truly been aHELL OF A RIDE. Our border is SHUT , gas prices have hit a FIVE-YEAR LOW , inflation is UNDER CONTROL , the economy is BOOMING , and the USA is finally RESPECTED again. The Democrats CAN’T STAND that the American people are winning again, and they’ll USE EVERY DIRTY TACTIC possible to destroy our progress. And make no mistake, Patriot: when they come after me, they’re really coming after YOU! I’m just standing in their way. We’ve been through HELL together, andNOTHING has torn our bond apart. Unlike the Democrats, I UNDERSTAND how much you love our country and how hard you work every day to live the American dream. And I NEVER forget who I’m fighting for: YOU! Together, we will finish what we started. Together, we will keep MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. — President Donald J. name: Joey Czajkowski, AZ Dems
subject: Happy Arizona Statehood Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
Today marks 114 years since Arizona became a state. Here's what we're fighting for. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125404566/601677787/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20260214_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTBmMTJkYzAtZTAwOS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=McIE4an_UvUF6u1WfRlsKwYKBceGggW0PzsNUfKwmfY=)
---
Hey there, Joey here. Today marks 114 years since Arizona became the 48th state on February 14, 1912. It's a good day to reflect on what kind of Arizona we're fighting for. Are we building an Arizona where election officials are driven out by threats and harassment, or one where they're supported and respected? Are we building an Arizona where hospitals police their patients' residency status, or one where everyone can seek care without fear? clean_body: Today marks 114 years since Arizona became a state. Here's what we're fighting for. | = Hey there, Joey here. Today marks 114 years since Arizona became the 48th state on February 14, 1912. It's a good day to reflect on what kind of Arizona we're fighting for. Are we building an Arizona where election officials are driven out by threats and harassment, or one where they're supported and respected? Are we building an Arizona where hospitals police their patients' residency status, or one where everyone can seek care without fear? Are we building an Arizona where the Secretary of State allows Trump’s DOJ to steal Arizonans private voter data for nefarious purposes, or one where leaders like Adrian Fontes protect our privacy? Are we building an Arizona where Republicans attend white nationalist events and then have the audacity to call Democrats "radical," or one where we stand up against extremism? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately | | = = | = = | = = 114 years ago, Arizona became a state. name: H. Stevens
subject: This is important, null
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
In moments like this, it means a lot to have you with me

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=2244%2E49239%2Em516nh)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14007?t=2&akid=2244%2E49239%2Em516nh)
---
Null, it's Haley. Please read:

**I’m calling for the impeachment of Kristi Noem as secretary of Homeland Security.**
This is a critical moment for our country, and we need political courage from both Republicans and Democrats.
I was left with no choice after Secretary Noem ignored my repeated calls to open investigations into the murder of Renee Nicole Good in Minneapolis, the death of Nenko Gantchev, a detainee at the North Lake Processing Center in Baldwin, Michigan, and, most recently, the killing of Alex Pretti late last month.

Over the last year, Secretary Noem’s leadership has been reckless, chaotic, and corrupt. Under her purview, our country is less safe. It’s time for accountability.
In moments like this, it means a lot to have you with me, null. Please respond to my live poll now to let me know if you agree:
**DO YOU APPROVE OF KRISTI NOEM?**
| | | [YES](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14008?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=2244%2E49239%2Em516nh)
---
| [NO](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14008?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=2244%2E49239%2Em516nh)
---
Thank you,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14009?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=2244%2E49239%2Em516nh) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/14007?t=6&akid=2244%2E49239%2Em516nh)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Team,

Donald Trump and his administration will do whatever it takes to silence their perceived political enemies.

When Jason stood up for the Constitution and the rule of law, Trump called for Jason to be arrested, prosecuted, and even executed.

Then the President’s three stooges–Kash Patel, Pam Bondi, and Jeanine Pirro–are using the FBI and DOJ to try and silence Jason. They even tried to get a grand jury to indict him on false charges. Thankfully, a group of anonymous citizens serving on the grand jury rejected their political retribution. But they aren’t backing down.

Jason is fighting to protect free speech, defend our democracy, and flip the House blue this November. The attacks will only ramp up between now and Election Day — and we have to be ready to fight back.

name: Alex Kelloff
subject: All the things I love
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2602-q1-ak [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2602-q1-ak]
Happy Valentine's Day, friends!
I’m thinking about all the things I love about our district — the small mountain towns, our breathtaking natural landscape and outdoor spaces, our rich history, and the hardworking communities that make this place so special to me.
The way neighbors here show up for one another, even when times are tough. There’s no other place I’d rather be, and I’m so proud to call CO-03 home.
That’s why I’m committed to fighting for the home I love so much. If you’re with me, join me in building a brighter future for our great state by pitching in today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2602-q1-ak?]
PITCH IN » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2602-q1-ak]
Supporters like you are the heart of this campaign, and together, I know we can flip this seat blue.
Thanks for everything. I hope you get to spend the day with the people you love most.
Alex

Sarah relies on grassroots donations to keep up the fight, and right now we’re falling behind on our mid-month goal.
# [](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1269?t=1&akid=2827%2E21716%2EiktYC6)
Hi, Happy Valentine’s Day! 💌
Love is about showing up — for the people and neighbors in our lives and for our communities.
That’s what Delawareans sent Sarah to Congress to do: fight for affordable health care, child care, good-paying jobs, and a government that works for working families. And that’s exactly what she’s doing.
Sarah relies on grassroots donations to keep up the fight, and right now we’re falling behind on our mid-month goal.
[**Will you show our campaign a little love and chip in $5 before our midnight deadline to keep Sarah in Congress? Right now, we’re just $2,500 short.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260214-1.ZjFFAh&refcode=em20260214-2827&amount=5&t=2&akid=2827%2E21716%2EiktYC6)

Sarah McBride HQ

Hometown water supply in danger
[Mark as Spam](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xul=6zs1j7t5dhe4avz97uxx7mw1unt0t02tvusy4wnqrgpf0w5k7dkomc7tqarqcy7lyzdrrprnmubbmpuylkv0euano7tte038mlzr696z9i7c5nuu50&__stmp=tagtvl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xul=6zs1j7t5dhe4avz97uxx7mw1unt0t02tvusy4wnqrgpf0w5k7dkomc7tqarqcy7lyzdrrprnmubbmpuylkv0euano7tte038mlzr696z9i7c5nuu50&__stmp=tagtvl&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
**FBI's Urgent Warning Sounds the Alarm** America's enemies have found a way to strike without firing a single shot. Hackers are attacking city water systems, overriding safety protocols to weaponize our utilities against us and positioning themselves to strike when the signal comes. National security experts warn China isn't alone. Iran, Russia and North Korea are preparing coordinated attacks. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems we trust to keep us safe. **Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link.** Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... _**But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.**_ If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like...
* **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.**
* If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water.
* **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.**
* Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out.
* **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.**
* Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it.

Well we have great news to share! Folks have been calling... Folks have been emailing... Folks have been leaving Facebook messages asking about our just-released... **NEW AND IMPROVED...** [**NEW Ultra-Fast MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System!**](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xtl=33jta6ngemj2pvzun58o296f2nhjpkhl9dybazvgsnkx4tnf66i10v49z16p6a6jkswz8i3kznq2f7er0n8o0bi3n7uds6rvg9387nsjcanqbd62g3grescrbvvqmbm11u6r0cd1r9ccxgq1dvd31wlkyuopioktur8w6bvjk28qzkt7upqcucer0fdyvcijxm6tkvtc3htxsmo49dgtraoykq5x5l4njitqt1ll64bc2uop3rrmvwixrtsxf9a&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tagtvl&__onlt=h) **5X Faster Flow Rate for Perfect, Delicious Drinking Water** [](https://trk.americanmediawatchdog.com/?xtl=33jta6ngemj2pvzun58o296f2nhjpkhl9dybazvgsnkx4tnf66i10v49z16p6a6jkswz8i3kznq2f7er0n8o0bi3n7uds6rvg9387nsjcanqbd62g3grescrbvvqmbm11u6r0cd1r9ccxgq1dvd31wlkyuopioktur8w6bvjk28qzkt7upqcucer0fdyvcijxm6tkvtc3htxsmo49dgtraoykq5x5l4njitqt1ll64bc2uop3rrmvwixrtsxf9a&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=tagtvl&__onlt=h) **But hurry – we have limited stock, and this MegaFlow Ultimate Water Filtration System is first-come first-served. subject: The numbers aren’t breaking their way anymore

They even asked: _" Ever heard of Turning Point?" _

Yes. They have.

Because Charlie cracked the code -- and it works.

**Knock more doors. Chase more ballots. Win more races. **

That's the math.

And the Left knows it's beating them.

Because while they talk, we train. While they protest, we're building.

Every day, we're training new Chase the Vote patriots -- men and women who know that a yard sign won't win an election...

_**... but a ballot chaser will. **_

Doors. Ballots. Early. Often.

_It 's that simple. _

Saving America starts NOW -- not later.

We have the upper hand, for now. But we can't let the radical Left claw their way back to power.

**So here 's my ask, Fellow Patriot: every $50 you give today helps train and deploy ONE ballot chaser into a battleground state. **

subject: I’m in for the fight of my political life

body:
No map, no matter how unfair, can silence the people of Missouri or stop me from fighting for them — but I need you by my side.
Hi Peter, this is Congressman Emanuel Cleaver from Missouri’s 5th District.
**First:** Republicans forced through an illegal and unconstitutional redistricted map in Missouri – eliminating my district and forcing me into a **_“Strong Republican”_** seat.
**Then:** Missourians fought back – delivering 305k signatures rejecting this rigged, gerrymandered map.
**Now: Radical Republicans are fighting the voters' will in court.** They aren’t giving up, but _neither are we!_
**No map, no matter how unfair, can silence the people of Missouri or stop me from fighting for them — but I need you by my side.**
**[Peter, I’m in for the fight of my political life. This seat is crucial in the path to a Democratic majority, and I can’t defend it alone. Can you please help me fight back and split a donation of $10 between Heartland Patriots and my campaign today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/100340?refcode=em20260214-10057&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1&akid=10057%2E614464%2EZagOOD)**

name: Enrique (Heidi's husband)
subject: My forever Valentine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260214_em_fr_b1_EHH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260214_em_fr_b1_EHH_standard]
Friend, it's Enrique, Heidi Hall's husband.
Heidi is my forever Valentine, and I want to do everything that I can to help mi amor win this race.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260214_em_fr_b1_EHH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260214_em_fr_b1_EHH_standard]
Friend, Heidi's one of the strongest people I know, and her dedication to helping others is one of my favorite things about her.
From her time in the EPA to her time serving our communities as a Nevada County Supervisor, she's always put others first and tried her hardest to make a real difference.
This race for Congress is important to her because she knows that this is our opportunity to move on from the toxic politics that have taken over Washington and finally be able to start making progress for our communities.
Friend, I'm writing this email today because I want to do everything that I can to help my Valentine win this election. Can you donate to Heidi's campaign for Congress today and help her build up the resources she needs to win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260214_em_fr_b1_EHH_standard]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260214_em_fr_b1_EHH_standard]
Thank you,
Enrique
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260214_em_fr_b1_EHH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260214_em_fr_b1_EHH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260214_em_fr_b1_EHH_standard]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

_**I need to reach my $50,000 goal during this mid-month fundraising push, but we still have a lot of work left to hit our goal – so I’m coming to you urgently for help, Peter.**_
We need the resources to keep our campaign strong because, quite honestly, I’m facing the toughest election of my life. The hard truth is that lawless super PACs have already spent _$7 million_ to support my opponent — and have been caught breaking the law.

name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: Cracked Eggs in Karachi, Big Dreams
body:
Despite not reading English he answered ‘C’ all the way down and passed his taxi test.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011lWYrg9HPY0Iy8bHguJQNbLNbMq36Vt4t1AHhK2uHLMPO_vhpsc4kYp1zQ7KPMaCul71hyhfitYew-cLDJUzS0ILfBPFKY3kC6ruX1O2trmRDNJhZuafl2mfWiSFT51Ns1BhLchQgN_z7cm2_eQx9cdUoKpc4yRE92Vezjo3rNPWX5ZYaDgh8dgbG8L77uQBCQdZbjwNyqaEYzFGTeD3B50zBRagDEUJ&c=iDF7egqIg996PQ_1XpIW-6fpWHNBrviL5XZuy7SyNEp3ES9GM9J9Xw==&ch=52MUh-1Xk_ahAk3IMXjcf0wyKILyKPB7lgTU4uhYoTS2-z5dDD0kCg==)
---
|
Peter,
My dad, Shabbir Amiwala, grew up poor in Karachi, Pakistan. His first job as a boy was selling eggs in the market. Each day, he would bring home the cracked ones for him and his sisters to share the following morning. Eggs were a luxury.
He dreamt of a better life, so he came to America to chase the American Dream. By pure luck, the taxi driver who picked him up from the airport spoke Urdu and connected him to a job at a restaurant called The Burger Lounge. He worked as a busboy, then as a line cook, and later as a taxi driver -- passing the taxi exam by answering "C" all the way down, despite not being able to read English.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011lWYrg9HPY0Iy8bHguJQNbLNbMq36Vt4t1AHhK2uHLMPO_vhpsc4kYp1zQ7KPMaCul71hyhfitYew-cLDJUzS0ILfBPFKY3kC6ruX1O2trmRDNJhZuafl2mfWiSFT51Ns1BhLchQgN_z7cm2_eQx9cdUoKpc4yRE92Vezjo3rNPWX5ZYaDgh8dgbG8L77uQBCQdZbjwNyqbMbvt-6ofEnJ0cS-QW9dDa&c=iDF7egqIg996PQ_1XpIW-6fpWHNBrviL5XZuy7SyNEp3ES9GM9J9Xw==&ch=52MUh-1Xk_ahAk3IMXjcf0wyKILyKPB7lgTU4uhYoTS2-z5dDD0kCg==)
---
After years of driving a cab, he saved enough to open a men's clothing store -- a milestone that, to him, was the embodiment of the American Dream.
When I was born, he took on debt so our family could move just three miles north, so I could attend better schools in Skokie. That's how much he valued education. Decades later I would be elected to serve on the school board of the very same schools that he sacrificed so much to get me into.

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011lWYrg9HPY0Iy8bHguJQNbLNbMq36Vt4t1AHhK2uHLMPO_vhpsc4kYp1zQ7KPMaCul71hyhfitYew-cLDJUzS0ILfBPFKY3kC6ruX1O2trmRDNJhZuafl2mfWiSFT51Ns1BhLchQgN_z7cm2_eQx9cdUoKpc4yRE92Vezjo3rNPWX5ZYaDgh8dgbG8L77uQBCQdZbjwNyqYkehNuPRNLrWyqo8VWJMBC&c=iDF7egqIg996PQ_1XpIW-6fpWHNBrviL5XZuy7SyNEp3ES9GM9J9Xw==&ch=52MUh-1Xk_ahAk3IMXjcf0wyKILyKPB7lgTU4uhYoTS2-z5dDD0kCg==)
---
| From him, I learned three important lessons:

* Gratitude -- for every meal, every chance.

* Faith -- what's meant for you won't miss you. (Like the Urdu-speaking taxi driver who helped him land his first job in Chicago.)

* The notion that you can build a foundation as you walk on it.

That last lesson -- building a foundation as you walk on it -- is exactly what we are doing together on this campaign. It started with a dream and we've already built it into a front-running campaign, there's still much more work to be done but we'll continue building up everyday.
With the American Dream that my father fought to achieve under attack this campaign is needed now more than ever.
[Will you make a contribution of whatever you can spare to help me keep fighting for opportunity, education, and the belief that every family deserves a fair shot?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011lWYrg9HPY0Iy8bHguJQNbLNbMq36Vt4t1AHhK2uHLMPO_vhpsc4kYp1zQ7KPMaCD9Re6ZyFvocyzCzgbpHXg0WrediLC6k8Ulp1FlnYxbrqlBpt4jegLV_qtwPImDaTHsT2Nne_A7g8xt-IMNKKdd-mOzIRTgIK8q0tXr_gqaoswLClY3xhEyR10GKnzWsoqw6sUQqm1avbiaccVc_vIubbSGWGahMuIGdCggGuceo=&c=iDF7egqIg996PQ_1XpIW-6fpWHNBrviL5XZuy7SyNEp3ES9GM9J9Xw==&ch=52MUh-1Xk_ahAk3IMXjcf0wyKILyKPB7lgTU4uhYoTS2-z5dDD0kCg==)
---

clean_body: Despite not reading English he answered ‘C’ all the way down and passed his taxi test. | | | | | == | Peter, My dad, Shabbir Amiwala, grew up poor in Karachi, Pakistan. His first job as a boy was selling eggs in the market. Each day, he would bring home the cracked ones for him and his sisters to share the following morning. Eggs were a luxury. He dreamt of a better life, so he came to America to chase the American Dream. By pure luck, the taxi driver who picked him up from the airport spoke Urdu and connected him to a job at a restaurant called The Burger Lounge. He worked as a busboy, then as a line cook, and later as a taxi driver -- passing the taxi exam by answering "C" all the way down, despite not being able to read English. | == After years of driving a cab, he saved enough to open a men's clothing store -- a milestone that, to him, was the embodiment of the American Dream. When I was born, he took on debt so our family could move just three miles north, so I could attend better schools in Skokie. That's how much he valued education. Decades later I would be elected to serve on the school board of the very same schools that he sacrificed so much to get me into. | | == | From him, I learned three important lessons: Gratitude -- for every meal, every chance. Faith -- what's meant for you won't miss you. (Like the Urdu-speaking taxi driver who helped him land his first job in Chicago.) * The notion that you can build a foundation as you walk on it. That last lesson -- building a foundation as you walk on it -- is exactly what we are doing together on this campaign. It started with a dream and we've already built it into a front-running campaign, there's still much more work to be done but we'll continue building up everyday. With the American Dream that my father fought to achieve under attack this campaign is needed now more than ever. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Gratefully, | | == | Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-9 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

name: Key Race Alert
subject: Dems can’t let this race go under the radar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dQKTpniRfxUHGXH-syn6szFi2jmJK01ZHi5RSZasiUAXRPoNiLvpyFKoqlhCnvNAkHEG2QpRg2bYEc6cQiH0e6fnZlQCfh4gx6DOd4Ls9JrIrYep5xMMf5DrZ7uxAes9OCWgVUXBZ9Ap_bYYF3ZJ1LZr9rcvUSJSzCHqQ-VEWLkZZPAMytK3tAudWymofnt2yZSr8Hw99x2OZwnYM1xeFiD_pg8vZlqG0Q1A-9fPKMsN74JpgsvCVQ==&c=9sf3wAtLxNNOi0FaOdJ7hpaKel8dCn_pu2rdcEexTRL2o2aLCTfdpg==&ch=0CWnisWk-ZygO9RiiAvEsMygI9WdVPGxea16qqx2SaOa3q5rMa-rGA==)
---
| Peter,
The first major election of the year isn't getting enough attention from the media or Democrats.
On April 7th of this year, MAGA is desperately hoping to win a rubber match in the upcoming Wisconsin state Supreme Court race.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dQKTpniRfxUHGXH-syn6szFi2jmJK01ZHi5RSZasiUAXRPoNiLvpyFKoqlhCnvNAkHEG2QpRg2bYEc6cQiH0e6fnZlQCfh4gx6DOd4Ls9JrIrYep5xMMf5DrZ7uxAes9OCWgVUXBZ9Ap_bYYF3ZJ1LZr9rcvUSJSzCHqQ-VEWLkZZPAMytK3tAudWymofnt2yZSr8Hw99x2OZwnYM1xeFiD_pg8vZlqGVl-v1OzycjyAwTLw0T44Hg==&c=9sf3wAtLxNNOi0FaOdJ7hpaKel8dCn_pu2rdcEexTRL2o2aLCTfdpg==&ch=0CWnisWk-ZygO9RiiAvEsMygI9WdVPGxea16qqx2SaOa3q5rMa-rGA==)
---
This is a must-win for MAGA. After last year's massive win for Democrats, they now hold a 4-3 majority on the WI court. With a seat up for grabs this year, Democrats now have a chance to expand their majority to 5-2.
And more importantly, a win this April would lock down the court for Democrats until at least 2030, securing a key swing state court for the rest of Trump's presidency.
In 2025, Trump and MAGA attempted coups at the state level in Wisconsin and Pennsylvania. If they had seized control of those state Supreme Courts, they would have gained control over the body that has final say on election laws/results, allowing them to rig elections in these crucial states in their favor in 2026 and 2028.
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dQKTpniRfxUHGXH-syn6szFi2jmJK01ZHi5RSZasiUAXRPoNiLvpyFKoqlhCnvNAkHEG2QpRg2bYEc6cQiH0e6fnZlQCfh4gx6DOd4Ls9JrIrYep5xMMf5DrZ7uxAes9OCWgVUXBZ9Ap_bYYF3ZJ1LZr9rcvUSJSzCHqQ-VEWLkZZPAMytK3tAudWymofnt2yZSr8Hw99x2OZwnYM1xeFiD_pg8vZlqGC1s7b5prml4NS5Qe389zhg==&c=9sf3wAtLxNNOi0FaOdJ7hpaKel8dCn_pu2rdcEexTRL2o2aLCTfdpg==&ch=0CWnisWk-ZygO9RiiAvEsMygI9WdVPGxea16qqx2SaOa3q5rMa-rGA==)
---
The stakes in the PA Supreme Court race were existential for Democrats' 2028 hopes. But we rallied and won a decisive victory. We need the same energy in the upcoming WI race.
---

In PA, Defend Our Courts helped lead the defense of the liberal majority on the court. Despite millions of dollars spent by MAGA to try and take the court, Pennsylvanians turned out in record numbers and handed Democrats a 30+ point blowout victory.
In Philadelphia, where we concentrated much of our voter outreach along with digital and TV ads, turnout surged by 34%. That was the largest increase in the state.
We defended the PA court and kept the Democrats' 2028 chances alive. Now we're going on the offensive in Wisconsin to secure Dems' path back to the White House.
But we're seriously concerned this race could fly under the radar and MAGA could catch Dems completely off guard. We have to get started now. We emptied our warchest in PA and now we only have 4 months to prepare for WI. We must win this race to secure Dems' path back to the White House. So we're rallying Democrats again:
[Will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help defend the Wisconsin Supreme Court (again) and secure Democrats' path back to the White House in 2028?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dQKTpniRfxUHGXH-syn6szFi2jmJK01ZHi5RSZasiUAXRPoNiLvpyFKoqlhCnvNA00OTkqj4JfMPqSpJJZY_MzCKRVO3xB7zyJ6TJ9QjslvLYCNgQBIYr623LrKg1m3Pa-LXq_UVkBuomJZgUY-7v5Npk2ZS3gtzhujyVJETRA9wiQrp6kQczcxccM6aC8C76cJqj4WpvIwmqSyXfeI06JQ5NPy8FwzbD_DQG4wm2oWptEenyvXtHz-TisoyWWWE&c=9sf3wAtLxNNOi0FaOdJ7hpaKel8dCn_pu2rdcEexTRL2o2aLCTfdpg==&ch=0CWnisWk-ZygO9RiiAvEsMygI9WdVPGxea16qqx2SaOa3q5rMa-rGA==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, The first major election of the year isn't getting enough attention from the media or Democrats. On April 7th of this year, MAGA is desperately hoping to win a rubber match in the upcoming Wisconsin state Supreme Court race. | == This is a must-win for MAGA. After last year's massive win for Democrats, they now hold a 4-3 majority on the WI court. With a seat up for grabs this year, Democrats now have a chance to expand their majority to 5-2. And more importantly, a win this April would lock down the court for Democrats until at least 2030, securing a key swing state court for the rest of Trump's presidency. In 2025, Trump and MAGA attempted coups at the state level in Wisconsin and Pennsylvania. If they had seized control of those state Supreme Courts, they would have gained control over the body that has final say on election laws/results, allowing them to rig elections in these crucial states in their favor in 2026 and 2028. | == The stakes in the PA Supreme Court race were existential for Democrats' 2028 hopes. But we rallied and won a decisive victory. We need the same energy in the upcoming WI race. In PA, Defend Our Courts helped lead the defense of the liberal majority on the court. Despite millions of dollars spent by MAGA to try and take the court, Pennsylvanians turned out in record numbers and handed Democrats a 30+ point blowout victory. In Philadelphia, where we concentrated much of our voter outreach along with digital and TV ads, turnout surged by 34%. That was the largest increase in the state. We defended the PA court and kept the Democrats' 2028 chances alive. Now we're going on the offensive in Wisconsin to secure Dems' path back to the White House. But we're seriously concerned this race could fly under the radar and MAGA could catch Dems completely off guard. We have to get started now. We emptied our warchest in PA and now we only have 4 months to prepare for WI. We must win this race to secure Dems' path back to the White House. So we're rallying Democrats again: == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | | | | == | In solidarity, Team Defend our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. name: Brianna Titone For Colorado
subject: The Only Thing Stronger Than Hate Is Love 💕
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer, Registered Agent Brianna Titone
body:
Love is all around us!

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us17.campaign-archive.com/?e=8249791cac&u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=3457c096cd)
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=7c7833e9c1&e=8249791cac)
| | | | | | Hi, Peter,On this Valentine’s Day, I’m thinking a lot about love and how it impacts our world. There’s romantic love, of course, but I’m more thinking about the love of compassion, empathy. Love thy neighbor. The love of differences and similarities alike. The love of community, of place; the love of country. I believe we should all aspire to love our neighbors in the way we have seen others do in our darkest moments - from those who helped create and hide the Underground Railroad, to the mutual aid and unity we see coming out of Minneapolis - but also in the everyday ways we help each other in small acts that make up our lives. We have seen extraordinary examples of love over the history of our country. Most recently, Coloradans have come together to protect their neighbors, support Minnesota, and fight for democracy. The time will come when we can all sit and talk and work towards not needing to persevere through such times, but until then, we should all aspire to be and embody the brotherly love so much of this country was founded on. I’m proud of our communities and our country. I think that we have shown - and continue to show - love by supporting each other, by helping where we can, and by looking for the helpers when we need it. Standing shoulder to shoulder as Coloradans and as Americans. That's what my life, time in office, and Campaign have been and will always be about. We the people, must save each other. Happy Valentine’s Day.In solidarity,
**Brianna Titone**
Brianna for Colorado State Treasurer

_🔗**Learn more & join the campaign:**_[__](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=1399c65c53&e=8249791cac)[_www.briannaforco.com_](https://briannaforcolorado.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e7333941d4549e2ed73aa08fb&id=cbe7b1c0e5&e=8249791cac)

---

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=d17b3604a4c64edebe1f948b905c887c&_e=Y-b1i_S9urIpBnB04BlDhFcl6cS6fjEwuvBq1oX5-oeoZerNQNqbhRllWIIdwiMeyqNKhc7tEqQ4ifO-ABq1HKjkvb93_x6JMUMuYTtSyTWcYGyU_qBE2x8Mh6tBKAZmX-CiO-6aQtvUR5oX8yNYQ13Dh4xYUREV-fB8sK5Gj9Md6_IsRLgLq6GLMjdt5E2UOWfAoozoNY16a9krwzEIm-XkH1DWco8HE1KytCKkN-2KAGip0IZxHFsvmH8joYIcp4vO51HkyFx1wQ_clTryyc75fwOPth8NZtQKOcLPRR_HiqAILCc7v5K5Vu0Nqf_tp34KivWhwyw6qeFjT5xeYzSzaRW6TPwp5xp9ag4lOylIzbkUI1_Bjow7FdjUAptuUDrXMdCu_rAUSobLK-5SqtlNP5tGoF3nD4jRalVbkxIzUsKEEUhqsCUxJQzOT2Jw_sys1s1GDgswenhle0ZwctTtM5elQcKvDJH5XYwF33goEflLMZAqsq-efccYtbE5gZ4-bvK4XGpyDgZfcawdgRvmEYl7wFDPan7uSdwFW4TbADQpzddsfiJP9RbHiB5JXnVhmqQDeG4mMEZmZugurw%3D%3D)

subject: Congratulations!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I have decided to present you with the Trump Patriot Medal!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
## **CONGRATULATIONS Friend,**

There is no greater honor in the world to me than serving as President of the United States. Every day, I work tirelessly to **[MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
I would not have been able to do any of this without you, and I want to share a very special honor with you!
**This is why I have decided to present you with the****Trump Patriot Medal:**
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
This is one of the greatest honors in the Trump World. JD Vance, Marco Rubio, and Karoline Leavitt have this award.
**_[To claim this honor, simply contribute before my critical mid-month fundraising deadline.](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

[CLAIM TRUMP PATRIOT MEDAL](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
I cannot thank you enough for your unwavering support. Together, we will continue to usher in a new era of **AMERICAN GREATNESS!**
[MAGA!](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you for everything, and congratulations!
President Trump

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: From: Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
Like any favor from Trump, it came with strings attached.
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-feb26.oH05rx&amount=14&refcode=MB_EM_FR_021426_B1_Valentine&t=2&akid=5845%2E196590%2EjwsQb0) Friend, while many of us are exchanging cards or enjoying chocolates today, Trump already sent out his Valentine’s Day card early. Not to Melania, but to GOP frontrunner Tom Tiffany. Last month, Trump’s love letter to Tom Tiffany came in the form of a public endorsement. And like any gesture from Trump, it came with strings attached and an expectation of loyalty to his far-right agenda. [**Wisconsin deserves better than a toxic affair with Trump and Tiffany’s extremism – if you agree, will you chip in $14 to help me stand up for working families and keep Wisconsin moving forward?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-feb26.oH05rx&amount=14&refcode=MB_EM_FR_021426_B1_Valentine&t=3&akid=5845%2E196590%2EjwsQb0) | | [CHIP IN $14 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-feb26.oH05rx&amount=14&refcode=MB_EM_FR_021426_B1_Valentine&t=4&akid=5845%2E196590%2EjwsQb0)
---
As Trump’s puppet, Tom Tiffany will keep answering to his billionaire backers and lining their pockets, while our communities keep tightening their monthly budgets just to make ends meet.
That doesn’t sound like love for Wisconsin to me.
But Trump’s endorsement means that national MAGA money and outside groups are already flooding Wisconsin with attacks and misinformation, so we can’t afford to hold anything back.
[**If you’re ready to break up this alliance between Donald Trump and Tom Tiffany, please chip in $14 – or any amount you can – to power a grassroots campaign that answers only to the people of Wisconsin.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-feb26.oH05rx&amount=14&refcode=MB_EM_FR_021426_B1_Valentine&t=5&akid=5845%2E196590%2EjwsQb0)
| [CHIP IN $14 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-feb26.oH05rx&amount=14&refcode=MB_EM_FR_021426_B1_Valentine&t=6&akid=5845%2E196590%2EjwsQb0)
---
Thanks for being in my corner,
Mandela Barnes

| | [ CONTRIBUTE NOW » ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6525?source_code=&t=1&akid=5845%2E196590%2EjwsQb0)
---

Milwaukee, WI 53209

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125406311/601683472/-441730885?refcode=em-2.14.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWE5MDQ3OC1lYjA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9UDLQfm_3yiYkw90n-_yS6fMqs5W4jXtLnef5T5-hA=) Hi Peter, it’s Eric’s partner, Shawn. Since it’s Valentine’s Day, I wanted to take a moment to reflect on what this campaign really means to us. Eric and I fell in love a long time ago, before he ever thought about running for office. Back then, he was forecasting storms and helping neighbors prepare for whatever was coming next. **That’s always been his calling: caring for people, even if they’re complete strangers.** **And today, he still does the same thing, just from a different platform.** He’s standing up to the political storms that so many of us face every day: rising hate crimes to voter intimidation, book bans, threats against LGBTQ+ families like ours... the list, unfortunately, goes on and on. Honestly, some of it has hit closer to home than we ever imagined. It’s not easy to see your partner attacked for simply being who he is. It’s not easy to hear political opponents paint our lives as some kind of threat or distraction. But what gives me strength – what gives _us_ strength – is knowing that so many people in IL-17 and across the country are standing with us. **Eric leads with love. Always has. And this campaign isn’t powered by fear or division — it’s powered by hope, and compassion, and a belief that everyone deserves to be seen and treated with dignity.** So on this Valentine’s Day, I just want to say thank you. For supporting him. For seeing him. And for helping us protect the kind of leadership our country needs more of right now. If you want to give this campaign a little love today, please consider making a contribution – whatever you can spare – to help him keep this seat blue and keep Eric fighting for every single person in our district. **[Which brings me to my least favorite part of this email. Eric is facing his final deadlines before the Illinois primaries, and we would sincerely appreciate $3 or more to show everyone that we can lead with compassion and a commitment to freedom for everyone. Your support, no matter the size, matters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125406312/601683473/-441730885?refcode=em-2.14.26-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWE5MDQ3OC1lYjA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9UDLQfm_3yiYkw90n-_yS6fMqs5W4jXtLnef5T5-hA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125406313/601683474/-441730885?refcode=em-2.14.26-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWE5MDQ3OC1lYjA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I9UDLQfm_3yiYkw90n-_yS6fMqs5W4jXtLnef5T5-hA=)

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Glass half full
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I like to think about the good we can accomplish

Derek, I like to think of myself as a pretty optimistic person. And even on the toughest days of this campaign, it’s the thought of continuing to get stuff done for the good people of Pennsylvania that keeps me going: Bringing down costs. Protecting our freedoms. Giving our kids a better future. **But Derek, it’s my responsibility to remember the negative consequences as well. It’s not fun to think about — but all of us need to know exactly what’s at stake.** If Pennsylvania elects a Republican Governor this year, our Commonwealth’s last line of defense will fall. The GOP could even win control of both houses of the Legislature. If that happens? Our Commonwealth could turn into a mirror of Washington’s chaos and cruelty. **That’s why I’m giving this election everything I’ve got, Derek. No off days. No second chances.** [_**It’s going to take all of us working together and doing our part to keep Pennsylvania moving forward — so I’m humbly asking: Will you make a donation of any size before tomorrow night? We need to raise $25,000 before midnight tomorrow to hit our goal, and we can’t hit that target without the help of folks like you.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125406377/601683690/-1395620021?refcode=email_021426_optimistic&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZkZjRjYy1lYjA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ej392ulbVH1tO_kbmHSw0fcko7M0pkE-QgcjzMPSZgM=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125406378/601683691/-1395620021?refcode=email_021426_optimistic&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjZkZjRjYy1lYjA5LWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ej392ulbVH1tO_kbmHSw0fcko7M0pkE-QgcjzMPSZgM=)

clean_body: I like to think about the good we can accomplish Derek, I like to think of myself as a pretty optimistic person. And even on the toughest days of this campaign, it’s the thought of continuing to get stuff done for the good people of Pennsylvania that keeps me going: Bringing down costs. Protecting our freedoms. Giving our kids a better future. But Derek, it’s my responsibility to remember the negative consequences as well. It’s not fun to think about — but all of us need to know exactly what’s at stake. If Pennsylvania elects a Republican Governor this year, our Commonwealth’s last line of defense will fall. The GOP could even win control of both houses of the Legislature. If that happens? Our Commonwealth could turn into a mirror of Washington’s chaos and cruelty. That’s why I’m giving this election everything I’ve got, Derek. No off days. name: Team Cooper
subject: 💌 A Valentine’s Day card for you
body:
💘
| | [ ](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5762?t=6&akid=566%2E124072%2EUJypcM)
---
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=1&akid=566%2E124072%2EUJypcM)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=566%2E124072%2EUJypcM)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=3&akid=566%2E124072%2EUJypcM)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=4&akid=566%2E124072%2EUJypcM)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=5&akid=566%2E124072%2EUJypcM)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

# [To Michigan, with love](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=187957894&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg3OTU3ODk0LCJpYXQiOjE3NzExMDU2MDUsImV4cCI6MTc3MzY5NzYwNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HJP-9Gar1_V0zRrUKIC_-89HBLBp64ofepQ-nrOlUek)
### You are the reason I fight.
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Feb 14
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..ODfmXQvzPFggtd_kZ64LMZfN9GGNN2RtJKn0ZGD85zM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/to-michigan-with-love?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Dear Michigan,
Happy Valentine's Day!
We've been together a long time, and by now, you know I believe in hard work, staying scrappy, and always remembering your North Star.
And for me, that's easy: It's you, Michigan.
I love this state. I love what I do. And I love _who_ I do it for.
For the autoworkers in Flint. The small-business owners in Pontiac. The teachers in Grand Rapids, the retirees in Marquette, the nurses in Grand Blanc. It's for the working families busting their tails every day in every corner of Michigan, all hoping to build a future where their kids can thrive.
It's for the Great Lakes, where we learned how to swim. The diners in Detroit, where we ate Coney dogs and built community. The games at Ford Field, summers in Traverse City, and the manufacturers across our state who put America on wheels.
**This campaign is for you, Michigan. It 's **_**always**_**been for you.**
You've always had my heart - when I was fighting for 200,000 jobs in the Obama administration, when I'm sitting at my desk in Congress, and right now as I ask you to help me have the honor of being your next U.S. senator - our state's chief lawmaker and champion.
Michigan, you've made me who I am.
You've taught me grit. Hard work. The value of listening to your neighbor, learning from your community, and then leading with the same doggedness that built this state brick by brick.
That's the Michigan way.
You've given me the strength it's going to take to win this race. We've got our work cut out for us, but I'm ready. I know who I'm fighting for.
It's you, Michigan. This place. My people.
So this Valentine's Day, I want to say _thank you_ - for reading, for believing, and for being part of this journey with me.
If you're with me, I'd be honored if you'd chip in to help keep this grassroots campaign going strong. Truly, I'd be grateful for any amount:
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/1eaa7d5f-6c6d-4e20-abdc-e30306509544?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
With love and grit from Michigan,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/1eaa7d5f-6c6d-4e20-abdc-e30306509544?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

---
| | | [Restack](https://substack..ODfmXQvzPFggtd_kZ64LMZfN9GGNN2RtJKn0ZGD85zM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Chris Pappas
subject: A personal message for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
My campaign doesn’t take money from corporate PACs. Instead, we’re powered by real Granite Staters.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=5118%2E582294%2E_Fuig1)
I wanted to send you a personal message.
National Republicans, MAGA megadonors, and corporate interests have gone all-in on the race for the Senate here in New Hampshire.
Our GOP opponent John Sununu has been bankrolled by Wall Street, Big Oil, and corporate PACs.
_That’s not who I work for._
**[We’re coming up against our February mid-month fundraising deadline and falling short of what we need to raise to keep up with Republicans. Will you chip in $5 before tomorrow at midnight to help us stay on track and push back against the corporate special interests trying to buy this seat?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260214_2.nCxR4U&refcode=em20260214-2&t=2&akid=5118%2E582294%2E_Fuig1)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260214_2.nCxR4U&amount=5&refcode=em20260214-2&t=21&akid=5118%2E582294%2E_Fuig1)**
My campaign doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs. Instead, we’re powered by grassroots donors like you.
From small business owners and teachers, to nurses and social workers, people across New Hampshire and the country are chipping in what they can to this campaign – because they want a leader who understands their lives and will fight for them.
**Our average donation in 2026 is just $27, and I’m proud of that.**
Republicans are raking in money from out-of-touch corporate interests and betting it will drown out the voices of Granite Staters.
I believe this grassroots team can win — but only if supporters like you step up today.
**[The strongest response to corporate PAC money is powerful grassroots support. With your $5 donation before tomorrow’s mid-month fundraising deadline, we can prove that New Hampshire isn’t for sale.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260214_2.nCxR4U&refcode=em20260214-2&t=22&akid=5118%2E582294%2E_Fuig1)**
Thank you,
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260214-2&t=23&refcode2=5118_582294__Fuig1&akid=5118%2E582294%2E_Fuig1)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=5118%2E582294%2E_Fuig1)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=25&akid=5118%2E582294%2E_Fuig1)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=5118%2E582294%2E_Fuig1)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Team Marlene
subject: We’ve come a long way
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=em_header [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=em_header]

Team,

For years, Arizona was written off by Democrats as a lost cause. We were once considered solidly Republican. But that story is no longer true.

Because of the work we’ve done together, Arizona now has some of the most competitive races in the entire country — races that could be decided by razor-thin margins.

We’ve already proven that organizing works, that grassroots efforts matter, and that when we invest in people, show up in every community, and do the hard work, we can shift outcomes and deliver victories that deliver change.

We can keep moving the needle to the left, but only if we keep showing up as we have been for years.

Our mid-month deadline is approaching, and we will need the same energy that helped turn Arizona blue to reach our goal. Can you chip in today so we can flip this district and continue the work we’ve started? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?refcode=26014_tm_mm1]

Give $25 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=26014_tm_mm1] Give $50 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mgw_em?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=26014_tm_mm1]

Thank you,

Team Marlene
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/106088/images/Marlene.png]

About Marlene Galan-Woods
Marlene Galán-Woods is a former broadcast journalist and mother of five who has lived in Arizona for the past 36 years. Her parents fled communist Cuba looking for a better life. Their risk paid off and allowed Marlene to pursue her career as a broadcast journalist which brought her to Arizona. She met the love of her life, Grant Woods, and they raised a family together before he passed away in 2021. Marlene is running for Congress to stand up to extremists and be a voice for all Arizonans. If elected, Marlene will be the first Latina to represent Arizona's 1st district in Congress.

subject: I'm pissed
body:

Peter, I'm pissed!
Jack Schlossberg here — candidate for Congress in NY-12. Donald Trump just announced he's going to rename the Kennedy Center after HIMSELF.
Will you help send me to Congress to stand up to his dictator B.S. by splitting a donation between my campaign and Outrage then Action PAC? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=021426_2]
This isn't the first time Trump has tried to erase my grandfather President Kennedy's legacy, and it won't be the last.
I want to fight for the things that ACTUALLY matter in Congress — things like health care, the environment, and affordable housing. I'll have zero part in propping up Trump's narcissism.
Send me to Congress to smoke these fools! I won't be intimidated or back down. Join the momentum and split a donation of $25, $10, or even $5 between myself and Outrage then Action PAC right now: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=021426_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jack Schlossberg and Outrage then Action PAC will go through immediately:

I don’t sugarcoat it when I’m going face-to-face with the most _**CORRUPT**_ Swamp creatures in Washington. I’m used to their attacks. I’ve grown accustomed to their lies and deceit to try and take me out. **Their attempts are fruitless. Do you know why?** **_Because I stand FIRM in God’s word, and his armor protects me._** Peter, I want to share Ephesians 6:11-13 with you. _“**11** **Put on the full armor of God** , so that you can take your stand against the devil’s schemes. **12** For our struggle is not against flesh and blood, but against the rulers, against the authorities, against the powers of this dark world and **against the spiritual forces of evil in the heavenly realms**. **13** Therefore put on the full armor of God, so that when the day of evil comes, you may be able to stand your ground, and after you have done everything, to stand.”_

| | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | | | | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace For Governor | | Copyright © 2025 , All rights reserved.

This midmonth fundraising deadline comes at the exact midpoint in the FEC quarter. We are halfway to my Team having to compile our next public report of fundraising data.
So after tonight, my fundraising staff and I will meet to evaluate our progress – and see what we still need to accomplish. It’s a big day.
How much we raise tonight is going to directly impact our voter outreach budget moving forward – digital ads, yard signs, volunteer literature, and more. Campaigns are expensive, but we need to be prepared to run a robust one if we want to win.
Especially since my opponent, Tom Barrett, has doubled down on coordinating with national Republicans to collect billionaire donors.
They’ve already invested massive amounts of money toward winning this critical battleground seat.
**I’ll never take a dime of corporate PAC money,** so if I’m going to go toe-to-toe with them, I’ll need you by my side.
**[If you’ve been waiting for the most important moment to make your first donation, now is the time.
