name: AOC
subject: Munich Security Conference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Yesterday at the Munich Security Conference, someone asked me, “We have a situation where all budgets are going down — except defense spending, which is only going up. Shouldn’t we invest in democratic resilience by providing good public services, to protect our democracies _internally_ as well as externally?”
Yes, that is _absolutely_ right. One of the connections that is underdiscussed — particularly in the security space — is that we are seeing, around the world and in the United States, extreme levels of income inequality leads to social instability and drives authoritarianism, populism, and very dangerous domestic, internal politics.
That is a direct outcome of not just income inequality, but **the failures of democracies, over decades, to deliver** : the failure to deliver higher wages, the failure to rein in corporations.
In the United States, antitrust is such a foundational bedrock value not just because the ascent of monopolies creates the abuse of power by corporations in market power, but there is a level of market concentration and corporate consolidation where a massive company can get so big that its consolidated power can rival that of nation states.
In democracies, we have elected leaders. In massive corporations that then begin to consume the public sector, they start to call the shots.
We’re starting to see this with some of the billionaire class throwing their weight around in domestic politics, and in global politics as well.
**It is of utmost, urgent priority that we get our economic houses in order and deliver material gains for the working-class** , or else we will fall to a more isolated world governed by authoritarians — that also do not deliver to working people.
What the billionaire class wants is for all of us to give up and say, “It’s all gone to hell in a handbasket, and we’re done.” **Hell no**.
If you are a hard-working, innocent person: **I have got your back**.
If you are just trying to make it in this world: **I’ve got your back**.
If you’re not trying to hurt anybody: **I got your back**.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260214.azlCSt&refcode=em20260214-10787-P_FND_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10787%2E2526796%2E9EiLdS)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260214.azlCSt&refcode=em20260214-10787-P_FND_CTR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=10787%2E2526796%2E9EiLdS)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20260214?refcode=em20260214-10787-P_FND_CTR_CTR&t=21&refcode2=10787_2526796_9EiLdS&akid=10787%2E2526796%2E9EiLdS)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20260214-10787-P_FND_CTR_CTR&t=22&akid=10787%2E2526796%2E9EiLdS)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=10787%2E2526796%2E9EiLdS) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=10787%2E2526796%2E9EiLdS) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=10787%2E2526796%2E9EiLdS) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=26&akid=10787%2E2526796%2E9EiLdS)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Democrats are pouring millions into their voter drives, and Republicans are falling behind — not just in dollars, but in registrations. Our GOP Voter Verification Project is about to close in just HOURS... and your profile from your city is still missing. name: Team FLHP
subject: Democrats keep winning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Split a contribution between Fight Like Hell and the Michigan Democratic Party today |
#
---
Have you heard the great news, team? **Democrats keep winning in special elections — it just happened AGAIN in Louisiana.** In a district Trump carried by 13 points, voters showed up and flipped it blue. Now Michigan is next. There’s a special election in May, and the margins will be razor-thin. This race will be decided through rolling up our sleeves and hard work, reaching voters who might not even know there’s a special election happening in their community. That kind of work runs on $5 and $10 donations from people who understand that special elections can shape the entire direction of a state. There’s no group that understands that more than the Michigan Democratic Party, which is why we’re partnering with them today. **[If you can, will you chip in $10 right now and split it between Fight Like Hell PAC and the Michigan Democratic Party?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125407885/601688983/1889714362?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260214_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNhZGI4ZWUtZjgwOS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wATHHatDL-A7f3jzX5Lrqr0zehmZQq9TrmXTS2MFkHE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight Like Hell PAC and the Michigan Democratic Party will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125407886/601688984/1889714362?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260214_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjNhZGI4ZWUtZjgwOS1mMTExLTgzMmUtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NzMzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wATHHatDL-A7f3jzX5Lrqr0zehmZQq9TrmXTS2MFkHE=)

clean_body: Split a contribution between Fight Like Hell and the Michigan Democratic Party today | Have you heard the great news, team? Democrats keep winning in special elections — it just happened AGAIN in Louisiana. In a district Trump carried by 13 points, voters showed up and flipped it blue. Now Michigan is next. There’s a special election in May, and the margins will be razor-thin. This race will be decided through rolling up our sleeves and hard work, reaching voters who might not even know there’s a special election happening in their community. That kind of work runs on $5 and $10 donations from people who understand that special elections can shape the entire direction of a state. There’s no group that understands that more than the Michigan Democratic Party, which is why we’re partnering with them today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight Like Hell PAC and the Michigan Democratic Party will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Special elections move fast, so the groundwork we lay today is what will win in May. And when lots of people give a few dollars each, it adds up. While our incredible Democratic women candidates are out knocking doors, making calls, and fighting for their communities in some of the toughest races across the country, we want them to know that we've got their backs.

Running for office, especially in some of the competitive states and districts where we've made endorsements, takes courage. It means facing attacks, working around the clock, and pushing through when the going gets tough.

But our candidates keep going because they know what's at stake. And they deserve to know that people like you, Peter, are cheering them on every step of the way.

clean_body: Democratic pro-choice women should know that people like you are cheering them on every step of the way. | Peter, this Valentine's Day, we're doing something special: we're sending a card signed by the EMILYs List community to let our Democratic pro-choice women know they're not alone in this fight. | While our incredible Democratic women candidates are out knocking doors, making calls, and fighting for their communities in some of the toughest races across the country, we want them to know that we've got their backs. Running for office, especially in some of the competitive states and districts where we've made endorsements, takes courage. It means facing attacks, working around the clock, and pushing through when the going gets tough. But our candidates keep going because they know what's at stake. And they deserve to know that people like you, Peter, are cheering them on every step of the way. Thank you for being part of this fight. the EMILYs List Campaigns team | = | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Hey there,
There are even fewer hours left in February to hit this midmonth deadline, and when we fall behind Trump and his allies get louder while Nevada families lose out.
Our ads and organizers have one job: make sure voters know who is fighting for affordable healthcare, housing solutions, and accountability. A small gift right now keeps that work going through the hours that matter most.
**[Will you step up with a donation to help us finish strong and keep Nevada blue?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTi5m0IXnI-FPCgX3yFWasFMsQhOUp_amK0Jd5AM6isr0aIJzyMzeEUsEWIXeNaZkMrP68H0vveG1zH6jfRNXgrjQmSd13T7IXFu3xQqrcciSIdzYvjM7wQrKfeBucrvl8Xp-STuOnpOAlSiX1QoxLhRxzWV5APWwI5-u7mJgn1N3kw0g8plFd2XY_33gve26r_FqWZKTJU_QagpgLg18_Fc-N0B6JC4S6hyXUjtbm5IxY6dVnwtGqkzQdIbCJLEAD_asXwzM0UlHteHpbu0wTQ6Uwnj18dTQxBepGb0uXzDNacl4GQbN3i4SG327vf-bR/4o5/pMK6oJ70R3CGDz6_B4pkGA/h1/h001.a8fzsao0Jm2btLEffx6xDWR4ClTvoNr0T5u9XvIoQ7Q)**

| Supporters and Friends,

_I have good news and bad news_.

The bad news is that _**our election timetable has been condensed**_ , and ballot access signatures are now due two weeks earlier than originally scheduled.

The good news is that I’m running one of the most adept campaigns in Arizona, engaging with voters who are crying out for unshakable conservative leadership.

_It’s not too late for you to join my campaign for LD27_ : [**all you need to do is sign up at this E-QUAL link and lend your signature**](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=c539e7d14a&e=b78dc6f299).

With your VOTER ID or Driver License Number in hand, [**the process can take less than five minutes**](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=219cf5dbe0&e=b78dc6f299). It’s not only the simplest method but also the safest, armoring our election system from potential fraud.
Every single signature will count towards our victory.

There’s no time left to sit on your hands: [**sign up now**](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=1fdb9df20a&e=b78dc6f299)!

body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5213%2E35263%2EEf-yGZ)
To everybody who cares about taking back the Senate majority, please don’t click away from this email. [**U.S. Army Veteran Alex Vindman just launched his campaign for U.S. Senate in Florida, and we are humbly asking you to split a donation to his campaign today.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-vindman.euoYPM&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260214_PM2_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5213%2E35263%2EEf-yGZ) [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-vindman.euoYPM&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260214_PM2_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5213%2E35263%2EEf-yGZ)
Please give me a moment to explain. For more than 20 years, Alex served our country in uniform. After listening to Donald Trump try to extort Ukraine into investigating a political rival, Alex took action by blowing the whistle on the Trump-Ukraine phone call — leading to Trump’s first impeachment. Trump retaliated by trying to end his military career. Now, Alex is running for Senate to defend our democracy and put a check on an outlaw president. Alex can win this race...but he can’t do it alone. If everyone reading this contributed just $10 today, Alex would have the resources to overcome the spending from the billionaires and reach persuadable Florida voters. But not everyone can give, which is why we need everyone who knows the stakes of this upcoming election to chip in. [**Will you please split a donation between Alex Vindman and me before midnight? name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Tonight:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter,
We’re reaching out to ask if you can contribute $5 to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign tonight.
Not tomorrow, not next week, but **tonight.** Here’s why:
Donald Trump’s second term has done unfathomable damage to our country and the lives of millions of people. Trump and his MAGA allies are hoping that by overwhelming us with their disastrous agenda, we’ll be too exhausted and demoralized to fight back. _But we won’t be._
This year, we have a real chance to regain Congressional power and restore checks and balances in Washington. But Jon is MAGA’s #1 target. Trump and Republicans know that if they can defeat Jon, the chances of a Democratic Senate majority are finished.
That’s why we’re asking for your help **tonight.** The more contributions that we receive now, the earlier we’ll be able to mobilize people to volunteer, build the resources we’ll need to knock doors across Georgia, and ultimately get people to the polls.
[**If you’re ready to fight for our democracy and send Trump the biggest message possible this November, please consider making a $5 contribution to Jon’s reelection campaign tonight:**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-feb26.GJoCgS&refcode=em260214-2-f&t=1&akid=1641%2E5691347%2EwWHqhS)

"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things."_ _**Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup."_ _**Kevin S.**
"Perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start."_ _**Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings."_ _**Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal."_ _**Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great."_ _**Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed."_ _**John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"."_ [**ACT FAST and grab yours now before it's gone**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e24032193/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE4LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAyMTQ/LbmNsOVJEU0txbA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzI0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTNNTy04V0stMTgzMC0yMDI2MDIxNA/gaZEEPg/s3j022914b8) [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e24032193/VaHR0cHM6Ly80cHRyazE4LmNvbS9jbGljaw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjAyMTQ/LbmNsOVJEU0txbA/qP3RydmlkPTE0MzI0JkFGSUQ9MTA5NSZhZmZfc3ViPTNNTy04V0stMTgzMC0yMDI2MDIxNA/gaZEEPg/s3j022914b8)

President Trump wants to abolish DST and make Standard Time permanent so that there is more daylight in the morning. Others prefer making DST permanent for more daylight in the evening or continuing to change between DST and Standard Time.

_How we keep time affects you personally, so you MUST make your voice heard._

clean_body: Peter, President Trump wants to abolish President Trump wants to abolish DST and make Standard Time permanent so that there is more daylight in the morning. Others prefer making DST permanent for more daylight in the evening or continuing to change between DST and Standard Time. How we keep time affects you personally, so you MUST make your voice heard. Abolish DST \- Make DST Permanent \- No Change \- More daylight in the morning year-round for our circadian rhythm, more daylight in the evening year-round for recreational activities, or no change? President Trump has already revealed his plans, so now it's your turn to share your thoughts and represent your area. Thank you, Time Change Focus Group * Paid for by the Conservative Battleground Fund PAC (conservativebattlegroundfund.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 2272 Palm Dale Dr SW Wyoming, MI 49519 |

Hi Peter, it's Raja.

I wanted to share three critical numbers that define the state of my race:

31 DAYS

That’s how long there is until Election Day — and early voting is happening right now . This will be one of the FIRST opportunities of 2026 to send a signal that we’re DONE with Trump’s cruelty and chaos.

$7 MILLION

That’s how much Super PACs are spending to prop up my opponent. These shady PACs have already been caught breaking the law — and we just learned one of them is funded to the tune of six figures by a notorious ICE contractor.

$23

That’s our average grassroots donation. The only way to fight back against the Super PACs trying to buy our elections is when thousands of Americans fight back by giving just $23 at a time.

Tomorrow night is my February Mid-Month Deadline – one of our FINAL benchmarks before Election Day. My team and I set a must-hit $100,000 goal, but as of 5:45pm we’re falling short, so I need your help to finish strong.

So I’m personally asking: Can I count on you to chip in our average grassroots donation of $23 today to help hit my goal, fight back against their shady tactics, and win my critical race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_raja_fr_em_q12026?amount=23&amounts=5,10,23,50,100,250]

name: Robert Garcia
subject: I seek to interview Trump over Epstein files
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
What’s at stake this November:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125408526/601691274/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjZjN2YwZS0wMDBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C2utCWe73wgW5uQXwxQubZZQAUi5czWQBSsCcRIRmKI=)
As long as Donald Trump is president, real accountability will only happen if Democrats take the majority.
Right now, as we investigate the Jeffrey Epstein files, there are subpoenas outstanding. There are records that still haven’t been turned over. There are powerful people — including Donald Trump — who think if they stall long enough, the public will give up and move on.
**_They're wrong. _**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125408527/601691275/789508428?refcode=260214_RG_seek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjZjN2YwZS0wMDBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C2utCWe73wgW5uQXwxQubZZQAUi5czWQBSsCcRIRmKI=)
This investigation is just getting started — and if we retake the House, no one who has caused harm to the American people is off the table.
_Not former presidents. Not billionaires. No one who thinks their name or title puts them above scrutiny._
That’s what this election is about. But the other side wants to keep control precisely because they know what real oversight would expose.
**I’m not interested in protecting anyone’s comfort. I’m interested in the truth.**
But to get there, we have to win. And to win, we have to build a campaign strong enough to take back the House and put accountability back where it belongs.
**[If you believe no one is above the law, that survivors deserve answers, and that oversight should mean something, I’m asking you to chip in today. This is how we get the power to demand answers — and the courage to follow through. Let’s finish the job.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125408528/601691276/-309737922?refcode=260214_RG_seek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjZjN2YwZS0wMDBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C2utCWe73wgW5uQXwxQubZZQAUi5czWQBSsCcRIRmKI=)**
[donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125408529/601691277/-309737922?refcode=260214_RG_seek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjZjN2YwZS0wMDBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C2utCWe73wgW5uQXwxQubZZQAUi5czWQBSsCcRIRmKI=)
Thank you,
Robert Garcia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/125408530/601691278/789508428?refcode=260214_RG_seek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjZjN2YwZS0wMDBhLWYxMTEtODMyZS0wMDIyNDgyYTk3MzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C2utCWe73wgW5uQXwxQubZZQAUi5czWQBSsCcRIRmKI=)
